authors_text: Jinyu Zhao,Yusuke Monno,Masatoshi Okutomi
title: Polarimetric Multi-View Inverse Rendering
title_zh: 偏振多视图逆渲染
comment: Paper accepted in IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence (2022). arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2007.08830
comments: Paper accepted in IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence (2022). arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2007.08830
abstract: A polarization camera has great potential for 3D reconstruction since the angle of polarization (AoP) and the degree of polarization (DoP) of reflected light are related to an object's surface normal. In this paper, we propose a novel 3D reconstruction method called Polarimetric Multi-View Inverse Rendering (Polarimetric MVIR) that effectively exploits geometric, photometric, and polarimetric cues extracted from input multi-view color-polarization images. We first estimate camera poses and an initial 3D model by geometric reconstruction with a standard structure-from-motion and multi-view stereo pipeline. We then refine the initial model by optimizing photometric rendering errors and polarimetric errors using multi-view RGB, AoP, and DoP images, where we propose a novel polarimetric cost function that enables an effective constraint on the estimated surface normal of each vertex, while considering four possible ambiguous azimuth angles revealed from the AoP measurement. The weight for the polarimetric cost is effectively determined based on the DoP measurement, which is regarded as the reliability of polarimetric information. Experimental results using both synthetic and real data demonstrate that our Polarimetric MVIR can reconstruct a detailed 3D shape without assuming a specific surface material and lighting condition.
summary: A polarization camera has great potential for 3D reconstruction since the angle of polarization (AoP) and the degree of polarization (DoP) of reflected light are related to an object's surface normal. In this paper, we propose a novel 3D reconstruction method called Polarimetric Multi-View Inverse Rendering (Polarimetric MVIR) that effectively exploits geometric, photometric, and polarimetric cues extracted from input multi-view color-polarization images. We first estimate camera poses and an initial 3D model by geometric reconstruction with a standard structure-from-motion and multi-view stereo pipeline. We then refine the initial model by optimizing photometric rendering errors and polarimetric errors using multi-view RGB, AoP, and DoP images, where we propose a novel polarimetric cost function that enables an effective constraint on the estimated surface normal of each vertex, while considering four possible ambiguous azimuth angles revealed from the AoP measurement. The weight for the polarimetric cost is effectively determined based on the DoP measurement, which is regarded as the reliability of polarimetric information. Experimental results using both synthetic and real data demonstrate that our Polarimetric MVIR can reconstruct a detailed 3D shape without assuming a specific surface material and lighting condition.
abstract_zh: 偏振相机在 3D 重建方面具有巨大潜力，因为反射光的偏振角 (AoP) 和偏振度 (DoP) 与物体表面法线相关。在本文中，我们提出了一种称为偏振多视图逆渲染（Polarimetric MVIR）的新型 3D 重建方法，该方法有效地利用从输入多视图颜色偏振图像中提取的几何、光度和偏振线索。我们首先使用标准的运动结构和多视图立体管道通过几何重建来估计相机姿势和初始 3D 模型。然后，我们通过使用多视图 RGB、AoP 和 DoP 图像优化光度渲染误差和偏振误差来细化初始模型，其中我们提出了一种新颖的偏振成本函数，该函数能够有效约束每个顶点的估计表面法线，同时考虑 AoP 测量中揭示的四个可能的模糊方位角。基于DoP测量有效确定极化成本的权重，将其视为极化信息的可靠性。使用合成数据和真实数据的实验结果表明，我们的偏振 MVIR 可以重建详细的 3D 形状，而无需假设特定的表面材料和照明条件。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种利用偏振多视角逆向渲染的三维重建方法，通过结合几何、光度和偏振线索提高重建精度。
AI.motivation: 偏振相机通过反射光的偏振角和偏振度与物体表面法线的关系，为三维重建提供了新的信息源，但现有方法未能有效利用这些偏振线索。
AI.method: 首先通过结构从运动和多视角立体视觉进行几何重建，随后通过优化光度渲染误差和偏振误差细化模型，提出考虑偏振度可靠性的新型偏振代价函数。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在合成和真实数据上均能重建出详细三维形状，无需假设特定表面材质和光照条件。
AI.conclusion: 通过有效结合偏振信息，本文方法在复杂场景下实现了更鲁棒的三维重建，为多视角逆向渲染提供了新思路。

authors_text: Feng Xue,Zi He,Chuanlong Xie,Falong Tan,Zhenguo Li
title: Boosting Out-of-Distribution Detection with Multiple Pre-trained Models
title_zh: 使用多个预训练模型增强分布外检测
abstract: Out-of-Distribution (OOD) detection, i.e., identifying whether an input is sampled from a novel distribution other than the training distribution, is a critical task for safely deploying machine learning systems in the open world. Recently, post hoc detection utilizing pre-trained models has shown promising performance and can be scaled to large-scale problems. This advance raises a natural question: Can we leverage the diversity of multiple pre-trained models to improve the performance of post hoc detection methods? In this work, we propose a detection enhancement method by ensembling multiple detection decisions derived from a zoo of pre-trained models. Our approach uses the p-value instead of the commonly used hard threshold and leverages a fundamental framework of multiple hypothesis testing to control the true positive rate of In-Distribution (ID) data. We focus on the usage of model zoos and provide systematic empirical comparisons with current state-of-the-art methods on various OOD detection benchmarks. The proposed ensemble scheme shows consistent improvement compared to single-model detectors and significantly outperforms the current competitive methods. Our method substantially improves the relative performance by 65.40% and 26.96% on the CIFAR10 and ImageNet benchmarks.
summary: Out-of-Distribution (OOD) detection, i.e., identifying whether an input is sampled from a novel distribution other than the training distribution, is a critical task for safely deploying machine learning systems in the open world. Recently, post hoc detection utilizing pre-trained models has shown promising performance and can be scaled to large-scale problems. This advance raises a natural question: Can we leverage the diversity of multiple pre-trained models to improve the performance of post hoc detection methods? In this work, we propose a detection enhancement method by ensembling multiple detection decisions derived from a zoo of pre-trained models. Our approach uses the p-value instead of the commonly used hard threshold and leverages a fundamental framework of multiple hypothesis testing to control the true positive rate of In-Distribution (ID) data. We focus on the usage of model zoos and provide systematic empirical comparisons with current state-of-the-art methods on various OOD detection benchmarks. The proposed ensemble scheme shows consistent improvement compared to single-model detectors and significantly outperforms the current competitive methods. Our method substantially improves the relative performance by 65.40% and 26.96% on the CIFAR10 and ImageNet benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 分布外（OOD）检测，即识别输入是否是从训练分布以外的新分布中采样的，是在开放世界中安全部署机器学习系统的一项关键任务。最近，利用预训练模型的事后检测已显示出有希望的性能，并且可以扩展到大规模问题。这一进展提出了一个自然的问题：我们能否利用多个预训练模型的多样性来提高事后检测方法的性能？在这项工作中，我们提出了一种检测增强方法，通过集成从预先训练的模型中得出的多个检测决策。我们的方法使用 p 值而不是常用的硬阈值，并利用多重假设检验的基本框架来控制分布内 (ID) 数据的真阳性率。我们专注于模型动物园的使用，并在各种 OOD 检测基准上与当前最先进的方法进行系统的实证比较。与单模型检测器相比，所提出的集成方案显示出一致的改进，并且显着优于当前的竞争方法。我们的方法在 CIFAR10 和 ImageNet 基准测试上将相对性能显着提高了 65.40% 和 26.96%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过集成多个预训练模型的检测决策来提升分布外检测（OOD）性能的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有基于单个预训练模型的后验检测方法在处理分布外数据时存在局限性，利用多个模型的多样性可能进一步提升检测效果。
AI.method: 采用多个预训练模型生成检测决策，通过p值替代硬阈值，并结合多重假设检验框架控制正常数据的真阳性率。
AI.result: 在CIFAR10和ImageNet基准测试中，相对于单模型检测器分别提升了65.40%和26.96%的相对性能，显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 集成多个预训练模型的检测方案能有效提升OOD检测性能，为开放世界中的安全部署提供了新思路。

authors_text: Shang Zhao,Yanzhe Liu,Qiyuan Wang,Dai Sun,Rong Liu,S. Kevin Zhou
title: MURPHY: Relations Matter in Surgical Workflow Analysis
title_zh: MURPHY：手术工作流程分析中的关系很重要
abstract: Autonomous robotic surgery has advanced significantly based on analysis of visual and temporal cues in surgical workflow, but relational cues from domain knowledge remain under investigation. Complex relations in surgical annotations can be divided into intra- and inter-relations, both valuable to autonomous systems to comprehend surgical workflows. Intra- and inter-relations describe the relevance of various categories within a particular annotation type and the relevance of different annotation types, respectively. This paper aims to systematically investigate the importance of relational cues in surgery. First, we contribute the RLLS12M dataset, a large-scale collection of robotic left lateral sectionectomy (RLLS), by curating 50 videos of 50 patients operated by 5 surgeons and annotating a hierarchical workflow, which consists of 3 inter- and 6 intra-relations, 6 steps, 15 tasks, and 38 activities represented as the triplet of 11 instruments, 8 actions, and 16 objects, totaling 2,113,510 video frames and 12,681,060 annotation entities. Correspondingly, we propose a multi-relation purification hybrid network (MURPHY), which aptly incorporates novel relation modules to augment the feature representation by purifying relational features using the intra- and inter-relations embodied in annotations. The intra-relation module leverages a R-GCN to implant visual features in different graph relations, which are aggregated using a targeted relation purification with affinity information measuring label consistency and feature similarity. The inter-relation module is motivated by attention mechanisms to regularize the influence of relational features based on the hierarchy of annotation types from the domain knowledge. Extensive experimental results on the curated RLLS dataset confirm the effectiveness of our approach, demonstrating that relations matter in surgical workflow analysis.
summary: Autonomous robotic surgery has advanced significantly based on analysis of visual and temporal cues in surgical workflow, but relational cues from domain knowledge remain under investigation. Complex relations in surgical annotations can be divided into intra- and inter-relations, both valuable to autonomous systems to comprehend surgical workflows. Intra- and inter-relations describe the relevance of various categories within a particular annotation type and the relevance of different annotation types, respectively. This paper aims to systematically investigate the importance of relational cues in surgery. First, we contribute the RLLS12M dataset, a large-scale collection of robotic left lateral sectionectomy (RLLS), by curating 50 videos of 50 patients operated by 5 surgeons and annotating a hierarchical workflow, which consists of 3 inter- and 6 intra-relations, 6 steps, 15 tasks, and 38 activities represented as the triplet of 11 instruments, 8 actions, and 16 objects, totaling 2,113,510 video frames and 12,681,060 annotation entities. Correspondingly, we propose a multi-relation purification hybrid network (MURPHY), which aptly incorporates novel relation modules to augment the feature representation by purifying relational features using the intra- and inter-relations embodied in annotations. The intra-relation module leverages a R-GCN to implant visual features in different graph relations, which are aggregated using a targeted relation purification with affinity information measuring label consistency and feature similarity. The inter-relation module is motivated by attention mechanisms to regularize the influence of relational features based on the hierarchy of annotation types from the domain knowledge. Extensive experimental results on the curated RLLS dataset confirm the effectiveness of our approach, demonstrating that relations matter in surgical workflow analysis.
abstract_zh: 基于对手术工作流程中的视觉和时间线索的分析，自主机器人手术取得了显着进展，但来自领域知识的关系线索仍在研究中。手术注释中的复杂关系可以分为内部关系和相互关系，这两种关系对于自治系统理解手术工作流程都很有价值。内部关系和相互关系分别描述特定注释类型内各种类别的相关性以及不同注释类型的相关性。本文旨在系统地研究关系线索在手术中的重要性。首先，我们贡献了 RLLS12M 数据集，这是机器人左外侧切片切除术 (RLLS) 的大规模集合，通过整理由 5 名外科医生操作的 50 名患者的 50 个视频，并注释分层工作流程，该工作流程由 3 个相互关系和 6 个内部关系、6 个步骤、15 个任务和 38 个活动组成，表示为 11 个仪器、8 个动作和 16 个对象的三元组，总计 2,113,510视频帧和 12,681,060 个注释实体。相应地，我们提出了一种多关系净化混合网络（MURPHY），它适当地结合了新颖的关系模块，通过使用注释中体现的内部和相互关系来净化关系特征来增强特征表示。内部关系模块利用 R-GCN 在不同的图关系中植入视觉特征，这些特征使用有针对性的关系纯化和测量标签一致性和特征相似性的亲和力信息进行聚合。相互关系模块由注意力机制驱动，根据领域知识中注释类型的层次结构来规范关系特征的影响。对精心策划的 RLLS 数据集进行的广泛实验结果证实了我们方法的有效性，证明关系在手术工作流程分析中很重要。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MURPHY方法，通过整合手术流程中的关系线索（包括术内和术间关系）来改进自主机器人手术的工作流分析。
AI.motivation: 尽管视觉和时间线索在手术工作流分析中已被广泛研究，但基于领域知识的关系线索尚未被充分探索，而这些关系对理解复杂手术流程至关重要。
AI.method: 构建RLLS12M数据集并提出多关系净化混合网络（MURPHY），包含术内关系模块（基于R-GCN和目标关系净化）与术间关系模块（基于注意力机制和领域知识层次结构）。
AI.result: 在RLLS12M数据集上的实验验证了MURPHY方法的有效性，证明关系线索对手术工作流分析具有显著提升作用。
AI.conclusion: 关系线索（术内和术间）在手术工作流分析中起关键作用，MURPHY方法通过整合这些关系显著提升了自主手术系统的理解能力。

search_text: MURPHY: Relations Matter in Surgical Workflow Analysis MURPHY：手术工作流程分析中的关系很重要 Autonomous robotic surgery has advanced significantly based on analysis of visual and temporal cues in surgical workflow, but relational cues from domain knowledge remain under investigation. Complex relations in surgical annotations can be divided into intra- and inter-relations, both valuable to autonomous systems to comprehend surgical workflows. Intra- and inter-relations describe the relevance of various categories within a particular annotation type and the relevance of different annotation types, respectively. This paper aims to systematically investigate the importance of relational cues in surgery. First, we contribute the RLLS12M dataset, a large-scale collection of robotic left lateral sectionectomy (RLLS), by curating 50 videos of 50 patients operated by 5 surgeons and annotating a hierarchical workflow, which consists of 3 inter- and 6 intra-relations, 6 steps, 15 tasks, and 38 activities represented as the triplet of 11 instruments, 8 actions, and 16 objects, totaling 2,113,510 video frames and 12,681,060 annotation entities. Correspondingly, we propose a multi-relation purification hybrid network (MURPHY), which aptly incorporates novel relation modules to augment the feature representation by purifying relational features using the intra- and inter-relations embodied in annotations. The intra-relation module leverages a R-GCN to implant visual features in different graph relations, which are aggregated using a targeted relation purification with affinity information measuring label consistency and feature similarity. The inter-relation module is motivated by attention mechanisms to regularize the influence of relational features based on the hierarchy of annotation types from the domain knowledge. Extensive experimental results on the curated RLLS dataset confirm the effectiveness of our approach, demonstrating that relations matter in surgical workflow analysis. 基于对手术工作流程中的视觉和时间线索的分析，自主机器人手术取得了显着进展，但来自领域知识的关系线索仍在研究中。手术注释中的复杂关系可以分为内部关系和相互关系，这两种关系对于自治系统理解手术工作流程都很有价值。内部关系和相互关系分别描述特定注释类型内各种类别的相关性以及不同注释类型的相关性。本文旨在系统地研究关系线索在手术中的重要性。首先，我们贡献了 RLLS12M 数据集，这是机器人左外侧切片切除术 (RLLS) 的大规模集合，通过整理由 5 名外科医生操作的 50 名患者的 50 个视频，并注释分层工作流程，该工作流程由 3 个相互关系和 6 个内部关系、6 个步骤、15 个任务和 38 个活动组成，表示为 11 个仪器、8 个动作和 16 个对象的三元组，总计 2,113,510视频帧和 12,681,060 个注释实体。相应地，我们提出了一种多关系净化混合网络（MURPHY），它适当地结合了新颖的关系模块，通过使用注释中体现的内部和相互关系来净化关系特征来增强特征表示。内部关系模块利用 R-GCN 在不同的图关系中植入视觉特征，这些特征使用有针对性的关系纯化和测量标签一致性和特征相似性的亲和力信息进行聚合。相互关系模块由注意力机制驱动，根据领域知识中注释类型的层次结构来规范关系特征的影响。对精心策划的 RLLS 数据集进行的广泛实验结果证实了我们方法的有效性，证明关系在手术工作流程分析中很重要。 本文提出MURPHY方法，通过整合手术流程中的关系线索（包括术内和术间关系）来改进自主机器人手术的工作流分析。 Shang Zhao,Yanzhe Liu,Qiyuan Wang,Dai Sun,Rong Liu,S. authors_text: Tobias Rohrer,Lilli Frison,Lukas Kaupenjohann,Katrin Scharf,Elke Hergenrother
title: Deep Reinforcement Learning for Heat Pump Control
title_zh: 热泵控制的深度强化学习
abstract: Heating in private households is a major contributor to the emissions generated today. Heat pumps are a promising alternative for heat generation and are a key technology in achieving our goals of the German energy transformation and to become less dependent on fossil fuels. Today, the majority of heat pumps in the field are controlled by a simple heating curve, which is a naive mapping of the current outdoor temperature to a control action. A more advanced control approach is model predictive control (MPC) which was applied in multiple research works to heat pump control. However, MPC is heavily dependent on the building model, which has several disadvantages. Motivated by this and by recent breakthroughs in the field, this work applies deep reinforcement learning (DRL) to heat pump control in a simulated environment. Through a comparison to MPC, it could be shown that it is possible to apply DRL in a model-free manner to achieve MPC-like performance. This work extends other works which have already applied DRL to building heating operation by performing an in-depth analysis of the learned control strategies and by giving a detailed comparison of the two state-of-the-art control methods.
summary: Heating in private households is a major contributor to the emissions generated today. Heat pumps are a promising alternative for heat generation and are a key technology in achieving our goals of the German energy transformation and to become less dependent on fossil fuels. Today, the majority of heat pumps in the field are controlled by a simple heating curve, which is a naive mapping of the current outdoor temperature to a control action. A more advanced control approach is model predictive control (MPC) which was applied in multiple research works to heat pump control. However, MPC is heavily dependent on the building model, which has several disadvantages. Motivated by this and by recent breakthroughs in the field, this work applies deep reinforcement learning (DRL) to heat pump control in a simulated environment. Through a comparison to MPC, it could be shown that it is possible to apply DRL in a model-free manner to achieve MPC-like performance. This work extends other works which have already applied DRL to building heating operation by performing an in-depth analysis of the learned control strategies and by giving a detailed comparison of the two state-of-the-art control methods.
abstract_zh: 私人家庭供暖是当今排放的主要来源。热泵是一种很有前景的供热替代方案，也是实现德国能源转型和减少对化石燃料依赖的关键技术。如今，该领域的大多数热泵都是通过简单的加热曲线来控制的，这是当前室外温度到控制动作的简单映射。更先进的控制方法是模型预测控制（MPC），它已应用于热泵控制的多项研究工作中。然而，MPC 严重依赖于建筑模型，这有几个缺点。受此以及该领域最近突破的推动，这项工作将深度强化学习（DRL）应用于模拟环境中的热泵控制。通过与 MPC 的比较，可以表明可以以无模型的方式应用 DRL 来实现类似 MPC 的性能。这项工作通过对学习的控制策略进行深入分析并对两种最先进的控制方法进行详细比较，扩展了已经将 DRL 应用到建筑供暖操作的其他工作。

AI.tldr: 本文将深度强化学习（DRL）应用于热泵控制，通过模拟环境实现类似模型预测控制（MPC）的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统热泵控制方法（如加热曲线和MPC）存在依赖建筑模型、适应性差等缺陷，需探索更高效的控制策略以支持能源转型目标。
AI.method: 在模拟环境中采用深度强化学习方法，通过与MPC的对比实验验证其性能，并深入分析学习到的控制策略。
AI.result: 实验表明，DRL可在无需建筑模型的情况下实现与MPC相当的控制效果，且策略适应性更优。
AI.conclusion: DRL为热泵控制提供了模型无关的可行方案，未来可进一步优化策略泛化能力以应对实际场景复杂性。

Heat pumps are a promising alternative for heat generation and are a key technology in achieving our goals of the German energy transformation and to become less dependent on fossil fuels. Today, the majority of heat pumps in the field are controlled by a simple heating curve, which is a naive mapping of the current outdoor temperature to a control action. A more advanced control approach is model predictive control (MPC) which was applied in multiple research works to heat pump control. However, MPC is heavily dependent on the building model, which has several disadvantages. Motivated by this and by recent breakthroughs in the field, this work applies deep reinforcement learning (DRL) to heat pump control in a simulated environment. Through a comparison to MPC, it could be shown that it is possible to apply DRL in a model-free manner to achieve MPC-like performance. This work extends other works which have already applied DRL to building heating operation by performing an in-depth analysis of the learned control strategies and by giving a detailed comparison of the two state-of-the-art control methods. 私人家庭供暖是当今排放的主要来源。热泵是一种很有前景的供热替代方案，也是实现德国能源转型和减少对化石燃料依赖的关键技术。如今，该领域的大多数热泵都是通过简单的加热曲线来控制的，这是当前室外温度到控制动作的简单映射。更先进的控制方法是模型预测控制（MPC），它已应用于热泵控制的多项研究工作中。然而，MPC 严重依赖于建筑模型，这有几个缺点。受此以及该领域最近突破的推动，这项工作将深度强化学习（DRL）应用于模拟环境中的热泵控制。通过与 MPC 的比较，可以表明可以以无模型的方式应用 DRL 来实现类似 MPC 的性能。这项工作通过对学习的控制策略进行深入分析并对两种最先进的控制方法进行详细比较，扩展了已经将 DRL 应用到建筑供暖操作的其他工作。 本文将深度强化学习（DRL）应用于热泵控制，通过模拟环境实现类似模型预测控制（MPC）的性能。 Tobias Rohrer,Lilli Frison,Lukas Kaupenjohann,Katrin Scharf,Elke Hergenrother cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Saeed Vahidian,Sreevatsank Kadaveru,Woonjoon Baek,Weijia Wang,Vyacheslav Kungurtsev,Chen Chen,Mubarak Shah,Bill Lin
title: When Do Curricula Work in Federated Learning?
title_zh: 课程何时适用于联邦学习？
abstract: An oft-cited open problem of federated learning is the existence of data heterogeneity at the clients. One pathway to understanding the drastic accuracy drop in federated learning is by scrutinizing the behavior of the clients' deep models on data with different levels of "difficulty", which has been left unaddressed. In this paper, we investigate a different and rarely studied dimension of FL: ordered learning. Specifically, we aim to investigate how ordered learning principles can contribute to alleviating the heterogeneity effects in FL. We present theoretical analysis and conduct extensive empirical studies on the efficacy of orderings spanning three kinds of learning: curriculum, anti-curriculum, and random curriculum. We find that curriculum learning largely alleviates non-IIDness. Interestingly, the more disparate the data distributions across clients the more they benefit from ordered learning. We provide analysis explaining this phenomenon, specifically indicating how curriculum training appears to make the objective landscape progressively less convex, suggesting fast converging iterations at the beginning of the training procedure. We derive quantitative results of convergence for both convex and nonconvex objectives by modeling the curriculum training on federated devices as local SGD with locally biased stochastic gradients. Also, inspired by ordered learning, we propose a novel client selection technique that benefits from the real-world disparity in the clients. Our proposed approach to client selection has a synergic effect when applied together with ordered learning in FL.
summary: An oft-cited open problem of federated learning is the existence of data heterogeneity at the clients. One pathway to understanding the drastic accuracy drop in federated learning is by scrutinizing the behavior of the clients' deep models on data with different levels of "difficulty", which has been left unaddressed. In this paper, we investigate a different and rarely studied dimension of FL: ordered learning. Specifically, we aim to investigate how ordered learning principles can contribute to alleviating the heterogeneity effects in FL. We present theoretical analysis and conduct extensive empirical studies on the efficacy of orderings spanning three kinds of learning: curriculum, anti-curriculum, and random curriculum. We find that curriculum learning largely alleviates non-IIDness. Interestingly, the more disparate the data distributions across clients the more they benefit from ordered learning. We provide analysis explaining this phenomenon, specifically indicating how curriculum training appears to make the objective landscape progressively less convex, suggesting fast converging iterations at the beginning of the training procedure. We derive quantitative results of convergence for both convex and nonconvex objectives by modeling the curriculum training on federated devices as local SGD with locally biased stochastic gradients. Also, inspired by ordered learning, we propose a novel client selection technique that benefits from the real-world disparity in the clients. Our proposed approach to client selection has a synergic effect when applied together with ordered learning in FL.
abstract_zh: 联邦学习经常被提及的一个开放问题是客户端存在数据异构性。理解联邦学习准确性急剧下降的一种途径是仔细检查客户深度模型在不同“难度”级别的数据上的行为，而这一问题尚未得到解决。在本文中，我们研究了 FL 的一个不同且很少研究的维度：有序学习。具体来说，我们的目标是研究有序学习原则如何有助于减轻 FL 中的异质性影响。我们对课程、反课程和随机课程这三种学习的排序效果进行了理论分析和广泛的实证研究。我们发现课程学习在很大程度上减轻了非独立同分布性。有趣的是，客户之间的数据分布越不同，他们从有序学习中受益就越多。我们提供了解释这种现象的分析，特别指出课程培训如何使客观景观逐渐变得不那么凸，表明在培训过程开始时进行快速收敛迭代。我们通过将联邦设备上的课程训练建模为具有局部偏置随机梯度的局部 SGD，得出凸目标和非凸目标收敛的定量结果。此外，受有序学习的启发，我们提出了一种新颖的客户选择技术，该技术受益于客户的现实世界差异。我们提出的客户选择方法与 FL 中的有序学习一起应用时会产生协同效应。

AI.tldr: 本文研究联邦学习中课程学习等有序学习策略对缓解客户端数据异质性影响的效果。
AI.motivation: 联邦学习中客户端数据非独立同分布（non-IID）导致准确率显著下降，现有研究未充分探讨有序学习机制对此问题的潜在作用。
AI.method: 通过理论分析与实验验证，对比课程学习、反课程学习和随机课程学习三种策略，结合局部随机梯度下降建模并提出新型客户端选择技术。
AI.result: 课程学习能有效缓解non-IID问题，数据分布差异越大效果越显著；提出的新客户端选择方法与有序学习协同提升性能。
AI.conclusion: 有序学习机制（尤其是课程学习）可通过优化目标函数景观凸性，为联邦学习中异质数据场景提供有效解决方案。

search_text: When Do Curricula Work in Federated Learning? 课程何时适用于联邦学习？ An oft-cited open problem of federated learning is the existence of data heterogeneity at the clients. One pathway to understanding the drastic accuracy drop in federated learning is by scrutinizing the behavior of the clients' deep models on data with different levels of "difficulty", which has been left unaddressed. In this paper, we investigate a different and rarely studied dimension of FL: ordered learning. Specifically, we aim to investigate how ordered learning principles can contribute to alleviating the heterogeneity effects in FL. We present theoretical analysis and conduct extensive empirical studies on the efficacy of orderings spanning three kinds of learning: curriculum, anti-curriculum, and random curriculum. We find that curriculum learning largely alleviates non-IIDness. Interestingly, the more disparate the data distributions across clients the more they benefit from ordered learning. We provide analysis explaining this phenomenon, specifically indicating how curriculum training appears to make the objective landscape progressively less convex, suggesting fast converging iterations at the beginning of the training procedure. We derive quantitative results of convergence for both convex and nonconvex objectives by modeling the curriculum training on federated devices as local SGD with locally biased stochastic gradients. Also, inspired by ordered learning, we propose a novel client selection technique that benefits from the real-world disparity in the clients. Our proposed approach to client selection has a synergic effect when applied together with ordered learning in FL. 联邦学习经常被提及的一个开放问题是客户端存在数据异构性。理解联邦学习准确性急剧下降的一种途径是仔细检查客户深度模型在不同“难度”级别的数据上的行为，而这一问题尚未得到解决。在本文中，我们研究了 FL 的一个不同且很少研究的维度：有序学习。具体来说，我们的目标是研究有序学习原则如何有助于减轻 FL 中的异质性影响。我们对课程、反课程和随机课程这三种学习的排序效果进行了理论分析和广泛的实证研究。我们发现课程学习在很大程度上减轻了非独立同分布性。有趣的是，客户之间的数据分布越不同，他们从有序学习中受益就越多。我们提供了解释这种现象的分析，特别指出课程培训如何使客观景观逐渐变得不那么凸，表明在培训过程开始时进行快速收敛迭代。我们通过将联邦设备上的课程训练建模为具有局部偏置随机梯度的局部 SGD，得出凸目标和非凸目标收敛的定量结果。此外，受有序学习的启发，我们提出了一种新颖的客户选择技术，该技术受益于客户的现实世界差异。我们提出的客户选择方法与 FL 中的有序学习一起应用时会产生协同效应。 本文研究联邦学习中课程学习等有序学习策略对缓解客户端数据异质性影响的效果。 Saeed Vahidian,Sreevatsank Kadaveru,Woonjoon Baek,Weijia Wang,Vyacheslav Kungurtsev,Chen Chen,Mubarak Shah,Bill Lin cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.DC

authors_text: Jiazheng Chen,Wanchun Liu,Daniel E. Quevedo,Saeed R. Khosravirad,Yonghui Li,Branka Vucetic
title: Structure-Enhanced DRL for Optimal Transmission Scheduling
title_zh: 用于优化传输调度的结构增强 DRL
comment: Paper submitted to IEEE. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2211.10827
comments: Paper submitted to IEEE. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2211.10827
abstract: Remote state estimation of large-scale distributed dynamic processes plays an important role in Industry 4.0 applications. In this paper, we focus on the transmission scheduling problem of a remote estimation system. First, we derive some structural properties of the optimal sensor scheduling policy over fading channels. Then, building on these theoretical guidelines, we develop a structure-enhanced deep reinforcement learning (DRL) framework for optimal scheduling of the system to achieve the minimum overall estimation mean-square error (MSE). In particular, we propose a structure-enhanced action selection method, which tends to select actions that obey the policy structure. This explores the action space more effectively and enhances the learning efficiency of DRL agents. Furthermore, we introduce a structure-enhanced loss function to add penalties to actions that do not follow the policy structure. The new loss function guides the DRL to converge to the optimal policy structure quickly. Our numerical experiments illustrate that the proposed structure-enhanced DRL algorithms can save the training time by 50% and reduce the remote estimation MSE by 10% to 25% when compared to benchmark DRL algorithms. In addition, we show that the derived structural properties exist in a wide range of dynamic scheduling problems that go beyond remote state estimation.
summary: Remote state estimation of large-scale distributed dynamic processes plays an important role in Industry 4.0 applications. In this paper, we focus on the transmission scheduling problem of a remote estimation system. First, we derive some structural properties of the optimal sensor scheduling policy over fading channels. Then, building on these theoretical guidelines, we develop a structure-enhanced deep reinforcement learning (DRL) framework for optimal scheduling of the system to achieve the minimum overall estimation mean-square error (MSE). In particular, we propose a structure-enhanced action selection method, which tends to select actions that obey the policy structure. This explores the action space more effectively and enhances the learning efficiency of DRL agents. Furthermore, we introduce a structure-enhanced loss function to add penalties to actions that do not follow the policy structure. The new loss function guides the DRL to converge to the optimal policy structure quickly. Our numerical experiments illustrate that the proposed structure-enhanced DRL algorithms can save the training time by 50% and reduce the remote estimation MSE by 10% to 25% when compared to benchmark DRL algorithms. In addition, we show that the derived structural properties exist in a wide range of dynamic scheduling problems that go beyond remote state estimation.
abstract_zh: 大规模分布式动态过程的远程状态估计在工业4.0应用中发挥着重要作用。在本文中，我们重点研究远程估计系统的传输调度问题。首先，我们推导出衰落信道上最优传感器调度策略的一些结构特性。然后，在这些理论指导的基础上，我们开发了一个结构增强的深度强化学习（DRL）框架，用于系统的优化调度，以实现最小的总体估计均方误差（MSE）。特别是，我们提出了一种结构增强的动作选择方法，该方法倾向于选择服从策略结构的动作。这可以更有效地探索动作空间并提高 DRL 代理的学习效率。此外，我们引入了结构增强损失函数，对不遵循策略结构的行为增加惩罚。新的损失函数引导DRL快速收敛到最优策略结构。我们的数值实验表明，与基准 DRL 算法相比，所提出的结构增强 DRL 算法可以节省 50% 的训练时间，并将远程估计 MSE 降低 10% 至 25%。此外，我们表明派生的结构属性存在于超出远程状态估计的广泛动态调度问题中。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过结构增强的深度强化学习框架解决远程估计系统的最优传输调度问题，以最小化估计均方误差。
AI.motivation: 传统DRL在传输调度中存在训练时间长、估计误差大的问题，需利用结构特性提升效率。
AI.method: 提出结构增强的动作选择与损失函数，通过引导动作选择和惩罚非结构化动作，提升DRL学习效率与策略收敛速度。
AI.result: 实验表明，该算法训练时间减少50%，MSE降低10%-25%，优于基准DRL算法。
AI.conclusion: 结构增强的DRL框架在远程估计及更广的动态调度问题中具有显著优势。

authors_text: Rui Ma,Mengxi Guo,Yi Hou,Fan Yang,Yuan Li,Huizhu Jia,Xiaodong Xie
title: Towards Blind Watermarking: Combining Invertible and Non-invertible Mechanisms
title_zh: 走向盲水印：结合可逆和不可逆机制
comment: 9 pages, 9 figures, 5 tables
comments: 9 pages, 9 figures, 5 tables
abstract: Blind watermarking provides powerful evidence for copyright protection, image authentication, and tampering identification. However, it remains a challenge to design a watermarking model with high imperceptibility and robustness against strong noise attacks. To resolve this issue, we present a framework Combining the Invertible and Non-invertible (CIN) mechanisms. The CIN is composed of the invertible part to achieve high imperceptibility and the non-invertible part to strengthen the robustness against strong noise attacks. For the invertible part, we develop a diffusion and extraction module (DEM) and a fusion and split module (FSM) to embed and extract watermarks symmetrically in an invertible way. For the non-invertible part, we introduce a non-invertible attention-based module (NIAM) and the noise-specific selection module (NSM) to solve the asymmetric extraction under a strong noise attack. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our framework outperforms the current state-of-the-art methods of imperceptibility and robustness significantly. Our framework can achieve an average of 99.99% accuracy and 67.66 dB PSNR under noise-free conditions, while 96.64% and 39.28 dB combined strong noise attacks. The code will be available in https://github.com/rmpku/CIN.
summary: Blind watermarking provides powerful evidence for copyright protection, image authentication, and tampering identification. However, it remains a challenge to design a watermarking model with high imperceptibility and robustness against strong noise attacks. To resolve this issue, we present a framework Combining the Invertible and Non-invertible (CIN) mechanisms. The CIN is composed of the invertible part to achieve high imperceptibility and the non-invertible part to strengthen the robustness against strong noise attacks. For the invertible part, we develop a diffusion and extraction module (DEM) and a fusion and split module (FSM) to embed and extract watermarks symmetrically in an invertible way. For the non-invertible part, we introduce a non-invertible attention-based module (NIAM) and the noise-specific selection module (NSM) to solve the asymmetric extraction under a strong noise attack. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our framework outperforms the current state-of-the-art methods of imperceptibility and robustness significantly. Our framework can achieve an average of 99.99% accuracy and 67.66 dB PSNR under noise-free conditions, while 96.64% and 39.28 dB combined strong noise attacks. The code will be available in https://github.com/rmpku/CIN.
abstract_zh: 盲水印为版权保护、图像认证、篡改识别提供了有力的证据。然而，设计一种具有高不可察觉性和抗强噪声攻击鲁棒性的水印模型仍然是一个挑战。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一个结合可逆和不可逆（CIN）机制的框架。 CIN由可逆部分和不可逆部分组成，可逆部分实现高不可感知性，不可逆部分增强对强噪声攻击的鲁棒性。对于可逆部分，我们开发了扩散和提取模块（DEM）以及融合和分割模块（FSM），以可逆的方式对称地嵌入和提取水印。对于不可逆部分，我们引入了不可逆基于注意力的模块（NIAM）和噪声特定选择模块（NSM）来解决强噪声攻击下的不对称提取。大量的实验表明，我们的框架在不可感知性和鲁棒性方面显着优于当前最先进的方法。我们的框架在无噪声条件下可以实现平均 99.99% 的准确率和 67.66 dB PSNR，而在强噪声攻击下可以达到 96.64% 和 39.28 dB 的平均 PSNR。该代码将在 https://github.com/rmpku/CIN 中提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合可逆与不可逆机制的盲水印框架CIN，以提升水印的不可感知性和抗强噪声攻击能力。
AI.motivation: 现有盲水印方法难以同时实现高不可感知性与强噪声环境下的鲁棒性，需设计兼顾两者的新机制。
AI.method: CIN框架包含可逆部分（扩散提取模块DEM、融合分割模块FSM）实现对称嵌入提取，以及不可逆部分（非可逆注意力模块NIAM、噪声特异性选择模块NSM）应对强噪声攻击。
AI.result: 在无噪声条件下实现99.99%准确率和67.66dB PSNR，在强噪声攻击下仍保持96.64%准确率和39.28dB性能，优于现有最佳方法。
AI.conclusion: CIN框架通过结合可逆与不可逆机制，有效解决了盲水印的不可感知性与鲁棒性矛盾，实验验证其优越性。

search_text: Towards Blind Watermarking: Combining Invertible and Non-invertible Mechanisms 走向盲水印：结合可逆和不可逆机制 Blind watermarking provides powerful evidence for copyright protection, image authentication, and tampering identification. However, it remains a challenge to design a watermarking model with high imperceptibility and robustness against strong noise attacks. To resolve this issue, we present a framework Combining the Invertible and Non-invertible (CIN) mechanisms. The CIN is composed of the invertible part to achieve high imperceptibility and the non-invertible part to strengthen the robustness against strong noise attacks. For the invertible part, we develop a diffusion and extraction module (DEM) and a fusion and split module (FSM) to embed and extract watermarks symmetrically in an invertible way. For the non-invertible part, we introduce a non-invertible attention-based module (NIAM) and the noise-specific selection module (NSM) to solve the asymmetric extraction under a strong noise attack. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our framework outperforms the current state-of-the-art methods of imperceptibility and robustness significantly. Our framework can achieve an average of 99.99% accuracy and 67.66 dB PSNR under noise-free conditions, while 96.64% and 39.28 dB combined strong noise attacks. The code will be available in https://github.com/rmpku/CIN. 盲水印为版权保护、图像认证、篡改识别提供了有力的证据。然而，设计一种具有高不可察觉性和抗强噪声攻击鲁棒性的水印模型仍然是一个挑战。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一个结合可逆和不可逆（CIN）机制的框架。 CIN由可逆部分和不可逆部分组成，可逆部分实现高不可感知性，不可逆部分增强对强噪声攻击的鲁棒性。对于可逆部分，我们开发了扩散和提取模块（DEM）以及融合和分割模块（FSM），以可逆的方式对称地嵌入和提取水印。对于不可逆部分，我们引入了不可逆基于注意力的模块（NIAM）和噪声特定选择模块（NSM）来解决强噪声攻击下的不对称提取。大量的实验表明，我们的框架在不可感知性和鲁棒性方面显着优于当前最先进的方法。我们的框架在无噪声条件下可以实现平均 99.99% 的准确率和 67.66 dB PSNR，而在强噪声攻击下可以达到 96.64% 和 39.28 dB 的平均 PSNR。该代码将在 https://github.com/rmpku/CIN 中提供。 本文提出一种结合可逆与不可逆机制的盲水印框架CIN，以提升水印的不可感知性和抗强噪声攻击能力。 Rui Ma,Mengxi Guo,Yi Hou,Fan Yang,Yuan Li,Huizhu Jia,Xiaodong Xie cs.MM,cs.CV

authors_text: Liam Dugan,Daphne Ippolito,Arun Kirubarajan,Sherry Shi,Chris Callison-Burch
title: Real or Fake Text?: Investigating Human Ability to Detect Boundaries Between Human-Written and Machine-Generated Text
title_zh: 真文本还是假文本？：研究人类检测人类书写文本和机器生成文本之间界限的能力
comment: AAAI 2023 Long Paper. Code is available at https://github.com/liamdugan/human-detection
comments: AAAI 2023 Long Paper. Code is available at https://github.com/liamdugan/human-detection
abstract: As text generated by large language models proliferates, it becomes vital to understand how humans engage with such text, and whether or not they are able to detect when the text they are reading did not originate with a human writer. Prior work on human detection of generated text focuses on the case where an entire passage is either human-written or machine-generated. In this paper, we study a more realistic setting where text begins as human-written and transitions to being generated by state-of-the-art neural language models. We show that, while annotators often struggle at this task, there is substantial variance in annotator skill and that given proper incentives, annotators can improve at this task over time. Furthermore, we conduct a detailed comparison study and analyze how a variety of variables (model size, decoding strategy, fine-tuning, prompt genre, etc.) affect human detection performance. Finally, we collect error annotations from our participants and use them to show that certain textual genres influence models to make different types of errors and that certain sentence-level features correlate highly with annotator selection. We release the RoFT dataset: a collection of over 21,000 human annotations paired with error classifications to encourage future work in human detection and evaluation of generated text.
summary: As text generated by large language models proliferates, it becomes vital to understand how humans engage with such text, and whether or not they are able to detect when the text they are reading did not originate with a human writer. Prior work on human detection of generated text focuses on the case where an entire passage is either human-written or machine-generated. In this paper, we study a more realistic setting where text begins as human-written and transitions to being generated by state-of-the-art neural language models. We show that, while annotators often struggle at this task, there is substantial variance in annotator skill and that given proper incentives, annotators can improve at this task over time. Furthermore, we conduct a detailed comparison study and analyze how a variety of variables (model size, decoding strategy, fine-tuning, prompt genre, etc.) affect human detection performance. Finally, we collect error annotations from our participants and use them to show that certain textual genres influence models to make different types of errors and that certain sentence-level features correlate highly with annotator selection. We release the RoFT dataset: a collection of over 21,000 human annotations paired with error classifications to encourage future work in human detection and evaluation of generated text.
abstract_zh: 随着大型语言模型生成的文本激增，了解人类如何处理此类文本以及他们是否能够检测到他们正在阅读的文本何时不是人类作家所创作的变得至关重要。先前关于人类检测生成文本的工作主要关注整个段落是人类编写的或机器生成的情况。在本文中，我们研究了一个更现实的环境，其中文本从人类编写开始，过渡到由最先进的神经语言模型生成。我们表明，虽然注释者经常在这项任务上遇到困难，但注释者的技能存在很大差异，并且在适当的激励下，注释者可以随着时间的推移在这项任务上有所改进。此外，我们进行了详细的比较研究，并分析了各种变量（模型大小、解码策略、微调、提示类型等）如何影响人体检测性能。最后，我们从参与者那里收集错误注释，并用它们来表明某些文本类型影响模型以产生不同类型的错误，并且某些句子级特征与注释者选择高度相关。我们发布了 RoFT 数据集：包含超过 21,000 个人工注释以及错误分类的集合，以鼓励未来在人工检测和生成文本评估方面的工作。

AI.tldr: 本论文研究人类识别人类撰写文本与机器生成文本之间界限的能力，特别是在文本从人类撰写过渡到机器生成的更现实场景中。
AI.motivation: 随着大型语言模型生成的文本日益增多，理解人类如何与这类文本互动以及能否检测其来源变得至关重要。现有研究多关注整段文本的来源判断，而缺乏对混合过渡场景的分析。
AI.method: 通过设计文本从人类撰写过渡到机器生成的实验，分析标注者表现；比较模型规模、解码策略等变量对检测性能的影响；收集错误标注数据并分析句子级特征与标注选择的相关性。
AI.result: 标注者在任务中表现存在显著差异，但通过激励可提升能力；模型规模、提示类型等变量显著影响检测效果；特定文本类型导致模型产生不同错误，部分句子特征与标注选择高度相关。
AI.conclusion: 人类在混合过渡场景下具备检测能力但存在差异，变量因素显著影响性能，RoFT数据集的发布将推动生成文本的人类检测与评估研究。

authors_text: Ying Wen,Ziyu Wan,Ming Zhou,Shufang Hou,Zhe Cao,Chenyang Le,Jingxiao Chen,Zheng Tian,Weinan Zhang,Jun Wang
title: On Realization of Intelligent Decision-Making in the Real World: A Foundation Decision Model Perspective
title_zh: 论现实世界中智能决策的实现：基础决策模型视角
comment: 26 pages, 4 figures
comments: 26 pages, 4 figures
abstract: The pervasive uncertainty and dynamic nature of real-world environments present significant challenges for the widespread implementation of machine-driven Intelligent Decision-Making (IDM) systems. Consequently, IDM should possess the ability to continuously acquire new skills and effectively generalize across a broad range of applications. The advancement of Artificial General Intelligence (AGI) that transcends task and application boundaries is critical for enhancing IDM. Recent studies have extensively investigated the Transformer neural architecture as a foundational model for various tasks, including computer vision, natural language processing, and reinforcement learning. We propose that a Foundation Decision Model (FDM) can be developed by formulating diverse decision-making tasks as sequence decoding tasks using the Transformer architecture, offering a promising solution for expanding IDM applications in complex real-world situations. In this paper, we discuss the efficiency and generalization improvements offered by a foundation decision model for IDM and explore its potential applications in multi-agent game AI, production scheduling, and robotics tasks. Lastly, we present a case study demonstrating our FDM implementation, DigitalBrain (DB1) with 1.3 billion parameters, achieving human-level performance in 870 tasks, such as text generation, image captioning, video game playing, robotic control, and traveling salesman problems. As a foundation decision model, DB1 represents an initial step toward more autonomous and efficient real-world IDM applications.
summary: The pervasive uncertainty and dynamic nature of real-world environments present significant challenges for the widespread implementation of machine-driven Intelligent Decision-Making (IDM) systems. Consequently, IDM should possess the ability to continuously acquire new skills and effectively generalize across a broad range of applications. The advancement of Artificial General Intelligence (AGI) that transcends task and application boundaries is critical for enhancing IDM. Recent studies have extensively investigated the Transformer neural architecture as a foundational model for various tasks, including computer vision, natural language processing, and reinforcement learning. We propose that a Foundation Decision Model (FDM) can be developed by formulating diverse decision-making tasks as sequence decoding tasks using the Transformer architecture, offering a promising solution for expanding IDM applications in complex real-world situations. In this paper, we discuss the efficiency and generalization improvements offered by a foundation decision model for IDM and explore its potential applications in multi-agent game AI, production scheduling, and robotics tasks. Lastly, we present a case study demonstrating our FDM implementation, DigitalBrain (DB1) with 1.3 billion parameters, achieving human-level performance in 870 tasks, such as text generation, image captioning, video game playing, robotic control, and traveling salesman problems. As a foundation decision model, DB1 represents an initial step toward more autonomous and efficient real-world IDM applications.
abstract_zh: 现实世界环境普遍存在的不确定性和动态特性给机器驱动的智能决策（IDM）系统的广泛实施带来了重大挑战。因此，IDM 应具备不断获取新技能并有效推广广泛应用的能力。超越任务和应用程序边界的通用人工智能 (AGI) 的进步对于增强 IDM 至关重要。最近的研究广泛研究了 Transformer 神经架构作为各种任务的基础模型，包括计算机视觉、自然语言处理和强化学习。我们提出，可以通过使用 Transformer 架构将不同的决策任务制定为序列解码任务来开发基础决策模型（FDM），为在复杂的现实情况下扩展 IDM 应用提供有前景的解决方案。在本文中，我们讨论了 IDM 基础决策模型所提供的效率和泛化改进，并探讨了其在多智能体游戏人工智能、生产调度和机器人任务中的潜在应用。最后，我们提出了一个案例研究，展示了我们的 FDM 实现，即具有 13 亿个参数的 DigitalBrain (DB1)，在 870 项任务中实现了人类水平的性能，例如文本生成、图像字幕、视频游戏、机器人控制和旅行商问题。作为基础决策模型，DB1 代表了迈向更自主、更高效的现实世界 IDM 应用程序的第一步。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Transformer架构的通用决策模型（FDM），以解决现实世界中智能决策系统面临的不确定性与动态性挑战。
AI.motivation: 现实环境的复杂性和不确定性导致现有智能决策系统难以广泛部署，需开发具备持续学习与跨领域泛化能力的通用决策框架。
AI.method: 将多样化决策任务转化为序列解码问题，利用Transformer架构构建基础决策模型（FDM），并验证其在多任务场景下的有效性。
AI.result: 开发了包含13亿参数的DigitalBrain（DB1）模型，在870项任务中达到人类水平，涵盖文本生成、机器人控制、游戏AI等场景。
AI.conclusion: FDM为实现自主高效的现实世界智能决策提供了新路径，是迈向通用人工智能（AGI）的重要一步。

search_text: On Realization of Intelligent Decision-Making in the Real World: A Foundation Decision Model Perspective 论现实世界中智能决策的实现：基础决策模型视角 The pervasive uncertainty and dynamic nature of real-world environments present significant challenges for the widespread implementation of machine-driven Intelligent Decision-Making (IDM) systems. Consequently, IDM should possess the ability to continuously acquire new skills and effectively generalize across a broad range of applications. The advancement of Artificial General Intelligence (AGI) that transcends task and application boundaries is critical for enhancing IDM. Recent studies have extensively investigated the Transformer neural architecture as a foundational model for various tasks, including computer vision, natural language processing, and reinforcement learning. We propose that a Foundation Decision Model (FDM) can be developed by formulating diverse decision-making tasks as sequence decoding tasks using the Transformer architecture, offering a promising solution for expanding IDM applications in complex real-world situations. In this paper, we discuss the efficiency and generalization improvements offered by a foundation decision model for IDM and explore its potential applications in multi-agent game AI, production scheduling, and robotics tasks. Lastly, we present a case study demonstrating our FDM implementation, DigitalBrain (DB1) with 1.3 billion parameters, achieving human-level performance in 870 tasks, such as text generation, image captioning, video game playing, robotic control, and traveling salesman problems. As a foundation decision model, DB1 represents an initial step toward more autonomous and efficient real-world IDM applications. 现实世界环境普遍存在的不确定性和动态特性给机器驱动的智能决策（IDM）系统的广泛实施带来了重大挑战。因此，IDM 应具备不断获取新技能并有效推广广泛应用的能力。超越任务和应用程序边界的通用人工智能 (AGI) 的进步对于增强 IDM 至关重要。最近的研究广泛研究了 Transformer 神经架构作为各种任务的基础模型，包括计算机视觉、自然语言处理和强化学习。我们提出，可以通过使用 Transformer 架构将不同的决策任务制定为序列解码任务来开发基础决策模型（FDM），为在复杂的现实情况下扩展 IDM 应用提供有前景的解决方案。在本文中，我们讨论了 IDM 基础决策模型所提供的效率和泛化改进，并探讨了其在多智能体游戏人工智能、生产调度和机器人任务中的潜在应用。最后，我们提出了一个案例研究，展示了我们的 FDM 实现，即具有 13 亿个参数的 DigitalBrain (DB1)，在 870 项任务中实现了人类水平的性能，例如文本生成、图像字幕、视频游戏、机器人控制和旅行商问题。作为基础决策模型，DB1 代表了迈向更自主、更高效的现实世界 IDM 应用程序的第一步。 本文提出了一种基于Transformer架构的通用决策模型（FDM），以解决现实世界中智能决策系统面临的不确定性与动态性挑战。 Ying Wen,Ziyu Wan,Ming Zhou,Shufang Hou,Zhe Cao,Chenyang Le,Jingxiao Chen,Zheng Tian,Weinan Zhang,Jun Wang cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Ramchander Rao Bhaskara,Roshan Thomas Eapen,Manoranjan Majji
title: Differentiable Rendering for Pose Estimation in Proximity Operations
title_zh: 接近操作中姿态估计的可微渲染
comment: AIAA SciTech Forum 2023, 13 pages, 9 figures
comments: AIAA SciTech Forum 2023, 13 pages, 9 figures
abstract: Differentiable rendering aims to compute the derivative of the image rendering function with respect to the rendering parameters. This paper presents a novel algorithm for 6-DoF pose estimation through gradient-based optimization using a differentiable rendering pipeline. We emphasize two key contributions: (1) instead of solving the conventional 2D to 3D correspondence problem and computing reprojection errors, images (rendered using the 3D model) are compared only in the 2D feature space via sparse 2D feature correspondences. (2) Instead of an analytical image formation model, we compute an approximate local gradient of the rendering process through online learning. The learning data consists of image features extracted from multi-viewpoint renders at small perturbations in the pose neighborhood. The gradients are propagated through the rendering pipeline for the 6-DoF pose estimation using nonlinear least squares. This gradient-based optimization regresses directly upon the pose parameters by aligning the 3D model to reproduce a reference image shape. Using representative experiments, we demonstrate the application of our approach to pose estimation in proximity operations.
summary: Differentiable rendering aims to compute the derivative of the image rendering function with respect to the rendering parameters. This paper presents a novel algorithm for 6-DoF pose estimation through gradient-based optimization using a differentiable rendering pipeline. We emphasize two key contributions: (1) instead of solving the conventional 2D to 3D correspondence problem and computing reprojection errors, images (rendered using the 3D model) are compared only in the 2D feature space via sparse 2D feature correspondences. (2) Instead of an analytical image formation model, we compute an approximate local gradient of the rendering process through online learning. The learning data consists of image features extracted from multi-viewpoint renders at small perturbations in the pose neighborhood. The gradients are propagated through the rendering pipeline for the 6-DoF pose estimation using nonlinear least squares. This gradient-based optimization regresses directly upon the pose parameters by aligning the 3D model to reproduce a reference image shape. Using representative experiments, we demonstrate the application of our approach to pose estimation in proximity operations.
abstract_zh: 可微渲染旨在计算图像渲染函数相对于渲染参数的导数。本文提出了一种使用可微渲染管道通过基于梯度的优化来进行 6-DoF 位姿估计的新颖算法。我们强调两个关键贡献：(1) 图像（使用 3D 模型渲染）仅在 2D 特征空间中通过稀疏 2D 特征对应进行比较，而不是解决传统的 2D 到 3D 对应问题并计算重投影误差。 (2)我们通过在线学习计算渲染过程的近似局部梯度，而不是分析图像形成模型。学习数据由在姿态邻域的小扰动下从多视点渲染中提取的图像特征组成。梯度通过渲染管道传播，以使用非线性最小二乘法进行 6-DoF 位姿估计。这种基于梯度的优化通过对齐 3D 模型来再现参考图像形状，从而直接根据姿态参数进行回归。使用代表性实验，我们演示了我们的方法在接近操作中姿态估计的应用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于可微分渲染的6-DoF姿态估计方法，通过梯度优化实现近距离操作中的三维模型与参考图像的对齐。
AI.motivation: 传统姿态估计依赖复杂且易出错的2D-3D对应关系和重投影误差计算，而本文通过简化为2D特征空间比较及在线学习梯度计算，提升估计效率和鲁棒性。
AI.method: 采用稀疏2D特征对应进行图像比较，利用在线学习近似渲染过程的局部梯度，并通过非线性最小二乘优化传播梯度以回归姿态参数。
AI.result: 实验验证了该方法在姿态估计任务中的有效性，尤其在近距离操作场景下能够准确对齐三维模型与参考图像。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法通过可微分渲染和梯度优化，为近距离操作中的姿态估计提供了高效且鲁棒的解决方案，具有实际应用潜力。

authors_text: Avinash Prabu,Zhengming Zhang,Renran Tian,Stanley Chien,Lingxi Li,Yaobin Chen,Rini Sherony
title: Risk assessment and mitigation of e-scooter crashes with naturalistic driving data
title_zh: 利用自然驾驶数据进行电动滑板车碰撞风险评估和缓解
abstract: Recently, e-scooter-involved crashes have increased significantly but little information is available about the behaviors of on-road e-scooter riders. Most existing e-scooter crash research was based on retrospectively descriptive media reports, emergency room patient records, and crash reports. This paper presents a naturalistic driving study with a focus on e-scooter and vehicle encounters. The goal is to quantitatively measure the behaviors of e-scooter riders in different encounters to help facilitate crash scenario modeling, baseline behavior modeling, and the potential future development of in-vehicle mitigation algorithms. The data was collected using an instrumented vehicle and an e-scooter rider wearable system, respectively. A three-step data analysis process is developed. First, semi-automatic data labeling extracts e-scooter rider images and non-rider human images in similar environments to train an e-scooter-rider classifier. Then, a multi-step scene reconstruction pipeline generates vehicle and e-scooter trajectories in all encounters. The final step is to model e-scooter rider behaviors and e-scooter-vehicle encounter scenarios. A total of 500 vehicle to e-scooter interactions are analyzed. The variables pertaining to the same are also discussed in this paper.
summary: Recently, e-scooter-involved crashes have increased significantly but little information is available about the behaviors of on-road e-scooter riders. Most existing e-scooter crash research was based on retrospectively descriptive media reports, emergency room patient records, and crash reports. This paper presents a naturalistic driving study with a focus on e-scooter and vehicle encounters. The goal is to quantitatively measure the behaviors of e-scooter riders in different encounters to help facilitate crash scenario modeling, baseline behavior modeling, and the potential future development of in-vehicle mitigation algorithms. The data was collected using an instrumented vehicle and an e-scooter rider wearable system, respectively. A three-step data analysis process is developed. First, semi-automatic data labeling extracts e-scooter rider images and non-rider human images in similar environments to train an e-scooter-rider classifier. Then, a multi-step scene reconstruction pipeline generates vehicle and e-scooter trajectories in all encounters. The final step is to model e-scooter rider behaviors and e-scooter-vehicle encounter scenarios. A total of 500 vehicle to e-scooter interactions are analyzed. The variables pertaining to the same are also discussed in this paper.
abstract_zh: 最近，与电动滑板车相关的碰撞事故显着增加，但有关公路电动滑板车骑手行为的信息很少。大多数现有的电动滑板车碰撞研究都是基于回顾性描述性媒体报道、急诊室患者记录和碰撞报告。本文提出了一项自然驾驶研究，重点关注电动滑板车和车辆的遭遇。目标是定量测量电动滑板车骑手在不同遭遇中的行为，以帮助促进碰撞场景建模、基线行为建模以及车载缓解算法的未来潜在开发。分别使用仪表车辆和电动滑板车骑手可穿戴系统收集数据。开发了一个三步数据分析过程。首先，半自动数据标记提取相似环境中的电动滑板车骑手图像和非骑手人类图像，以训练电动滑板车骑手分类器。然后，多步骤场景重建管道在所有遭遇中生成车辆和电动滑板车轨迹。最后一步是对电动滑板车骑手行为和电动滑板车与车辆的遭遇场景进行建模。总共分析了 500 次车辆与电动滑板车的交互。本文还讨论了与此相关的变量。

AI.tldr: 该论文通过自然驾驶数据评估和缓解电动滑板车碰撞风险，分析骑行行为以支持碰撞场景建模和安全算法开发。
AI.motivation: 现有电动滑板车碰撞研究依赖回顾性媒体报道和急诊记录，缺乏对骑行行为的实时数据支持，需通过自然驾驶数据获取更精确的行为特征。
AI.method: 采用三步数据分析法：1) 半自动标注训练骑行者分类器；2) 多步骤场景重建生成车辆与滑板车轨迹；3) 建模骑行行为与碰撞场景，结合车载设备与骑行者可穿戴系统采集数据。
AI.result: 分析了500次车辆与滑板车互动案例，讨论了影响碰撞风险的关键变量及行为模式。
AI.conclusion: 自然驾驶数据能有效揭示骑行行为特征，为碰撞场景建模和未来车载安全算法开发提供数据支持，优于传统回顾性研究方法。

ai_content.tldr: 该论文通过自然驾驶数据评估和缓解电动滑板车碰撞风险，分析骑行行为以支持碰撞场景建模和安全算法开发。

search_text: Risk assessment and mitigation of e-scooter crashes with naturalistic driving data 利用自然驾驶数据进行电动滑板车碰撞风险评估和缓解 Recently, e-scooter-involved crashes have increased significantly but little information is available about the behaviors of on-road e-scooter riders. Most existing e-scooter crash research was based on retrospectively descriptive media reports, emergency room patient records, and crash reports. This paper presents a naturalistic driving study with a focus on e-scooter and vehicle encounters. The goal is to quantitatively measure the behaviors of e-scooter riders in different encounters to help facilitate crash scenario modeling, baseline behavior modeling, and the potential future development of in-vehicle mitigation algorithms. The data was collected using an instrumented vehicle and an e-scooter rider wearable system, respectively. A three-step data analysis process is developed. First, semi-automatic data labeling extracts e-scooter rider images and non-rider human images in similar environments to train an e-scooter-rider classifier. Then, a multi-step scene reconstruction pipeline generates vehicle and e-scooter trajectories in all encounters. The final step is to model e-scooter rider behaviors and e-scooter-vehicle encounter scenarios. A total of 500 vehicle to e-scooter interactions are analyzed. The variables pertaining to the same are also discussed in this paper. 最近，与电动滑板车相关的碰撞事故显着增加，但有关公路电动滑板车骑手行为的信息很少。大多数现有的电动滑板车碰撞研究都是基于回顾性描述性媒体报道、急诊室患者记录和碰撞报告。本文提出了一项自然驾驶研究，重点关注电动滑板车和车辆的遭遇。目标是定量测量电动滑板车骑手在不同遭遇中的行为，以帮助促进碰撞场景建模、基线行为建模以及车载缓解算法的未来潜在开发。分别使用仪表车辆和电动滑板车骑手可穿戴系统收集数据。开发了一个三步数据分析过程。首先，半自动数据标记提取相似环境中的电动滑板车骑手图像和非骑手人类图像，以训练电动滑板车骑手分类器。然后，多步骤场景重建管道在所有遭遇中生成车辆和电动滑板车轨迹。最后一步是对电动滑板车骑手行为和电动滑板车与车辆的遭遇场景进行建模。总共分析了 500 次车辆与电动滑板车的交互。本文还讨论了与此相关的变量。 该论文通过自然驾驶数据评估和缓解电动滑板车碰撞风险，分析骑行行为以支持碰撞场景建模和安全算法开发。 Avinash Prabu,Zhengming Zhang,Renran Tian,Stanley Chien,Lingxi Li,Yaobin Chen,Rini Sherony eess.SY,cs.CV

authors_text: Dan Liu,Xi Chen,Chen Ma,Xue Liu
title: Hyperspherical Quantization: Toward Smaller and More Accurate Models
title_zh: 超球面量化：迈向更小、更准确的模型
abstract: Model quantization enables the deployment of deep neural networks under resource-constrained devices. Vector quantization aims at reducing the model size by indexing model weights with full-precision embeddings, i.e., codewords, while the index needs to be restored to 32-bit during computation. Binary and other low-precision quantization methods can reduce the model size up to 32$\times$, however, at the cost of a considerable accuracy drop. In this paper, we propose an efficient framework for ternary quantization to produce smaller and more accurate compressed models. By integrating hyperspherical learning, pruning and reinitialization, our proposed Hyperspherical Quantization (HQ) method reduces the cosine distance between the full-precision and ternary weights, thus reducing the bias of the straight-through gradient estimator during ternary quantization. Compared with existing work at similar compression levels ($\sim$30$\times$, $\sim$40$\times$), our method significantly improves the test accuracy and reduces the model size.
summary: Model quantization enables the deployment of deep neural networks under resource-constrained devices. Vector quantization aims at reducing the model size by indexing model weights with full-precision embeddings, i.e., codewords, while the index needs to be restored to 32-bit during computation. Binary and other low-precision quantization methods can reduce the model size up to 32$\times$, however, at the cost of a considerable accuracy drop. In this paper, we propose an efficient framework for ternary quantization to produce smaller and more accurate compressed models. By integrating hyperspherical learning, pruning and reinitialization, our proposed Hyperspherical Quantization (HQ) method reduces the cosine distance between the full-precision and ternary weights, thus reducing the bias of the straight-through gradient estimator during ternary quantization. Compared with existing work at similar compression levels ($\sim$30$\times$, $\sim$40$\times$), our method significantly improves the test accuracy and reduces the model size.
abstract_zh: 模型量化可以在资源受限的设备下部署深度神经网络。矢量量化的目的是通过用全精度嵌入（即码字）对模型权重进行索引来减小模型大小，而在计算过程中需要将索引恢复为32位。二进制和其他低精度量化方法可以将模型大小减少多达 32$\times$，但代价是精度大幅下降。在本文中，我们提出了一种有效的三元量化框架，以生成更小、更准确的压缩模型。通过集成超球面学习、剪枝和重新初始化，我们提出的超球面量化（HQ）方法减少了全精度和三元权重之间的余弦距离，从而减少了三元量化期间直通梯度估计器的偏差。与类似压缩级别的现有工作（$\sim$30$\times$、$\sim$40$\times$）相比，我们的方法显着提高了测试精度并减小了模型大小。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种称为超球面量化（HQ）的三元量化框架，旨在通过减少量化偏差来实现更小且更精确的压缩模型。
AI.motivation: 现有二值化等低精度量化方法虽能大幅压缩模型，但会导致显著的精度下降，需在模型大小与精度间寻求更优平衡。
AI.method: 结合超球面学习、剪枝与重初始化技术，通过缩小全精度权重与三元量化权重间的余弦距离，降低直通梯度估计器的偏差。
AI.result: 在相近压缩比（~30×，~40×）下，相比现有方法显著提升测试精度并减小模型体积。
AI.conclusion: 超球面量化有效兼顾了模型压缩与精度保持，为资源受限设备部署提供了更优解决方案。

authors_text: Dan Liu,Xue Liu
title: Pruning On-the-Fly: A Recoverable Pruning Method without Fine-tuning
title_zh: 即时修剪：一种无需微调的可恢复修剪方法
abstract: Most existing pruning works are resource-intensive, requiring retraining or fine-tuning of the pruned models for accuracy. We propose a retraining-free pruning method based on hyperspherical learning and loss penalty terms. The proposed loss penalty term pushes some of the model weights far from zero, while the rest weight values are pushed near zero and can be safely pruned with no need for retraining and a negligible accuracy drop. In addition, our proposed method can instantly recover the accuracy of a pruned model by replacing the pruned values with their mean value. Our method obtains state-of-the-art results in retraining-free pruning and is evaluated on ResNet-18/50 and MobileNetV2 with ImageNet dataset. One can easily get a 50\% pruned ResNet18 model with a 0.47\% accuracy drop. With fine-tuning, the experiment results show that our method can significantly boost the accuracy of the pruned models compared with existing works. For example, the accuracy of a 70\% pruned (except the first convolutional layer) MobileNetV2 model only drops 3.5\%, much less than the 7\% $\sim$ 10\% accuracy drop with conventional methods.
summary: Most existing pruning works are resource-intensive, requiring retraining or fine-tuning of the pruned models for accuracy. We propose a retraining-free pruning method based on hyperspherical learning and loss penalty terms. The proposed loss penalty term pushes some of the model weights far from zero, while the rest weight values are pushed near zero and can be safely pruned with no need for retraining and a negligible accuracy drop. In addition, our proposed method can instantly recover the accuracy of a pruned model by replacing the pruned values with their mean value. Our method obtains state-of-the-art results in retraining-free pruning and is evaluated on ResNet-18/50 and MobileNetV2 with ImageNet dataset. One can easily get a 50\% pruned ResNet18 model with a 0.47\% accuracy drop. With fine-tuning, the experiment results show that our method can significantly boost the accuracy of the pruned models compared with existing works. For example, the accuracy of a 70\% pruned (except the first convolutional layer) MobileNetV2 model only drops 3.5\%, much less than the 7\% $\sim$ 10\% accuracy drop with conventional methods.
abstract_zh: 大多数现有的剪枝工作都是资源密集型的，需要对剪枝模型进行重新训练或微调以确保准确性。我们提出了一种基于超球面学习和损失惩罚项的免重训练剪枝方法。所提出的损失惩罚项使一些模型权重远离零，而其余权重值则被推近零，并且可以安全地修剪，无需重新训练，并且精度下降可以忽略不计。此外，我们提出的方法可以通过用平均值替换剪枝值来立即恢复剪枝模型的准确性。我们的方法在免再训​​练剪枝方面获得了最先进的结果，并在 ResNet-18/50 和 MobileNetV2 上使用 ImageNet 数据集进行了评估。人们可以轻松获得 50% 剪枝的 ResNet18 模型，但准确率下降 0.47%。通过微调，实验结果表明，与现有方法相比，我们的方法可以显着提高剪枝模型的准确性。例如，70\% 剪枝（第一卷积层除外）的 MobileNetV2 模型的准确率仅下降 3.5\%，远小于传统方法 7\% $\sim$ 10\% 的准确率下降。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需微调的可恢复剪枝方法，通过超球面学习和损失惩罚项实现高效模型压缩。
AI.motivation: 现有剪枝方法通常需要重新训练或微调以保持精度，消耗大量资源。本文旨在开发一种无需微调即可实现高精度剪枝的高效方法。
AI.method: 基于超球面学习设计损失惩罚项，将部分权重推离零点而其余权重趋近零点，实现安全剪枝；通过替换剪枝值为均值实现精度即时恢复。
AI.result: 在ImageNet数据集上，ResNet18/50和MobileNetV2模型剪枝后精度仅下降0.47%-3.5%，优于传统方法7%-10%的下降幅度，且无需重新训练。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在无需微调情况下实现最优剪枝效果，兼具高效性和可恢复性，为模型压缩提供了新思路。

One can easily get a 50\% pruned ResNet18 model with a 0.47\% accuracy drop. With fine-tuning, the experiment results show that our method can significantly boost the accuracy of the pruned models compared with existing works. For example, the accuracy of a 70\% pruned (except the first convolutional layer) MobileNetV2 model only drops 3.5\%, much less than the 7\% $\sim$ 10\% accuracy drop with conventional methods. 大多数现有的剪枝工作都是资源密集型的，需要对剪枝模型进行重新训练或微调以确保准确性。我们提出了一种基于超球面学习和损失惩罚项的免重训练剪枝方法。所提出的损失惩罚项使一些模型权重远离零，而其余权重值则被推近零，并且可以安全地修剪，无需重新训练，并且精度下降可以忽略不计。此外，我们提出的方法可以通过用平均值替换剪枝值来立即恢复剪枝模型的准确性。我们的方法在免再训​​练剪枝方面获得了最先进的结果，并在 ResNet-18/50 和 MobileNetV2 上使用 ImageNet 数据集进行了评估。人们可以轻松获得 50% 剪枝的 ResNet18 模型，但准确率下降 0.47%。通过微调，实验结果表明，与现有方法相比，我们的方法可以显着提高剪枝模型的准确性。例如，70\% 剪枝（第一卷积层除外）的 MobileNetV2 模型的准确率仅下降 3.5\%，远小于传统方法 7\% $\sim$ 10\% 的准确率下降。 本文提出一种无需微调的可恢复剪枝方法，通过超球面学习和损失惩罚项实现高效模型压缩。 Dan Liu,Xue Liu cs.CV

authors_text: Dan Liu,Xue Liu
title: Hyperspherical Loss-Aware Ternary Quantization
title_zh: 超球面损失感知三元量化
abstract: Most of the existing works use projection functions for ternary quantization in discrete space. Scaling factors and thresholds are used in some cases to improve the model accuracy. However, the gradients used for optimization are inaccurate and result in a notable accuracy gap between the full precision and ternary models. To get more accurate gradients, some works gradually increase the discrete portion of the full precision weights in the forward propagation pass, e.g., using temperature-based Sigmoid function. Instead of directly performing ternary quantization in discrete space, we push full precision weights close to ternary ones through regularization term prior to ternary quantization. In addition, inspired by the temperature-based method, we introduce a re-scaling factor to obtain more accurate gradients by simulating the derivatives of Sigmoid function. The experimental results show that our method can significantly improve the accuracy of ternary quantization in both image classification and object detection tasks.
summary: Most of the existing works use projection functions for ternary quantization in discrete space. Scaling factors and thresholds are used in some cases to improve the model accuracy. However, the gradients used for optimization are inaccurate and result in a notable accuracy gap between the full precision and ternary models. To get more accurate gradients, some works gradually increase the discrete portion of the full precision weights in the forward propagation pass, e.g., using temperature-based Sigmoid function. Instead of directly performing ternary quantization in discrete space, we push full precision weights close to ternary ones through regularization term prior to ternary quantization. In addition, inspired by the temperature-based method, we introduce a re-scaling factor to obtain more accurate gradients by simulating the derivatives of Sigmoid function. The experimental results show that our method can significantly improve the accuracy of ternary quantization in both image classification and object detection tasks.
abstract_zh: 现有的大部分工作都使用投影函数在离散空间中进行三元量化。在某些情况下使用缩放因子和阈值来提高模型精度。然而，用于优化的梯度不准确，导致全精度模型和三元模型之间存在显着的精度差距。为了获得更准确的梯度，一些工作逐渐增加前向传播过程中全精度权重的离散部分，例如使用基于温度的 Sigmoid 函数。我们不是直接在离散空间中执行三元量化，而是通过三元量化之前的正则化项将全精度权重推向三元权重。此外，受基于温度的方法的启发，我们引入了重新缩放因子，通过模拟 Sigmoid 函数的导数来获得更准确的梯度。实验结果表明，我们的方法可以显着提高图像分类和目标检测任务中三值量化的准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新的三值量化方法，通过改进梯度计算和正则化项来提升模型精度。
AI.motivation: 现有三值量化方法在离散空间中使用投影函数，但梯度计算不准确导致全精度模型与三值模型间存在显著精度差距。
AI.method: 引入正则化项在量化前将全精度权重逼近三值分布，并结合温度参数模拟Sigmoid函数导数以获得更精确梯度。
AI.result: 在图像分类和目标检测任务中，该方法显著提升了三值量化模型的精度。
AI.conclusion: 通过梯度优化和正则化约束，本文方法有效解决了三值量化中的精度损失问题。

authors_text: Austin Xu,Mariya I. Vasileva,Achal Dave,Arjun Seshadri
title: HandsOff: Labeled Dataset Generation With No Additional Human Annotations
title_zh: HandsOff：无需额外人工注释即可生成标记数据集
comment: 22 pages, 20 figures. CVPR 2023
comments: 22 pages, 20 figures. CVPR 2023
abstract: Recent work leverages the expressive power of generative adversarial networks (GANs) to generate labeled synthetic datasets. These dataset generation methods often require new annotations of synthetic images, which forces practitioners to seek out annotators, curate a set of synthetic images, and ensure the quality of generated labels. We introduce the HandsOff framework, a technique capable of producing an unlimited number of synthetic images and corresponding labels after being trained on less than 50 pre-existing labeled images. Our framework avoids the practical drawbacks of prior work by unifying the field of GAN inversion with dataset generation. We generate datasets with rich pixel-wise labels in multiple challenging domains such as faces, cars, full-body human poses, and urban driving scenes. Our method achieves state-of-the-art performance in semantic segmentation, keypoint detection, and depth estimation compared to prior dataset generation approaches and transfer learning baselines. We additionally showcase its ability to address broad challenges in model development which stem from fixed, hand-annotated datasets, such as the long-tail problem in semantic segmentation. Project page: austinxu87.github.io/handsoff.
summary: Recent work leverages the expressive power of generative adversarial networks (GANs) to generate labeled synthetic datasets. These dataset generation methods often require new annotations of synthetic images, which forces practitioners to seek out annotators, curate a set of synthetic images, and ensure the quality of generated labels. We introduce the HandsOff framework, a technique capable of producing an unlimited number of synthetic images and corresponding labels after being trained on less than 50 pre-existing labeled images. Our framework avoids the practical drawbacks of prior work by unifying the field of GAN inversion with dataset generation. We generate datasets with rich pixel-wise labels in multiple challenging domains such as faces, cars, full-body human poses, and urban driving scenes. Our method achieves state-of-the-art performance in semantic segmentation, keypoint detection, and depth estimation compared to prior dataset generation approaches and transfer learning baselines. We additionally showcase its ability to address broad challenges in model development which stem from fixed, hand-annotated datasets, such as the long-tail problem in semantic segmentation. Project page: austinxu87.github.io/handsoff.
abstract_zh: 最近的工作利用生成对抗网络（GAN）的表达能力来生成带标签的合成数据集。这些数据集生成方法通常需要对合成图像进行新的注释，这迫使从业者寻找注释者、管理一组合成图像并确保生成标签的质量。我们引入了 HandsOff 框架，这是一种在对少于 50 个预先存在的标记图像进行训练后能够生成无限数量的合成图像和相应标签的技术。我们的框架通过将 GAN 反演领域与数据集生成统一起来，避免了先前工作的实际缺陷。我们在多个具有挑战性的领域（例如人脸、汽车、全身人体姿势和城市驾驶场景）生成具有丰富像素标签的数据集。与之前的数据集生成方法和迁移学习基线相比，我们的方法在语义分割、关键点检测和深度估计方面实现了最先进的性能。我们还展示了它解决模型开发中来自固定、手工注释数据集的广泛挑战的能力，例如语义分割中的长尾问题。项目页面：austinxu87.github.io/handsoff。

AI.tldr: 本文提出HandsOff框架，通过结合生成对抗网络（GAN）反转与数据集生成技术，在无需额外人工标注的情况下生成大量带标签的合成图像。
AI.motivation: 现有合成数据集生成方法需依赖人工标注合成图像，存在成本高、质量难以保证等问题，而HandsOff旨在通过自动化手段解决这一痛点。
AI.method: 框架整合GAN反转技术与数据集生成，仅需少于50张真实标注图像进行训练，即可生成多领域（如人脸、车辆、人体姿态等）的像素级标签合成数据。
AI.result: 在语义分割、关键点检测和深度估计任务中，HandsOff性能优于现有数据集生成方法及迁移学习基线，并有效缓解了语义分割中的长尾分布问题。
AI.conclusion: HandsOff通过自动化标签生成显著降低了数据集构建成本，为模型开发提供了高质量、无限量的合成数据支持，优于传统方法与迁移学习方案。

authors_text: Gabriel Mantione-Holmes,Justin Leo,Jugal Kalita
title: Utilizing Priming to Identify Optimal Class Ordering to Alleviate Catastrophic Forgetting
title_zh: 利用启动来确定最佳类别顺序，以减轻灾难性遗忘
comment: Accepted to IEEE International Conference on Semantic Computing (ICSC) 2023
comments: Accepted to IEEE International Conference on Semantic Computing (ICSC) 2023
abstract: In order for artificial neural networks to begin accurately mimicking biological ones, they must be able to adapt to new exigencies without forgetting what they have learned from previous training. Lifelong learning approaches to artificial neural networks attempt to strive towards this goal, yet have not progressed far enough to be realistically deployed for natural language processing tasks. The proverbial roadblock of catastrophic forgetting still gate-keeps researchers from an adequate lifelong learning model. While efforts are being made to quell catastrophic forgetting, there is a lack of research that looks into the importance of class ordering when training on new classes for incremental learning. This is surprising as the ordering of "classes" that humans learn is heavily monitored and incredibly important. While heuristics to develop an ideal class order have been researched, this paper examines class ordering as it relates to priming as a scheme for incremental class learning. By examining the connections between various methods of priming found in humans and how those are mimicked yet remain unexplained in life-long machine learning, this paper provides a better understanding of the similarities between our biological systems and the synthetic systems while simultaneously improving current practices to combat catastrophic forgetting. Through the merging of psychological priming practices with class ordering, this paper is able to identify a generalizable method for class ordering in NLP incremental learning tasks that consistently outperforms random class ordering.
summary: In order for artificial neural networks to begin accurately mimicking biological ones, they must be able to adapt to new exigencies without forgetting what they have learned from previous training. Lifelong learning approaches to artificial neural networks attempt to strive towards this goal, yet have not progressed far enough to be realistically deployed for natural language processing tasks. The proverbial roadblock of catastrophic forgetting still gate-keeps researchers from an adequate lifelong learning model. While efforts are being made to quell catastrophic forgetting, there is a lack of research that looks into the importance of class ordering when training on new classes for incremental learning. This is surprising as the ordering of "classes" that humans learn is heavily monitored and incredibly important. While heuristics to develop an ideal class order have been researched, this paper examines class ordering as it relates to priming as a scheme for incremental class learning. By examining the connections between various methods of priming found in humans and how those are mimicked yet remain unexplained in life-long machine learning, this paper provides a better understanding of the similarities between our biological systems and the synthetic systems while simultaneously improving current practices to combat catastrophic forgetting. Through the merging of psychological priming practices with class ordering, this paper is able to identify a generalizable method for class ordering in NLP incremental learning tasks that consistently outperforms random class ordering.
abstract_zh: 为了让人工神经网络开始准确地模仿生物神经网络，它们必须能够适应新的紧急情况，而不会忘记从之前的训练中学到的东西。人工神经网络的终身学习方法试图努力实现这一目标，但尚未取得足够的进展，无法实际部署用于自然语言处理任务。灾难性遗忘这一众所周知的障碍仍然阻碍着研究人员建立适当的终身学习模式。尽管人们正在努力消除灾难性遗忘，但缺乏研究来探讨增量学习新课程培训时课程顺序的重要性。这是令人惊讶的，因为人类学习的“课程”顺序受到严格监控并且非常重要。虽然已经研究了开发理想班级顺序的启发式方法，但本文研究了班级顺序，因为它与作为增量班级学习方案的启动相关。通过研究人类中发现的各种启动方法之间的联系，以及这些方法在终生机器学习中如何被模仿但仍无法解释，本文提供了对我们的生物系统和合成系统之间的相似性的更好理解，同时改进了当前对抗灾难性遗忘的实践。通过将心理启动实践与班级排序相结合，本文能够在 NLP 增量学习任务中找到一种通用的班级排序方法，该方法始终优于随机班级排序。

AI.tldr: 本文通过引入心理启动机制，研究类顺序优化以缓解神经网络在增量学习中的灾难性遗忘问题。
AI.motivation: 现有终身学习方法在自然语言处理任务中效果有限，而类顺序对人类学习至关重要但未被充分研究。
AI.method: 结合人类心理启动理论与机器学习，提出基于启动效应的类顺序优化方法。
AI.result: 该方法在NLP增量学习任务中显著优于随机类顺序策略。
AI.conclusion: 心理启动机制为类顺序优化提供新视角，有助于弥合生物系统与人工系统的认知差异。

search_text: Utilizing Priming to Identify Optimal Class Ordering to Alleviate Catastrophic Forgetting 利用启动来确定最佳类别顺序，以减轻灾难性遗忘 In order for artificial neural networks to begin accurately mimicking biological ones, they must be able to adapt to new exigencies without forgetting what they have learned from previous training. Lifelong learning approaches to artificial neural networks attempt to strive towards this goal, yet have not progressed far enough to be realistically deployed for natural language processing tasks. The proverbial roadblock of catastrophic forgetting still gate-keeps researchers from an adequate lifelong learning model. While efforts are being made to quell catastrophic forgetting, there is a lack of research that looks into the importance of class ordering when training on new classes for incremental learning. This is surprising as the ordering of "classes" that humans learn is heavily monitored and incredibly important. While heuristics to develop an ideal class order have been researched, this paper examines class ordering as it relates to priming as a scheme for incremental class learning. By examining the connections between various methods of priming found in humans and how those are mimicked yet remain unexplained in life-long machine learning, this paper provides a better understanding of the similarities between our biological systems and the synthetic systems while simultaneously improving current practices to combat catastrophic forgetting. Through the merging of psychological priming practices with class ordering, this paper is able to identify a generalizable method for class ordering in NLP incremental learning tasks that consistently outperforms random class ordering. 为了让人工神经网络开始准确地模仿生物神经网络，它们必须能够适应新的紧急情况，而不会忘记从之前的训练中学到的东西。人工神经网络的终身学习方法试图努力实现这一目标，但尚未取得足够的进展，无法实际部署用于自然语言处理任务。灾难性遗忘这一众所周知的障碍仍然阻碍着研究人员建立适当的终身学习模式。尽管人们正在努力消除灾难性遗忘，但缺乏研究来探讨增量学习新课程培训时课程顺序的重要性。这是令人惊讶的，因为人类学习的“课程”顺序受到严格监控并且非常重要。虽然已经研究了开发理想班级顺序的启发式方法，但本文研究了班级顺序，因为它与作为增量班级学习方案的启动相关。通过研究人类中发现的各种启动方法之间的联系，以及这些方法在终生机器学习中如何被模仿但仍无法解释，本文提供了对我们的生物系统和合成系统之间的相似性的更好理解，同时改进了当前对抗灾难性遗忘的实践。通过将心理启动实践与班级排序相结合，本文能够在 NLP 增量学习任务中找到一种通用的班级排序方法，该方法始终优于随机班级排序。 本文通过引入心理启动机制，研究类顺序优化以缓解神经网络在增量学习中的灾难性遗忘问题。 Gabriel Mantione-Holmes,Justin Leo,Jugal Kalita cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CL

authors_text: Genki Osada,Takahashi Tsubasa,Budrul Ahsan,Takashi Nishide
title: Out-of-Distribution Detection with Reconstruction Error and Typicality-based Penalty
title_zh: 具有重构误差和基于典型性的惩罚的分布外检测
comment: Accepted at WACV 2023
comments: Accepted at WACV 2023
abstract: The task of out-of-distribution (OOD) detection is vital to realize safe and reliable operation for real-world applications. After the failure of likelihood-based detection in high dimensions had been shown, approaches based on the \emph{typical set} have been attracting attention; however, they still have not achieved satisfactory performance. Beginning by presenting the failure case of the typicality-based approach, we propose a new reconstruction error-based approach that employs normalizing flow (NF). We further introduce a typicality-based penalty, and by incorporating it into the reconstruction error in NF, we propose a new OOD detection method, penalized reconstruction error (PRE). Because the PRE detects test inputs that lie off the in-distribution manifold, it effectively detects adversarial examples as well as OOD examples. We show the effectiveness of our method through the evaluation using natural image datasets, CIFAR-10, TinyImageNet, and ILSVRC2012.
summary: The task of out-of-distribution (OOD) detection is vital to realize safe and reliable operation for real-world applications. After the failure of likelihood-based detection in high dimensions had been shown, approaches based on the \emph{typical set} have been attracting attention; however, they still have not achieved satisfactory performance. Beginning by presenting the failure case of the typicality-based approach, we propose a new reconstruction error-based approach that employs normalizing flow (NF). We further introduce a typicality-based penalty, and by incorporating it into the reconstruction error in NF, we propose a new OOD detection method, penalized reconstruction error (PRE). Because the PRE detects test inputs that lie off the in-distribution manifold, it effectively detects adversarial examples as well as OOD examples. We show the effectiveness of our method through the evaluation using natural image datasets, CIFAR-10, TinyImageNet, and ILSVRC2012.
abstract_zh: 分布式（OOD）检测任务对于实现实际应用的安全可靠运行至关重要。在高维中基于似然性的检测失败之后，基于\emph{典型集}的方法引起了人们的关注；然而，他们仍然没有取得令人满意的表现。首先介绍基于典型性的方法的失败案例，我们提出了一种采用归一化流（NF）的新的基于重建误差的方法。我们进一步引入了基于典型性的惩罚，并将其合并到 NF 中的重建误差中，提出了一种新的 OOD 检测方法，惩罚重建误差（PRE）。由于 PRE 检测到分布流形之外的测试输入，因此它可以有效地检测对抗性示例和 OOD 示例。我们通过使用自然图像数据集、CIFAR-10、TinyImageNet 和 ILSVRC2012 进行评估，展示了我们方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合重建误差和典型性惩罚的新型分布外检测方法PRE，用于提升高维数据中的检测性能。
AI.motivation: 传统基于似然和典型集的方法在高维数据中表现不佳，无法有效检测分布外样本和对抗样本。
AI.method: 基于归一化流（NF）构建重建误差，并引入典型性惩罚项，形成联合优化目标函数PRE以检测偏离分布流形的样本。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10、TinyImageNet和ILSVRC2012等自然图像数据集上验证，PRE方法在检测分布外样本和对抗样本方面优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: PRE通过结合重建误差与典型性惩罚，有效解决了高维数据中分布外检测的挑战，具有实际应用价值。
