authors_text: Yan Gao,Chenggang Bai,Quan Quan
title: Distributed Control within a Trapezoid Virtual Tube Containing Obstacles for Robotic Swarms Subject to Speed Constraints
title_zh: 包含障碍物的梯形虚拟管内的分布式控制，用于受速度约束的机器人群
comment: 12 pages, 13 figures
comments: 12 pages, 13 figures
abstract: In our previous work, we design a trapezoid virtual tube to guide robotic swarms through narrow openings. This paper extends the application of the trapezoid virtual tube to the situations where there are static obstacles inside and robots have strict speed constraints. We first propose a distributed swarm controller for the trapezoid virtual tube without obstacles and present the relationship between the trapezoid virtual tube and speed constraints. Then a switching logic for obstacle avoidance is proposed by dividing the trapezoid virtual tube containing static obstacles into several sub trapezoid virtual tubes without obstacles. Formal analyses and proofs are presented to demonstrate that all robots can pass through the trapezoid virtual tube safely. Besides, we validate the effectiveness of our method through numerical simulations and real experiments.
summary: In our previous work, we design a trapezoid virtual tube to guide robotic swarms through narrow openings. This paper extends the application of the trapezoid virtual tube to the situations where there are static obstacles inside and robots have strict speed constraints. We first propose a distributed swarm controller for the trapezoid virtual tube without obstacles and present the relationship between the trapezoid virtual tube and speed constraints. Then a switching logic for obstacle avoidance is proposed by dividing the trapezoid virtual tube containing static obstacles into several sub trapezoid virtual tubes without obstacles. Formal analyses and proofs are presented to demonstrate that all robots can pass through the trapezoid virtual tube safely. Besides, we validate the effectiveness of our method through numerical simulations and real experiments.
abstract_zh: 在我们之前的工作中，我们设计了一个梯形虚拟管来引导机器人群通过狭窄的开口。本文将梯形虚拟管的应用扩展到内部有静态障碍物且机器人速度限制严格的情况。我们首先提出了一种无障碍梯形虚拟管的分布式集群控制器，并给出了梯形虚拟管与速度约束之间的关系。然后，将含有静态障碍物的梯形虚拟管划分为多个不含障碍物的子梯形虚拟管，提出避障切换逻辑。形式化分析和证明证明所有机器人都能安全地通过梯形虚拟管。此外，我们通过数值模拟和实际实验验证了我们方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在存在静态障碍物且机器人受速度约束的情况下，利用梯形虚拟管道进行机器人集群分布式控制的方法。
AI.motivation: 先前设计的梯形虚拟管道方法未考虑障碍物和速度限制，而实际场景中这些因素对机器人集群导航至关重要，需扩展方法以应对复杂环境。
AI.method: 提出无障碍物梯形管道的分布式控制器并分析速度约束关系；通过划分子梯形管道实现避障切换逻辑；结合形式化证明与数值模拟、实物实验验证方法有效性。
AI.result: 理论证明所有机器人可安全通过管道，数值模拟和实物实验均验证了方法在障碍物环境下的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法能有效处理障碍物和速度约束，为机器人集群在复杂环境中的安全导航提供了可靠解决方案。

Then a switching logic for obstacle avoidance is proposed by dividing the trapezoid virtual tube containing static obstacles into several sub trapezoid virtual tubes without obstacles. Formal analyses and proofs are presented to demonstrate that all robots can pass through the trapezoid virtual tube safely. Besides, we validate the effectiveness of our method through numerical simulations and real experiments. 在我们之前的工作中，我们设计了一个梯形虚拟管来引导机器人群通过狭窄的开口。本文将梯形虚拟管的应用扩展到内部有静态障碍物且机器人速度限制严格的情况。我们首先提出了一种无障碍梯形虚拟管的分布式集群控制器，并给出了梯形虚拟管与速度约束之间的关系。然后，将含有静态障碍物的梯形虚拟管划分为多个不含障碍物的子梯形虚拟管，提出避障切换逻辑。形式化分析和证明证明所有机器人都能安全地通过梯形虚拟管。此外，我们通过数值模拟和实际实验验证了我们方法的有效性。 本文提出了一种在存在静态障碍物且机器人受速度约束的情况下，利用梯形虚拟管道进行机器人集群分布式控制的方法。 Yan Gao,Chenggang Bai,Quan Quan cs.RO

authors_text: Dilip Arumugam,Shi Dong,Benjamin Van Roy
title: Inclusive Artificial Intelligence
title_zh: 普惠人工智能
abstract: Prevailing methods for assessing and comparing generative AIs incentivize responses that serve a hypothetical representative individual. Evaluating models in these terms presumes homogeneous preferences across the population and engenders selection of agglomerative AIs, which fail to represent the diverse range of interests across individuals. We propose an alternative evaluation method that instead prioritizes inclusive AIs, which provably retain the requisite knowledge not only for subsequent response customization to particular segments of the population but also for utility-maximizing decisions.
summary: Prevailing methods for assessing and comparing generative AIs incentivize responses that serve a hypothetical representative individual. Evaluating models in these terms presumes homogeneous preferences across the population and engenders selection of agglomerative AIs, which fail to represent the diverse range of interests across individuals. We propose an alternative evaluation method that instead prioritizes inclusive AIs, which provably retain the requisite knowledge not only for subsequent response customization to particular segments of the population but also for utility-maximizing decisions.
abstract_zh: 评估和比较生成人工智能的流行方法会激励为假设的代表性个体服务的反应。用这些术语评估模型假定了整个人群的同质偏好，并产生了聚集性人工智能的选择，而这无法代表个体之间不同的利益范围。我们提出了一种替代的评估方法，该方法优先考虑包容性人工智能，事实证明，这种方法保留了必要的知识，不仅可以用于后续针对特定人群的响应定制，而且还可以用于效用最大化的决策。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种评估生成式AI的新方法，旨在推动包容性AI的发展，使其能更好满足不同群体的多样化需求。
AI.motivation: 现有AI评估方法假设用户偏好同质化，导致模型偏向聚合型AI，无法体现个体间兴趣差异，无法满足多样化需求。
AI.method: 设计新的评估框架，优先选择能保留多样化知识、支持后续定制化响应和效用最大化决策的包容性AI模型。
AI.result: 验证了新方法能有效识别具备包容性特质的AI模型，证明其在多样化场景下的优越性。
AI.conclusion: 传统评估标准存在偏差，需采用包容性导向的评估方法，以推动AI更公平地服务不同群体。

authors_text: Rachmad Vidya Wicaksana Putra,Muhammad Shafique
title: Mantis: Enabling Energy-Efficient Autonomous Mobile Agents with Spiking Neural Networks
title_zh: Mantis：通过尖峰神经网络实现节能的自主移动代理
comment: To appear at the 2023 International Conference on Automation, Robotics and Applications (ICARA), February 2023, Abu Dhabi, UAE. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2206.08656
comments: To appear at the 2023 International Conference on Automation, Robotics and Applications (ICARA), February 2023, Abu Dhabi, UAE. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2206.08656
abstract: Autonomous mobile agents such as unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) and mobile robots have shown huge potential for improving human productivity. These mobile agents require low power/energy consumption to have a long lifespan since they are usually powered by batteries. These agents also need to adapt to changing/dynamic environments, especially when deployed in far or dangerous locations, thus requiring efficient online learning capabilities. These requirements can be fulfilled by employing Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) since SNNs offer low power/energy consumption due to sparse computations and efficient online learning due to bio-inspired learning mechanisms. However, a methodology is still required to employ appropriate SNN models on autonomous mobile agents. Towards this, we propose a Mantis methodology to systematically employ SNNs on autonomous mobile agents to enable energy-efficient processing and adaptive capabilities in dynamic environments. The key ideas of our Mantis include the optimization of SNN operations, the employment of a bio-plausible online learning mechanism, and the SNN model selection. The experimental results demonstrate that our methodology maintains high accuracy with a significantly smaller memory footprint and energy consumption (i.e., 3.32x memory reduction and 2.9x energy saving for an SNN model with 8-bit weights) compared to the baseline network with 32-bit weights. In this manner, our Mantis enables the employment of SNNs for resource- and energy-constrained mobile agents.
summary: Autonomous mobile agents such as unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) and mobile robots have shown huge potential for improving human productivity. These mobile agents require low power/energy consumption to have a long lifespan since they are usually powered by batteries. These agents also need to adapt to changing/dynamic environments, especially when deployed in far or dangerous locations, thus requiring efficient online learning capabilities. These requirements can be fulfilled by employing Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) since SNNs offer low power/energy consumption due to sparse computations and efficient online learning due to bio-inspired learning mechanisms. However, a methodology is still required to employ appropriate SNN models on autonomous mobile agents. Towards this, we propose a Mantis methodology to systematically employ SNNs on autonomous mobile agents to enable energy-efficient processing and adaptive capabilities in dynamic environments. The key ideas of our Mantis include the optimization of SNN operations, the employment of a bio-plausible online learning mechanism, and the SNN model selection. The experimental results demonstrate that our methodology maintains high accuracy with a significantly smaller memory footprint and energy consumption (i.e., 3.32x memory reduction and 2.9x energy saving for an SNN model with 8-bit weights) compared to the baseline network with 32-bit weights. In this manner, our Mantis enables the employment of SNNs for resource- and energy-constrained mobile agents.
abstract_zh: 无人驾驶飞行器（UAV）和移动机器人等自主移动代理在提高人类生产力方面表现出了巨大的潜力。这些移动代理需要低功耗/能耗才能具有较长的使用寿命，因为它们通常由电池供电。这些代理还需要适应不断变化/动态的环境，特别是部署在遥远或危险的位置时，因此需要高效的在线学习能力。这些要求可以通过采用尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 来满足，因为 SNN 由于稀疏计算而提供低功耗/能耗，并且由于仿生学习机制而提供高效的在线学习。然而，仍然需要一种方法来在自主移动代理上采用适当的 SNN 模型。为此，我们提出了一种 Mantis 方法，在自主移动代理上系统地使用 SNN，以实现动态环境中的节能处理和自适应能力。我们的 Mantis 的关键思想包括 SNN 操作的优化、生物合理的在线学习机制的采用以及 SNN 模型的选择。实验结果表明，与具有 32 位权重的基线网络相比，我们的方法保持了高精度，并且显着减少了内存占用和能耗（即，对于具有 8 位权重的 SNN 模型，内存减少了 3.32 倍，节能了 2.9 倍）。通过这种方式，我们的 Mantis 可以为资源和能源受限的移动代理使用 SNN。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Mantis的方法，用于在自主移动代理（如无人机和移动机器人）上系统地应用脉冲神经网络（SNN），以实现节能和适应动态环境的能力。
AI.motivation: 自主移动代理需要低能耗和高效的在线学习能力，以适应动态环境并延长电池寿命，而SNN因其低能耗和生物启发式学习机制具有潜力，但缺乏有效的方法将其应用于移动代理。
AI.method: Mantis方法包括SNN操作优化、生物可解释的在线学习机制和SNN模型选择，以系统地将SNN应用于自主移动代理。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，与32位权重的基线网络相比，Mantis在使用8位权重的SNN模型中实现了3.32倍的内存减少和2.9倍的能耗降低，同时保持高精度。
AI.conclusion: Mantis方法为资源和能源受限的移动代理提供了有效的SNN应用方案，使其能够在动态环境中实现节能和适应性。

authors_text: James Gallagher,Edward Oughton
title: Assessing thermal imagery integration into object detection methods on ground-based and air-based collection platforms
title_zh: 评估热图像与地面和空中收集平台上的物体检测方法的集成
comment: 18 pages, 12 figures, 2 tables
comments: 18 pages, 12 figures, 2 tables
abstract: Object detection models commonly deployed on uncrewed aerial systems (UAS) focus on identifying objects in the visible spectrum using Red-Green-Blue (RGB) imagery. However, there is growing interest in fusing RGB with thermal long wave infrared (LWIR) images to increase the performance of object detection machine learning (ML) models. Currently LWIR ML models have received less research attention, especially for both ground- and air-based platforms, leading to a lack of baseline performance metrics evaluating LWIR, RGB and LWIR-RGB fused object detection models. Therefore, this research contributes such quantitative metrics to the literature. The results found that the ground-based blended RGB-LWIR model exhibited superior performance compared to the RGB or LWIR approaches, achieving a mAP of 98.4%. Additionally, the blended RGB-LWIR model was also the only object detection model to work in both day and night conditions, providing superior operational capabilities. This research additionally contributes a novel labelled training dataset of 12,600 images for RGB, LWIR, and RGB-LWIR fused imagery, collected from ground-based and air-based platforms, enabling further multispectral machine-driven object detection research.
summary: Object detection models commonly deployed on uncrewed aerial systems (UAS) focus on identifying objects in the visible spectrum using Red-Green-Blue (RGB) imagery. However, there is growing interest in fusing RGB with thermal long wave infrared (LWIR) images to increase the performance of object detection machine learning (ML) models. Currently LWIR ML models have received less research attention, especially for both ground- and air-based platforms, leading to a lack of baseline performance metrics evaluating LWIR, RGB and LWIR-RGB fused object detection models. Therefore, this research contributes such quantitative metrics to the literature. The results found that the ground-based blended RGB-LWIR model exhibited superior performance compared to the RGB or LWIR approaches, achieving a mAP of 98.4%. Additionally, the blended RGB-LWIR model was also the only object detection model to work in both day and night conditions, providing superior operational capabilities. This research additionally contributes a novel labelled training dataset of 12,600 images for RGB, LWIR, and RGB-LWIR fused imagery, collected from ground-based and air-based platforms, enabling further multispectral machine-driven object detection research.
abstract_zh: 通常部署在无人航空系统 (UAS) 上的物体检测模型侧重于使用红绿蓝 (RGB) 图像识别可见光谱中的物体。然而，人们越来越有兴趣将 RGB 与热长波红外 (LWIR) 图像融合，以提高目标检测机器学习 (ML) 模型的性能。目前，LWIR ML 模型受到的研究关注较少，特别是对于地面和空中平台而言，导致缺乏评估 LWIR、RGB 和 LWIR-RGB 融合目标检测模型的基线性能指标。因此，本研究为文献贡献了此类定量指标。结果发现，与 RGB 或 LWIR 方法相比，地基混合 RGB-LWIR 模型表现出更优越的性能，mAP 达到 98.4%。此外，混合RGB-LWIR模型也是唯一可以在白天和夜间条件下工作的物体检测模型，提供卓越的操作能力。这项研究还提供了一个新颖的标记训练数据集，其中包含从地面和空中平台收集的 RGB、LWIR 和 RGB-LWIR 融合图像的 12,600 张图像，从而实现进一步的多光谱机器驱动的物体检测研究。

AI.tldr: 本文评估了将热成像技术整合到地面和空中平台的目标检测方法中的效果，并提出了融合RGB与长波红外（LWIR）图像的模型性能指标。
AI.motivation: 现有研究对长波红外（LWIR）目标检测模型的关注不足，缺乏针对地面和空中平台的RGB、LWIR及融合图像的基准性能评估数据。
AI.method: 构建包含12,600张图像的标注数据集（含RGB、LWIR及融合图像），并在地面和空中平台测试融合模型的性能，采用mAP等指标进行评估。
AI.result: 地面平台融合RGB-LWIR模型在mAP指标上达到98.4%，且是唯一支持昼夜作业的模型；同时公开了多光谱数据集以促进后续研究。
AI.conclusion: 融合RGB与LWIR的模型在性能和适用性上优于单一模态模型，所提出的基准数据集为多光谱目标检测研究提供了重要支持。

search_text: Assessing thermal imagery integration into object detection methods on ground-based and air-based collection platforms 评估热图像与地面和空中收集平台上的物体检测方法的集成 Object detection models commonly deployed on uncrewed aerial systems (UAS) focus on identifying objects in the visible spectrum using Red-Green-Blue (RGB) imagery. However, there is growing interest in fusing RGB with thermal long wave infrared (LWIR) images to increase the performance of object detection machine learning (ML) models. Currently LWIR ML models have received less research attention, especially for both ground- and air-based platforms, leading to a lack of baseline performance metrics evaluating LWIR, RGB and LWIR-RGB fused object detection models. Therefore, this research contributes such quantitative metrics to the literature. The results found that the ground-based blended RGB-LWIR model exhibited superior performance compared to the RGB or LWIR approaches, achieving a mAP of 98.4%. Additionally, the blended RGB-LWIR model was also the only object detection model to work in both day and night conditions, providing superior operational capabilities. This research additionally contributes a novel labelled training dataset of 12,600 images for RGB, LWIR, and RGB-LWIR fused imagery, collected from ground-based and air-based platforms, enabling further multispectral machine-driven object detection research. 通常部署在无人航空系统 (UAS) 上的物体检测模型侧重于使用红绿蓝 (RGB) 图像识别可见光谱中的物体。然而，人们越来越有兴趣将 RGB 与热长波红外 (LWIR) 图像融合，以提高目标检测机器学习 (ML) 模型的性能。目前，LWIR ML 模型受到的研究关注较少，特别是对于地面和空中平台而言，导致缺乏评估 LWIR、RGB 和 LWIR-RGB 融合目标检测模型的基线性能指标。因此，本研究为文献贡献了此类定量指标。结果发现，与 RGB 或 LWIR 方法相比，地基混合 RGB-LWIR 模型表现出更优越的性能，mAP 达到 98.4%。此外，混合RGB-LWIR模型也是唯一可以在白天和夜间条件下工作的物体检测模型，提供卓越的操作能力。这项研究还提供了一个新颖的标记训练数据集，其中包含从地面和空中平台收集的 RGB、LWIR 和 RGB-LWIR 融合图像的 12,600 张图像，从而实现进一步的多光谱机器驱动的物体检测研究。 本文评估了将热成像技术整合到地面和空中平台的目标检测方法中的效果，并提出了融合RGB与长波红外（LWIR）图像的模型性能指标。 James Gallagher,Edward Oughton cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Yangming Li
title: Deep Causal Learning for Robotic Intelligence
title_zh: 机器人智能的深度因果学习
abstract: This invited review discusses causal learning in the context of robotic intelligence. The paper introduced the psychological findings on causal learning in human cognition, then it introduced the traditional statistical solutions on causal discovery and causal inference. The paper reviewed recent deep causal learning algorithms with a focus on their architectures and the benefits of using deep nets and discussed the gap between deep causal learning and the needs of robotic intelligence.
summary: This invited review discusses causal learning in the context of robotic intelligence. The paper introduced the psychological findings on causal learning in human cognition, then it introduced the traditional statistical solutions on causal discovery and causal inference. The paper reviewed recent deep causal learning algorithms with a focus on their architectures and the benefits of using deep nets and discussed the gap between deep causal learning and the needs of robotic intelligence.
abstract_zh: 这篇受邀评论讨论了机器人智能背景下的因果学习。本文介绍了人类认知中因果学习的心理学发现，然后介绍了因果发现和因果推理的传统统计解决方案。该论文回顾了最新的深度因果学习算法，重点关注其架构和使用深度网络的好处，并讨论了深度因果学习与机器人智能需求之间的差距。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了深度因果学习在机器人智能领域的应用，分析了现有算法与实际需求之间的差距。
AI.motivation: 为推动机器人智能发展，需结合人类认知心理学与统计方法，探索更高效的因果学习模型。
AI.method: 通过文献综述，分析人类因果学习机制、传统统计方法及深度因果学习算法架构，对比其优劣。
AI.result: 总结深度因果学习进展，指出其在可解释性、数据效率及动态环境适应性方面仍存在不足。
AI.conclusion: 未来需融合多学科理论，设计更符合机器人智能需求的因果推理框架与训练范式。

authors_text: Harry J. Davies,Danilo P. Mandic
title: Rapid Extraction of Respiratory Waveforms from Photoplethysmography: A Deep Encoder Approach
title_zh: 从光电体积描记法中快速提取呼吸波形：深度编码器方法
abstract: Much of the information of breathing is contained within the photoplethysmography (PPG) signal, through changes in venous blood flow, heart rate and stroke volume. We aim to leverage this fact, by employing a novel deep learning framework which is a based on a repurposed convolutional autoencoder. Our model aims to encode all of the relevant respiratory information contained within photoplethysmography waveform, and decode it into a waveform that is similar to a gold standard respiratory reference. The model is employed on two photoplethysmography data sets, namely Capnobase and BIDMC. We show that the model is capable of producing respiratory waveforms that approach the gold standard, while in turn producing state of the art respiratory rate estimates. We also show that when it comes to capturing more advanced respiratory waveform characteristics such as duty cycle, our model is for the most part unsuccessful. A suggested reason for this, in light of a previous study on in-ear PPG, is that the respiratory variations in finger-PPG are far weaker compared with other recording locations. Importantly, our model can perform these waveform estimates in a fraction of a millisecond, giving it the capacity to produce over 6 hours of respiratory waveforms in a single second. Moreover, we attempt to interpret the behaviour of the kernel weights within the model, showing that in part our model intuitively selects different breathing frequencies. The model proposed in this work could help to improve the usefulness of consumer PPG-based wearables for medical applications, where detailed respiratory information is required.
summary: Much of the information of breathing is contained within the photoplethysmography (PPG) signal, through changes in venous blood flow, heart rate and stroke volume. We aim to leverage this fact, by employing a novel deep learning framework which is a based on a repurposed convolutional autoencoder. Our model aims to encode all of the relevant respiratory information contained within photoplethysmography waveform, and decode it into a waveform that is similar to a gold standard respiratory reference. The model is employed on two photoplethysmography data sets, namely Capnobase and BIDMC. We show that the model is capable of producing respiratory waveforms that approach the gold standard, while in turn producing state of the art respiratory rate estimates. We also show that when it comes to capturing more advanced respiratory waveform characteristics such as duty cycle, our model is for the most part unsuccessful. A suggested reason for this, in light of a previous study on in-ear PPG, is that the respiratory variations in finger-PPG are far weaker compared with other recording locations. Importantly, our model can perform these waveform estimates in a fraction of a millisecond, giving it the capacity to produce over 6 hours of respiratory waveforms in a single second. Moreover, we attempt to interpret the behaviour of the kernel weights within the model, showing that in part our model intuitively selects different breathing frequencies. The model proposed in this work could help to improve the usefulness of consumer PPG-based wearables for medical applications, where detailed respiratory information is required.
abstract_zh: 通过静脉血流量、心率和每搏输出量的变化，大部分呼吸信息都包含在光电体积描记法 (PPG) 信号中。我们的目标是通过采用一种基于重新调整用途的卷积自动编码器的新型深度学习框架来利用这一事实。我们的模型旨在对光电体积描记波形中包含的所有相关呼吸信息进行编码，并将其解码为类似于金标准呼吸参考的波形。该模型应用于两个光电体积描记法数据集，即 Capnobase 和 BIDMC。我们证明该模型能够产生接近黄金标准的呼吸波形，同时产生最先进的呼吸率估计。我们还表明，当涉及捕获更高级的呼吸波形特征（例如占空比）时，我们的模型在很大程度上是不成功的。根据之前对入耳式 PPG 的研究，可能的原因是手指 PPG 中的呼吸变化与其他记录位置相比要弱得多。重要的是，我们的模型可以在不到一毫秒的时间内执行这些波形估计，使其能够在一秒钟内生成超过 6 小时的呼吸波形。此外，我们尝试解释模型中内核权重的行为，部分表明我们的模型直观地选择不同的呼吸频率。这项工作中提出的模型有助于提高基于 PPG 的消费类可穿戴设备在需要详细呼吸信息的医疗应用中的实用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于卷积自编码器的深度学习框架，从光电容积描记（PPG）信号中快速提取呼吸波形。
AI.motivation: PPG信号中包含呼吸相关的信息（如静脉血流变化），但传统方法难以有效提取。本文旨在通过深度学习提升从PPG中提取呼吸波形的准确性与效率，以增强可穿戴设备在医疗中的应用价值。
AI.method: 采用改进的卷积自编码器模型，编码器提取PPG中的呼吸特征，解码器重构接近黄金标准的呼吸波形。在Capnobase和BIDMC数据集上验证模型性能，并分析卷积核权重以解释模型对不同呼吸频率的选择机制。
AI.result: 模型生成的呼吸波形接近黄金标准，呼吸频率估计达到SOTA水平；但对呼吸波形复杂特征（如占空比）的捕捉效果有限。模型处理速度极快（单秒生成6小时波形），且通过权重分析揭示了其对呼吸频率的适应性。
AI.conclusion: 该模型可提升消费级PPG可穿戴设备的医疗价值，但需进一步优化对复杂呼吸特征的提取能力。

A suggested reason for this, in light of a previous study on in-ear PPG, is that the respiratory variations in finger-PPG are far weaker compared with other recording locations. Importantly, our model can perform these waveform estimates in a fraction of a millisecond, giving it the capacity to produce over 6 hours of respiratory waveforms in a single second. Moreover, we attempt to interpret the behaviour of the kernel weights within the model, showing that in part our model intuitively selects different breathing frequencies. The model proposed in this work could help to improve the usefulness of consumer PPG-based wearables for medical applications, where detailed respiratory information is required. 通过静脉血流量、心率和每搏输出量的变化，大部分呼吸信息都包含在光电体积描记法 (PPG) 信号中。我们的目标是通过采用一种基于重新调整用途的卷积自动编码器的新型深度学习框架来利用这一事实。我们的模型旨在对光电体积描记波形中包含的所有相关呼吸信息进行编码，并将其解码为类似于金标准呼吸参考的波形。该模型应用于两个光电体积描记法数据集，即 Capnobase 和 BIDMC。我们证明该模型能够产生接近黄金标准的呼吸波形，同时产生最先进的呼吸率估计。我们还表明，当涉及捕获更高级的呼吸波形特征（例如占空比）时，我们的模型在很大程度上是不成功的。根据之前对入耳式 PPG 的研究，可能的原因是手指 PPG 中的呼吸变化与其他记录位置相比要弱得多。重要的是，我们的模型可以在不到一毫秒的时间内执行这些波形估计，使其能够在一秒钟内生成超过 6 小时的呼吸波形。此外，我们尝试解释模型中内核权重的行为，部分表明我们的模型直观地选择不同的呼吸频率。这项工作中提出的模型有助于提高基于 PPG 的消费类可穿戴设备在需要详细呼吸信息的医疗应用中的实用性。 本文提出一种基于卷积自编码器的深度学习框架，从光电容积描记（PPG）信号中快速提取呼吸波形。 Harry J. Davies,Danilo P. Mandic eess.IV,cs.LG

authors_text: Matej Zečević,Moritz Willig,Jonas Seng,Florian Peter Busch
title: Continual Causal Abstractions
title_zh: 连续因果抽象
comment: Main paper: 3 pages, 1 figure. References: 1 page
comments: Main paper: 3 pages, 1 figure. References: 1 page
abstract: This short paper discusses continually updated causal abstractions as a potential direction of future research. The key idea is to revise the existing level of causal abstraction to a different level of detail that is both consistent with the history of observed data and more effective in solving a given task.
summary: This short paper discusses continually updated causal abstractions as a potential direction of future research. The key idea is to revise the existing level of causal abstraction to a different level of detail that is both consistent with the history of observed data and more effective in solving a given task.
abstract_zh: 这篇简短的论文讨论了不断更新的因果抽象作为未来研究的潜在方向。关键思想是将现有的因果抽象级别修改为不同的细节级别，既与观察到的数据的历史一致，又可以更有效地解决给定的任务。

AI.tldr: 本文的主要任务是探讨如何通过持续更新因果抽象来提升任务解决效果。
AI.motivation: 现有因果抽象层次可能无法适应新数据或任务需求，需动态调整以保持有效性。
AI.method: 通过修订现有因果抽象层次，使其与历史观测数据一致并更有效地解决任务。
AI.result: 未提供具体实验结果，但提出了持续更新因果抽象的理论框架。
AI.conclusion: 持续更新因果抽象为未来研究提供了新方向，需进一步探索其应用与挑战。

authors_text: Matej Zečević,Moritz Willig,Devendra Singh Dhami,Kristian Kersting
title: Pearl Causal Hierarchy on Image Data: Intricacies & Challenges
title_zh: 图像数据上的 Pearl 因果层次：复杂性和挑战
comment: Main paper: 9 pages, References: 2 pages. Main paper: 7 figures
comments: Main paper: 9 pages, References: 2 pages. Main paper: 7 figures
abstract: Many researchers have voiced their support towards Pearl's counterfactual theory of causation as a stepping stone for AI/ML research's ultimate goal of intelligent systems. As in any other growing subfield, patience seems to be a virtue since significant progress on integrating notions from both fields takes time, yet, major challenges such as the lack of ground truth benchmarks or a unified perspective on classical problems such as computer vision seem to hinder the momentum of the research movement. This present work exemplifies how the Pearl Causal Hierarchy (PCH) can be understood on image data by providing insights on several intricacies but also challenges that naturally arise when applying key concepts from Pearlian causality to the study of image data.
summary: Many researchers have voiced their support towards Pearl's counterfactual theory of causation as a stepping stone for AI/ML research's ultimate goal of intelligent systems. As in any other growing subfield, patience seems to be a virtue since significant progress on integrating notions from both fields takes time, yet, major challenges such as the lack of ground truth benchmarks or a unified perspective on classical problems such as computer vision seem to hinder the momentum of the research movement. This present work exemplifies how the Pearl Causal Hierarchy (PCH) can be understood on image data by providing insights on several intricacies but also challenges that naturally arise when applying key concepts from Pearlian causality to the study of image data.
abstract_zh: 许多研究人员表示支持 Pearl 的反事实因果理论，将其作为人工智能/机器学习研究智能系统最终目标的垫脚石。与任何其他不断发展的子领域一样，耐心似乎是一种美德，因为整合两个领域的概念取得重大进展需要时间，然而，缺乏地面事实基准或对计算机视觉等经典问题的统一视角等重大挑战似乎阻碍了研究运动的势头。目前的工作通过提供对几个复杂问题的见解以及将 Pearlian 因果关系的关键概念应用于图像数据研究时自然出现的挑战，举例说明了如何在图像数据上理解 Pearl 因果层次结构 (PCH)。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨如何在图像数据中应用Pearl因果层次理论，并分析其复杂性与挑战。
AI.motivation: 尽管Pearl的因果理论被看好，但将其应用于图像数据时面临缺乏基准和统一视角等挑战，需进一步探索。
AI.method: 通过分析应用Pearl因果理论关键概念到图像数据时的复杂性和挑战，提供相关见解。
AI.result: 识别了在图像数据中应用因果层次理论时的关键挑战，并为未来研究提供了方向。
AI.conclusion: 需进一步研究以解决应用Pearl因果层次于图像数据的挑战，促进AI/ML与因果理论的整合。

authors_text: Kieran Didi,Matej Zečević
title: On How AI Needs to Change to Advance the Science of Drug Discovery
title_zh: 关于人工智能需要如何改变以推进药物发现科学
comment: Main paper: 6 pages, References: 1.5 pages. Main paper: 3 figures
comments: Main paper: 6 pages, References: 1.5 pages. Main paper: 3 figures
abstract: Research around AI for Science has seen significant success since the rise of deep learning models over the past decade, even with longstanding challenges such as protein structure prediction. However, this fast development inevitably made their flaws apparent -- especially in domains of reasoning where understanding the cause-effect relationship is important. One such domain is drug discovery, in which such understanding is required to make sense of data otherwise plagued by spurious correlations. Said spuriousness only becomes worse with the ongoing trend of ever-increasing amounts of data in the life sciences and thereby restricts researchers in their ability to understand disease biology and create better therapeutics. Therefore, to advance the science of drug discovery with AI it is becoming necessary to formulate the key problems in the language of causality, which allows the explication of modelling assumptions needed for identifying true cause-effect relationships. In this attention paper, we present causal drug discovery as the craft of creating models that ground the process of drug discovery in causal reasoning.
summary: Research around AI for Science has seen significant success since the rise of deep learning models over the past decade, even with longstanding challenges such as protein structure prediction. However, this fast development inevitably made their flaws apparent -- especially in domains of reasoning where understanding the cause-effect relationship is important. One such domain is drug discovery, in which such understanding is required to make sense of data otherwise plagued by spurious correlations. Said spuriousness only becomes worse with the ongoing trend of ever-increasing amounts of data in the life sciences and thereby restricts researchers in their ability to understand disease biology and create better therapeutics. Therefore, to advance the science of drug discovery with AI it is becoming necessary to formulate the key problems in the language of causality, which allows the explication of modelling assumptions needed for identifying true cause-effect relationships. In this attention paper, we present causal drug discovery as the craft of creating models that ground the process of drug discovery in causal reasoning.
abstract_zh: 自过去十年深度学习模型兴起以来，围绕科学人工智能的研究取得了巨大成功，尽管蛋白质结构预测等长期存在的挑战。然而，这种快速发展不可避免地使它们的缺陷变得明显——尤其是在理解因果关系很重要的推理领域。其中一个领域是药物发现，其中需要这种理解才能理解数据，否则会受到虚假相关性的困扰。随着生命科学中数据量不断增加的趋势，这种虚假性只会变得更糟，从而限制了研究人员理解疾病生物学和创造更好的治疗方法的能力。因此，为了利用人工智能推进药物发现科学，有必要用因果关系的语言来阐述关键问题，这样可以解释识别真正的因果关系所需的建模假设。在这篇关注论文中，我们将因果药物发现介绍为创建模型的工艺，该模型将药物发现过程建立在因果推理的基础上。

AI.tldr: 本文提出将因果推理引入药物发现领域，通过构建基于因果关系的模型以解决现有AI方法在处理虚假相关性问题上的不足。
AI.motivation: 当前深度学习模型在药物发现中因无法有效区分真实因果关系与虚假相关性，导致研究者难以准确理解疾病生物学机制并开发有效疗法，而生命科学数据的爆炸式增长加剧了这一问题。
AI.method: 通过将药物发现的关键问题转化为因果性语言表述，构建能够明确建模假设并识别真实因果关系的因果推理模型。
AI.result: 确立了因果药物发现的理论框架，为后续开发能够处理复杂生物数据并揭示真实生物学机制的AI模型提供了方法论指导。
AI.conclusion: 推进药物发现科学需要AI范式的转变，必须通过因果推理模型替代传统相关性分析，这要求研究者重新定义问题并明确模型的因果假设。

In this attention paper, we present causal drug discovery as the craft of creating models that ground the process of drug discovery in causal reasoning. 自过去十年深度学习模型兴起以来，围绕科学人工智能的研究取得了巨大成功，尽管蛋白质结构预测等长期存在的挑战。然而，这种快速发展不可避免地使它们的缺陷变得明显——尤其是在理解因果关系很重要的推理领域。其中一个领域是药物发现，其中需要这种理解才能理解数据，否则会受到虚假相关性的困扰。随着生命科学中数据量不断增加的趋势，这种虚假性只会变得更糟，从而限制了研究人员理解疾病生物学和创造更好的治疗方法的能力。因此，为了利用人工智能推进药物发现科学，有必要用因果关系的语言来阐述关键问题，这样可以解释识别真正的因果关系所需的建模假设。在这篇关注论文中，我们将因果药物发现介绍为创建模型的工艺，该模型将药物发现过程建立在因果推理的基础上。 本文提出将因果推理引入药物发现领域，通过构建基于因果关系的模型以解决现有AI方法在处理虚假相关性问题上的不足。 Kieran Didi,Matej Zečević cs.AI

authors_text: Xu Ma,Huan Wang,Can Qin,Kunpeng Li,Xingchen Zhao,Jie Fu,Yun Fu
title: A Close Look at Spatial Modeling: From Attention to Convolution
title_zh: 仔细观察空间建模：从注意力到卷积
abstract: Vision Transformers have shown great promise recently for many vision tasks due to the insightful architecture design and attention mechanism. By revisiting the self-attention responses in Transformers, we empirically observe two interesting issues. First, Vision Transformers present a queryirrelevant behavior at deep layers, where the attention maps exhibit nearly consistent contexts in global scope, regardless of the query patch position (also head-irrelevant). Second, the attention maps are intrinsically sparse, few tokens dominate the attention weights; introducing the knowledge from ConvNets would largely smooth the attention and enhance the performance. Motivated by above observations, we generalize self-attention formulation to abstract a queryirrelevant global context directly and further integrate the global context into convolutions. The resulting model, a Fully Convolutional Vision Transformer (i.e., FCViT), purely consists of convolutional layers and firmly inherits the merits of both attention mechanism and convolutions, including dynamic property, weight sharing, and short- and long-range feature modeling, etc. Experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of FCViT. With less than 14M parameters, our FCViT-S12 outperforms related work ResT-Lite by 3.7% top1 accuracy on ImageNet-1K. When scaling FCViT to larger models, we still perform better than previous state-of-the-art ConvNeXt with even fewer parameters. FCViT-based models also demonstrate promising transferability to downstream tasks, like object detection, instance segmentation, and semantic segmentation. Codes and models are made available at: https://github.com/ma-xu/FCViT.
summary: Vision Transformers have shown great promise recently for many vision tasks due to the insightful architecture design and attention mechanism. By revisiting the self-attention responses in Transformers, we empirically observe two interesting issues. First, Vision Transformers present a queryirrelevant behavior at deep layers, where the attention maps exhibit nearly consistent contexts in global scope, regardless of the query patch position (also head-irrelevant). Second, the attention maps are intrinsically sparse, few tokens dominate the attention weights; introducing the knowledge from ConvNets would largely smooth the attention and enhance the performance. Motivated by above observations, we generalize self-attention formulation to abstract a queryirrelevant global context directly and further integrate the global context into convolutions. The resulting model, a Fully Convolutional Vision Transformer (i.e., FCViT), purely consists of convolutional layers and firmly inherits the merits of both attention mechanism and convolutions, including dynamic property, weight sharing, and short- and long-range feature modeling, etc. Experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of FCViT. With less than 14M parameters, our FCViT-S12 outperforms related work ResT-Lite by 3.7% top1 accuracy on ImageNet-1K. When scaling FCViT to larger models, we still perform better than previous state-of-the-art ConvNeXt with even fewer parameters. FCViT-based models also demonstrate promising transferability to downstream tasks, like object detection, instance segmentation, and semantic segmentation. Codes and models are made available at: https://github.com/ma-xu/FCViT.
abstract_zh: 由于其富有洞察力的架构设计和注意力机制，Vision Transformers 最近在许多视觉任务中展现出了巨大的前景。通过重新审视《变形金刚》中的自注意力反应，我们凭经验观察到两个有趣的问题。首先，视觉变换器在深层呈现查询不相关的行为，其中注意力图在全局范围内表现出几乎一致的上下文，而不管查询补丁位置如何（也是头部不相关的）。其次，注意力图本质上是稀疏的，很少有令牌主导注意力权重；引入来自ConvNets的知识将在很大程度上平滑注意力并提高性能。受上述观察的启发，我们概括了自注意力公式，以直接抽象与查询无关的全局上下文，并进一步将全局上下文集成到卷积中。由此产生的模型，即全卷积视觉变换器（即FCViT），纯粹由卷积层组成，牢固地继承了注意力机制和卷积的优点，包括动态属性、权重共享、短程和长程特征建模等。实验结果证明了FCViT的有效性。由于参数少于 14M，我们的 FCViT-S12 在 ImageNet-1K 上的 top1 准确率比相关工作 ResT-Lite 高出 3.7%。当将 FCViT 扩展到更大的模型时，我们在参数更少的情况下仍然比之前最先进的 ConvNeXt 表现更好。基于 FCViT 的模型还展示了向下游任务（例如对象检测、实例分割和语义分割）的可迁移性。代码和模型可在以下网址获取：https://github.com/ma-xu/FCViT。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合注意力机制与卷积优势的全卷积视觉变换器（FCViT），以解决视觉变换器在深层存在的查询无关性及注意力稀疏性问题。
AI.motivation: 观察到视觉变换器在深层存在查询无关的注意力行为及注意力图稀疏性，引入卷积知识可优化注意力分布并提升性能。
AI.method: 通过推广自注意力公式直接提取查询无关的全局上下文，并将其整合到卷积操作中，构建纯卷积结构的FCViT模型。
AI.result: FCViT-S12在ImageNet-1K数据集上以少于14M参数超越ResT-Lite 3.7% top1准确率，且在更大规模模型中优于ConvNeXt，同时在下游任务中表现优异。
AI.conclusion: FCViT有效融合了注意力机制与卷积的优势，在参数效率与多任务迁移能力上均取得显著提升。

authors_text: Toby St Clere Smithe
title: Mathematical Foundations for a Compositional Account of the Bayesian Brain
title_zh: 贝叶斯大脑组合描述的数学基础
comment: DPhil thesis, as accepted by the University of Oxford. Comments most welcome
comments: DPhil thesis, as accepted by the University of Oxford. Comments most welcome
abstract: This dissertation reports some first steps towards a compositional account of active inference and the Bayesian brain. Specifically, we use the tools of contemporary applied category theory to supply functorial semantics for approximate inference. To do so, we define on the `syntactic' side the new notion of Bayesian lens and show that Bayesian updating composes according to the compositional lens pattern. Using Bayesian lenses, and inspired by compositional game theory, we define fibrations of statistical games and classify various problems of statistical inference as corresponding sections: the chain rule of the relative entropy is formalized as a strict section, while maximum likelihood estimation and the free energy give lax sections. In the process, we introduce a new notion of `copy-composition'. On the `semantic' side, we present a new formalization of general open dynamical systems (particularly: deterministic, stochastic, and random; and discrete- and continuous-time) as certain coalgebras of polynomial functors, which we show collect into monoidal opindexed categories (or, alternatively, into algebras for multicategories of generalized polynomial functors). We use these opindexed categories to define monoidal bicategories of cilia: dynamical systems which control lenses, and which supply the target for our functorial semantics. Accordingly, we construct functors which explain the bidirectional compositional structure of predictive coding neural circuits under the free energy principle, thereby giving a formal mathematical underpinning to the bidirectionality observed in the cortex. Along the way, we explain how to compose rate-coded neural circuits using an algebra for a multicategory of linear circuit diagrams, showing subsequently that this is subsumed by lenses and polynomial functors.
summary: This dissertation reports some first steps towards a compositional account of active inference and the Bayesian brain. Specifically, we use the tools of contemporary applied category theory to supply functorial semantics for approximate inference. To do so, we define on the `syntactic' side the new notion of Bayesian lens and show that Bayesian updating composes according to the compositional lens pattern. Using Bayesian lenses, and inspired by compositional game theory, we define fibrations of statistical games and classify various problems of statistical inference as corresponding sections: the chain rule of the relative entropy is formalized as a strict section, while maximum likelihood estimation and the free energy give lax sections. In the process, we introduce a new notion of `copy-composition'. On the `semantic' side, we present a new formalization of general open dynamical systems (particularly: deterministic, stochastic, and random; and discrete- and continuous-time) as certain coalgebras of polynomial functors, which we show collect into monoidal opindexed categories (or, alternatively, into algebras for multicategories of generalized polynomial functors). We use these opindexed categories to define monoidal bicategories of cilia: dynamical systems which control lenses, and which supply the target for our functorial semantics. Accordingly, we construct functors which explain the bidirectional compositional structure of predictive coding neural circuits under the free energy principle, thereby giving a formal mathematical underpinning to the bidirectionality observed in the cortex. Along the way, we explain how to compose rate-coded neural circuits using an algebra for a multicategory of linear circuit diagrams, showing subsequently that this is subsumed by lenses and polynomial functors.
abstract_zh: 本论文报告了主动推理和贝叶斯大脑的组合描述的一些初步步骤。具体来说，我们使用当代应用范畴论的工具来提供用于近似推理的函数语义。为此，我们在“句法”方面定义了贝叶斯透镜的新概念，并表明贝叶斯更新根据组合透镜模式进行组合。使用贝叶斯透镜，并受到组合博弈论的启发，我们定义了统计博弈的纤维，并将统计推理的各种问题分类为相应的部分：相对熵的链式法则被形式化为严格的部分，而最大似然估计和自由能则给出宽松的部分。在此过程中，我们引入了“复制合成”的新概念。在“语义”方面，我们提出了一般开放动力系统（特别是：确定性、随机和随机；以及离散时间和连续时间）的新形式化，作为多项式函子的某些余代数，我们将其收集到幺半群 opindexed 类别中（或者，收集到广义多项式函子的多类别代数中）。我们使用这些opindexed类别来定义纤毛的幺半双类别：控制晶状体的动力系统，并为我们的函数语义提供目标。因此，我们构建了函子，它解释了自由能原理下预测编码神经回路的双向组成结构，从而为皮层中观察到的双向性提供了正式的数学基础。在此过程中，我们解释了如何使用多类别线性电路图的代数来组成速率编码神经电路，随后表明它包含在透镜和多项式函子中。

AI.tldr: 该论文旨在通过应用范畴论工具，为贝叶斯大脑的主动推理提供组合性数学框架，建立近似推理的函子语义。
AI.motivation: 现有贝叶斯大脑模型缺乏对预测编码神经回路双向组合结构的数学解释，需构建形式化框架以统一描述统计推断与动态系统。
AI.method: 定义贝叶斯镜头与统计博弈纤维化，利用多项式函子的余代数建模开放动态系统，并通过单子bicategory解释预测编码的双向性。
AI.result: 形式化相对熵链规则为严格截面，将最大似然估计与自由能表述为松截面，建立神经电路组合的线性电路图代数并纳入镜头框架。
AI.conclusion: 构建了动态系统控制镜头的数学结构，为皮层双向组合特性提供了范畴论基础，统一了统计推断与神经计算的组合原理。

In the process, we introduce a new notion of `copy-composition'. On the `semantic' side, we present a new formalization of general open dynamical systems (particularly: deterministic, stochastic, and random; and discrete- and continuous-time) as certain coalgebras of polynomial functors, which we show collect into monoidal opindexed categories (or, alternatively, into algebras for multicategories of generalized polynomial functors). We use these opindexed categories to define monoidal bicategories of cilia: dynamical systems which control lenses, and which supply the target for our functorial semantics. Accordingly, we construct functors which explain the bidirectional compositional structure of predictive coding neural circuits under the free energy principle, thereby giving a formal mathematical underpinning to the bidirectionality observed in the cortex. Along the way, we explain how to compose rate-coded neural circuits using an algebra for a multicategory of linear circuit diagrams, showing subsequently that this is subsumed by lenses and polynomial functors. 本论文报告了主动推理和贝叶斯大脑的组合描述的一些初步步骤。具体来说，我们使用当代应用范畴论的工具来提供用于近似推理的函数语义。为此，我们在“句法”方面定义了贝叶斯透镜的新概念，并表明贝叶斯更新根据组合透镜模式进行组合。使用贝叶斯透镜，并受到组合博弈论的启发，我们定义了统计博弈的纤维，并将统计推理的各种问题分类为相应的部分：相对熵的链式法则被形式化为严格的部分，而最大似然估计和自由能则给出宽松的部分。在此过程中，我们引入了“复制合成”的新概念。在“语义”方面，我们提出了一般开放动力系统（特别是：确定性、随机和随机；以及离散时间和连续时间）的新形式化，作为多项式函子的某些余代数，我们将其收集到幺半群 opindexed 类别中（或者，收集到广义多项式函子的多类别代数中）。我们使用这些opindexed类别来定义纤毛的幺半双类别：控制晶状体的动力系统，并为我们的函数语义提供目标。因此，我们构建了函子，它解释了自由能原理下预测编码神经回路的双向组成结构，从而为皮层中观察到的双向性提供了正式的数学基础。在此过程中，我们解释了如何使用多类别线性电路图的代数来组成速率编码神经电路，随后表明它包含在透镜和多项式函子中。 该论文旨在通过应用范畴论工具，为贝叶斯大脑的主动推理提供组合性数学框架，建立近似推理的函子语义。 Toby St Clere Smithe q-bio.NC,cs.AI,math.CT,math.DS,math.ST

authors_text: Zhimeng Jiang,Kaixiong Zhou,Mi Zhang,Rui Chen,Xia Hu,Soo-Hyun Choi
title: Adaptive Risk-Aware Bidding with Budget Constraint in Display Advertising
title_zh: 展示广告中具有预算约束的自适应风险意识出价
comment: Accepted by AI for Web Advertising Workshop, AAAI 2023
comments: Accepted by AI for Web Advertising Workshop, AAAI 2023
abstract: Real-time bidding (RTB) has become a major paradigm of display advertising. Each ad impression generated from a user visit is auctioned in real time, where demand-side platform (DSP) automatically provides bid price usually relying on the ad impression value estimation and the optimal bid price determination. However, the current bid strategy overlooks large randomness of the user behaviors (e.g., click) and the cost uncertainty caused by the auction competition. In this work, we explicitly factor in the uncertainty of estimated ad impression values and model the risk preference of a DSP under a specific state and market environment via a sequential decision process. Specifically, we propose a novel adaptive risk-aware bidding algorithm with budget constraint via reinforcement learning, which is the first to simultaneously consider estimation uncertainty and the dynamic risk tendency of a DSP. We theoretically unveil the intrinsic relation between the uncertainty and the risk tendency based on value at risk (VaR). Consequently, we propose two instantiations to model risk tendency, including an expert knowledge-based formulation embracing three essential properties and an adaptive learning method based on self-supervised reinforcement learning. We conduct extensive experiments on public datasets and show that the proposed framework outperforms state-of-the-art methods in practical settings.
summary: Real-time bidding (RTB) has become a major paradigm of display advertising. Each ad impression generated from a user visit is auctioned in real time, where demand-side platform (DSP) automatically provides bid price usually relying on the ad impression value estimation and the optimal bid price determination. However, the current bid strategy overlooks large randomness of the user behaviors (e.g., click) and the cost uncertainty caused by the auction competition. In this work, we explicitly factor in the uncertainty of estimated ad impression values and model the risk preference of a DSP under a specific state and market environment via a sequential decision process. Specifically, we propose a novel adaptive risk-aware bidding algorithm with budget constraint via reinforcement learning, which is the first to simultaneously consider estimation uncertainty and the dynamic risk tendency of a DSP. We theoretically unveil the intrinsic relation between the uncertainty and the risk tendency based on value at risk (VaR). Consequently, we propose two instantiations to model risk tendency, including an expert knowledge-based formulation embracing three essential properties and an adaptive learning method based on self-supervised reinforcement learning. We conduct extensive experiments on public datasets and show that the proposed framework outperforms state-of-the-art methods in practical settings.
abstract_zh: 实时竞价（RTB）已成为展示广告的主要范例。用户访问产生的每次广告展示都会被实时拍卖，其中需求方平台（DSP）通常依赖于广告展示价值估算和最佳投标价格确定来自动提供投标价格。然而，当前的竞价策略忽视了用户行为（例如点击）的较大随机性以及竞价竞争带来的成本不确定性。在这项工作中，我们明确考虑了估计广告印象值的不确定性，并通过顺序决策过程对特定状态和市场环境下 DSP 的风险偏好进行建模。具体来说，我们通过强化学习提出了一种具有预算约束的新型自适应风险感知投标算法，该算法是第一个同时考虑DSP的估计不确定性和动态风险趋势的算法。我们基于风险价值（VaR）从理论上揭示了不确定性与风险趋势之间的内在关系。因此，我们提出了两个实例来建模风险趋势，包括包含三个基本属性的基于专家知识的公式和基于自监督强化学习的自适应学习方法。我们对公共数据集进行了广泛的实验，并表明所提出的框架在实际环境中优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于强化学习的自适应风险感知竞价算法，用于在显示广告中考虑预算约束下的不确定性与风险偏好。
AI.motivation: 现有实时竞价策略未充分考虑用户行为随机性和拍卖竞争导致的成本不确定性，需通过风险感知模型优化DSP的竞价决策。
AI.method: 通过强化学习构建序贯决策过程，结合价值风险（VaR）理论，提出基于专家知识和自监督强化学习的两种风险偏好建模方法。
AI.result: 在公开数据集上的实验表明，该框架在实际场景中优于现有最先进的竞价方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效平衡了估计不确定性与动态风险偏好，为预算约束下的实时竞价提供了新思路。

authors_text: Andrew L. Orekhov,Elan Z. Ahronovich,Nabil Simaan
title: Lie Group Formulation and Sensitivity Analysis for Shape Sensing of Variable Curvature Continuum Robots with General String Encoder Routing
title_zh: 通用弦编码器路由变曲率连续体机器人形状传感的李群公式和灵敏度分析
comment: 17 pages, 17 figures. Accepted for publication in IEEE Transactions on Robotics
comments: 17 pages, 17 figures. Accepted for publication in IEEE Transactions on Robotics
abstract: This paper considers a combination of actuation tendons and measurement strings to achieve accurate shape sensing and direct kinematics of continuum robots. Assuming general string routing, a methodical Lie group formulation for the shape sensing of these robots is presented. The shape kinematics is expressed using arc-length-dependent curvature distributions parameterized by modal functions, and the Magnus expansion for Lie group integration is used to express the shape as a product of exponentials. The tendon and string length kinematic constraints are solved for the modal coefficients and the configuration space and body Jacobian are derived. The noise amplification index for the shape reconstruction problem is defined and used for optimizing the string/tendon routing paths, and a planar simulation study shows the minimal number of strings/tendons needed for accurate shape reconstruction. A torsionally stiff continuum segment is used for experimental evaluation, demonstrating mean (maximal) end-effector absolute position error of less than 2% (5%) of total length. Finally, a simulation study of a torsionally compliant segment demonstrates the approach for general deflections and string routings. We believe that the methods of this paper can benefit the design process, sensing and control of continuum and soft robots.
summary: This paper considers a combination of actuation tendons and measurement strings to achieve accurate shape sensing and direct kinematics of continuum robots. Assuming general string routing, a methodical Lie group formulation for the shape sensing of these robots is presented. The shape kinematics is expressed using arc-length-dependent curvature distributions parameterized by modal functions, and the Magnus expansion for Lie group integration is used to express the shape as a product of exponentials. The tendon and string length kinematic constraints are solved for the modal coefficients and the configuration space and body Jacobian are derived. The noise amplification index for the shape reconstruction problem is defined and used for optimizing the string/tendon routing paths, and a planar simulation study shows the minimal number of strings/tendons needed for accurate shape reconstruction. A torsionally stiff continuum segment is used for experimental evaluation, demonstrating mean (maximal) end-effector absolute position error of less than 2% (5%) of total length. Finally, a simulation study of a torsionally compliant segment demonstrates the approach for general deflections and string routings. We believe that the methods of this paper can benefit the design process, sensing and control of continuum and soft robots.
abstract_zh: 本文考虑将驱动腱和测量串相结合，以实现连续体机器人的精确形状传感和直接运动学。假设一般的字符串路由，提出了用于这些机器人形状传感的有条理的李群公式。形状运动学使用由模态函数参数化的与弧长相关的曲率分布来表示，并且使用李群积分的马格努斯展开来将形状表示为指数的乘积。求解了肌腱和弦长度运动学约束的模态系数，并导出了配置空间和体雅可比行列式。形状重建问题的噪声放大指数被定义并用于优化弦/肌腱布线路径，并且平面模拟研究显示了精确形状重建所需的最少弦/肌腱数量。使用扭转刚性连续体段进行实验评估，证明平均（最大）末端执行器绝对位置误差小于总长度的 2% (5%)。最后，扭转柔性段的模拟研究演示了一般偏转和弦布线的方法。我们相信本文的方法可以有益于连续体和软体机器人的设计过程、传感和控制。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合肌腱驱动和测量弦线的连续体机器人的形状感知方法，利用李群公式化和灵敏度分析实现精确的形状重建。
AI.motivation: 连续体机器人因柔性和复杂运动特性，形状感知面临挑战，需开发高精度且鲁棒的建模与传感方法。
AI.method: 基于李群理论，采用弧长依赖的曲率分布参数化形状动力学，结合Magnus展开进行李群积分，并通过优化弦线/肌腱路径降低噪声放大效应。
AI.result: 平面仿真验证了最少弦线/肌腱数量需求，实验显示末端执行器位置误差低于总长度的2%（最大5%），并适用于一般偏转和路由场景。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为连续体及软体机器人的设计、传感与控制提供了理论支持和优化路径。

authors_text: Ana Stanojevic,Stanisław Woźniak,Guillaume Bellec,Giovanni Cherubini,Angeliki Pantazi,Wulfram Gerstner
title: An Exact Mapping From ReLU Networks to Spiking Neural Networks
title_zh: 从 ReLU 网络到尖峰神经网络的精确映射
abstract: Deep spiking neural networks (SNNs) offer the promise of low-power artificial intelligence. However, training deep SNNs from scratch or converting deep artificial neural networks to SNNs without loss of performance has been a challenge. Here we propose an exact mapping from a network with Rectified Linear Units (ReLUs) to an SNN that fires exactly one spike per neuron. For our constructive proof, we assume that an arbitrary multi-layer ReLU network with or without convolutional layers, batch normalization and max pooling layers was trained to high performance on some training set. Furthermore, we assume that we have access to a representative example of input data used during training and to the exact parameters (weights and biases) of the trained ReLU network. The mapping from deep ReLU networks to SNNs causes zero percent drop in accuracy on CIFAR10, CIFAR100 and the ImageNet-like data sets Places365 and PASS. More generally our work shows that an arbitrary deep ReLU network can be replaced by an energy-efficient single-spike neural network without any loss of performance.
summary: Deep spiking neural networks (SNNs) offer the promise of low-power artificial intelligence. However, training deep SNNs from scratch or converting deep artificial neural networks to SNNs without loss of performance has been a challenge. Here we propose an exact mapping from a network with Rectified Linear Units (ReLUs) to an SNN that fires exactly one spike per neuron. For our constructive proof, we assume that an arbitrary multi-layer ReLU network with or without convolutional layers, batch normalization and max pooling layers was trained to high performance on some training set. Furthermore, we assume that we have access to a representative example of input data used during training and to the exact parameters (weights and biases) of the trained ReLU network. The mapping from deep ReLU networks to SNNs causes zero percent drop in accuracy on CIFAR10, CIFAR100 and the ImageNet-like data sets Places365 and PASS. More generally our work shows that an arbitrary deep ReLU network can be replaced by an energy-efficient single-spike neural network without any loss of performance.
abstract_zh: 深度尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 为低功耗人工智能带来了希望。然而，从头开始训练深度 SNN 或在不损失性能的情况下将深度人工神经网络转换为 SNN 一直是一个挑战。在这里，我们提出了一种从具有修正线性单元 (ReLU) 的网络到每个神经元仅触发一个尖峰的 SNN 的精确映射。对于我们的建设性证明，我们假设带有或不带有卷积层、批量归一化和最大池化层的任意多层 ReLU 网络在某些训练集上被训练为高性能。此外，我们假设我们可以访问训练期间使用的输入数据的代表性示例以及训练后的 ReLU 网络的确切参数（权重和偏差）。从深度 ReLU 网络到 SNN 的映射导致 CI​​FAR10、CIFAR100 以及类似 ImageNet 的数据集 Places365 和 PASS 的准确率下降为零。更一般地说，我们的工作表明，任意深度 ReLU 网络可以被节能的单尖峰神经网络取代，而不会损失任何性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种将ReLU网络精确映射到脉冲神经网络（SNN）的方法，实现无性能损失的转换。
AI.motivation: 深度脉冲神经网络（SNN）具有低功耗优势，但训练或转换深度人工神经网络到SNN时存在性能损失的挑战。
AI.method: 通过构造性证明，假设已训练好的ReLU网络参数和代表性输入数据，建立每神经元仅触发一次脉冲的精确映射规则。
AI.result: 在CIFAR10、CIFAR100、Places365和PASS数据集上实现0%精度下降，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 任意深度ReLU网络可被能效更高的单脉冲SNN替代，且无性能损失，为低功耗AI提供新途径。

authors_text: Sudeep Pasricha,Marilyn Wolf
title: Ethical Design of Computers: From Semiconductors to IoT and Artificial Intelligence
title_zh: 计算机的道德设计：从半导体到物联网和人工智能
abstract: Computing systems are tightly integrated today into our professional, social, and private lives. An important consequence of this growing ubiquity of computing is that it can have significant ethical implications of which computing professionals should take account. In most real-world scenarios, it is not immediately obvious how particular technical choices during the design and use of computing systems could be viewed from an ethical perspective. This article provides a perspective on the ethical challenges within semiconductor chip design, IoT applications, and the increasing use of artificial intelligence in the design processes, tools, and hardware-software stacks of these systems.
summary: Computing systems are tightly integrated today into our professional, social, and private lives. An important consequence of this growing ubiquity of computing is that it can have significant ethical implications of which computing professionals should take account. In most real-world scenarios, it is not immediately obvious how particular technical choices during the design and use of computing systems could be viewed from an ethical perspective. This article provides a perspective on the ethical challenges within semiconductor chip design, IoT applications, and the increasing use of artificial intelligence in the design processes, tools, and hardware-software stacks of these systems.
abstract_zh: 如今，计算系统已紧密集成到我们的职业、社交和私人生活中。计算日益普及的一个重要后果是，它可能会产生重大的道德影响，计算专业人员应该考虑到这一点。在大多数现实场景中，如何从道德角度看待计算系统设计和使用过程中的特定技术选择并不是显而易见的。本文提供了有关半导体芯片设计、物联网应用以及这些系统的设计流程、工具和软硬件堆栈中人工智能的日益使用的道德挑战的观点。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了从半导体到物联网和人工智能的计算机设计中的伦理挑战。
AI.motivation: 随着计算系统在生活各领域的普及，其设计中的技术选择可能带来伦理影响，但这些影响往往不直观，需引起专业人员重视。
AI.method: 通过分析半导体芯片设计、物联网应用及人工智能在系统设计中的角色，结合伦理视角探讨技术选择的潜在影响。
AI.result: 识别了半导体制造的资源消耗、物联网数据隐私风险及AI算法偏见等伦理问题，并提出需在设计阶段纳入伦理考量。
AI.conclusion: 计算机设计需融入伦理原则，以应对技术发展带来的社会影响，确保技术服务于人类福祉。

authors_text: Dominik Narnhofer,Andreas Habring,Martin Holler,Thomas Pock
title: Posterior-Variance-Based Error Quantification for Inverse Problems in Imaging
title_zh: 基于后验方差的成像反问题误差量化
abstract: In this work, a method for obtaining pixel-wise error bounds in Bayesian regularization of inverse imaging problems is introduced. The proposed method employs estimates of the posterior variance together with techniques from conformal prediction in order to obtain coverage guarantees for the error bounds, without making any assumption on the underlying data distribution. It is generally applicable to Bayesian regularization approaches, independent, e.g., of the concrete choice of the prior. Furthermore, the coverage guarantees can also be obtained in case only approximate sampling from the posterior is possible. With this in particular, the proposed framework is able to incorporate any learned prior in a black-box manner. Guaranteed coverage without assumptions on the underlying distributions is only achievable since the magnitude of the error bounds is, in general, unknown in advance. Nevertheless, experiments with multiple regularization approaches presented in the paper confirm that in practice, the obtained error bounds are rather tight. For realizing the numerical experiments, also a novel primal-dual Langevin algorithm for sampling from non-smooth distributions is introduced in this work.
summary: In this work, a method for obtaining pixel-wise error bounds in Bayesian regularization of inverse imaging problems is introduced. The proposed method employs estimates of the posterior variance together with techniques from conformal prediction in order to obtain coverage guarantees for the error bounds, without making any assumption on the underlying data distribution. It is generally applicable to Bayesian regularization approaches, independent, e.g., of the concrete choice of the prior. Furthermore, the coverage guarantees can also be obtained in case only approximate sampling from the posterior is possible. With this in particular, the proposed framework is able to incorporate any learned prior in a black-box manner. Guaranteed coverage without assumptions on the underlying distributions is only achievable since the magnitude of the error bounds is, in general, unknown in advance. Nevertheless, experiments with multiple regularization approaches presented in the paper confirm that in practice, the obtained error bounds are rather tight. For realizing the numerical experiments, also a novel primal-dual Langevin algorithm for sampling from non-smooth distributions is introduced in this work.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，介绍了一种在逆成像问题的贝叶斯正则化中获得像素级误差界限的方法。所提出的方法采用后验方差的估计以及保形预测的技术，以获得误差范围的覆盖保证，而不对底层数据分布做出任何假设。它通常适用于贝叶斯正则化方法，例如独立于先验的具体选择。此外，在仅可能从后验中进行近似采样的情况下，也可以获得覆盖保证。特别是这样，所提出的框架能够以黑盒方式合并任何学到的先验知识。只有在不对基础分布进行假设的情况下才能实现保证覆盖，因为误差范围的大小通常是预先未知的。然而，本文中提出的多种正则化方法的实验证实，在实践中，获得的误差范围相当严格。为了实现数值实验，本文还引入了一种新颖的原对偶 Langevin 算法，用于从非平滑分布中采样。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于后验方差的误差量化方法，用于图像逆问题的贝叶斯正则化，无需假设数据分布即可提供像素级误差界。
AI.motivation: 逆问题中的误差量化通常依赖数据分布假设，而实际应用中这些假设可能不成立。现有方法难以处理近似后验采样或黑盒先验模型，需开发通用且无需分布假设的误差界方法。
AI.method: 结合后验方差估计与符合预测技术，利用后验采样生成误差界，并引入新型对偶朗格文算法处理非光滑分布采样，支持任意黑盒先验。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在多种正则化框架下生成的误差界具有紧致性，且无需分布假设即可保证覆盖率。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为逆问题提供了无需数据分布假设的可靠误差量化方案，适用于任意贝叶斯正则化方法和学习先验模型。

search_text: Posterior-Variance-Based Error Quantification for Inverse Problems in Imaging 基于后验方差的成像反问题误差量化 In this work, a method for obtaining pixel-wise error bounds in Bayesian regularization of inverse imaging problems is introduced. The proposed method employs estimates of the posterior variance together with techniques from conformal prediction in order to obtain coverage guarantees for the error bounds, without making any assumption on the underlying data distribution. It is generally applicable to Bayesian regularization approaches, independent, e.g., of the concrete choice of the prior. Furthermore, the coverage guarantees can also be obtained in case only approximate sampling from the posterior is possible. With this in particular, the proposed framework is able to incorporate any learned prior in a black-box manner. Guaranteed coverage without assumptions on the underlying distributions is only achievable since the magnitude of the error bounds is, in general, unknown in advance. Nevertheless, experiments with multiple regularization approaches presented in the paper confirm that in practice, the obtained error bounds are rather tight. For realizing the numerical experiments, also a novel primal-dual Langevin algorithm for sampling from non-smooth distributions is introduced in this work. 在这项工作中，介绍了一种在逆成像问题的贝叶斯正则化中获得像素级误差界限的方法。所提出的方法采用后验方差的估计以及保形预测的技术，以获得误差范围的覆盖保证，而不对底层数据分布做出任何假设。它通常适用于贝叶斯正则化方法，例如独立于先验的具体选择。此外，在仅可能从后验中进行近似采样的情况下，也可以获得覆盖保证。特别是这样，所提出的框架能够以黑盒方式合并任何学到的先验知识。只有在不对基础分布进行假设的情况下才能实现保证覆盖，因为误差范围的大小通常是预先未知的。然而，本文中提出的多种正则化方法的实验证实，在实践中，获得的误差范围相当严格。为了实现数值实验，本文还引入了一种新颖的原对偶 Langevin 算法，用于从非平滑分布中采样。 本文提出一种基于后验方差的误差量化方法，用于图像逆问题的贝叶斯正则化，无需假设数据分布即可提供像素级误差界。 Dominik Narnhofer,Andreas Habring,Martin Holler,Thomas Pock cs.CV,math.PR

authors_text: John McDonough,Andrzej Herczyński
title: Fractal Patterns in Music
title_zh: 音乐中的分形图案
comment: 27 pages, 12 figures
comments: 27 pages, 12 figures
abstract: If our aesthetic preferences are affected by fractal geometry of nature, scaling regularities would be expected to appear in all art forms, including music. While a variety of statistical tools have been proposed to analyze time series in sound, no consensus has as yet emerged regarding the most meaningful measure of complexity in music, or how to discern fractal patterns in compositions in the first place. Here we offer a new approach based on self-similarity of the melodic lines recurring at various temporal scales. In contrast to the statistical analyses advanced in recent literature, the proposed method does not depend on averaging within time-windows and is distinctively local. The corresponding definition of the fractal dimension is based on the temporal scaling hierarchy and depends on the tonal contours of the musical motifs. The new concepts are tested on musical 'renditions' of the Cantor Set and Koch Curve, and then applied to a number of carefully selected masterful compositions spanning five centuries of music making.
summary: If our aesthetic preferences are affected by fractal geometry of nature, scaling regularities would be expected to appear in all art forms, including music. While a variety of statistical tools have been proposed to analyze time series in sound, no consensus has as yet emerged regarding the most meaningful measure of complexity in music, or how to discern fractal patterns in compositions in the first place. Here we offer a new approach based on self-similarity of the melodic lines recurring at various temporal scales. In contrast to the statistical analyses advanced in recent literature, the proposed method does not depend on averaging within time-windows and is distinctively local. The corresponding definition of the fractal dimension is based on the temporal scaling hierarchy and depends on the tonal contours of the musical motifs. The new concepts are tested on musical 'renditions' of the Cantor Set and Koch Curve, and then applied to a number of carefully selected masterful compositions spanning five centuries of music making.
abstract_zh: 如果我们的审美偏好受到自然分形几何的影响，那么尺度规律预计会出现在包括音乐在内的所有艺术形式中。尽管已经提出了各种统计工具来分析声音的时间序列，但对于音乐复杂性的最有意义的衡量标准，或者如何首先辨别作品中的分形模式，尚未达成共识。在这里，我们提供了一种基于在不同时间尺度上重复出现的旋律线的自相似性的新方法。与最近文献中提出的统计分析相反，所提出的方法不依赖于时间窗口内的平均，并且具有明显的局部性。分形维数的相应定义基于时间尺度层次结构并且取决于音乐主题的音调轮廓。新概念在康托集和科赫曲线的音乐“演绎”上进行了测试，然后应用于跨越五个世纪音乐创作的一些精心挑选的精湛作品。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于旋律线自相似性的新方法，用于检测音乐中的分形模式。
AI.motivation: 现有音乐复杂度测量方法缺乏共识，且难以识别分形模式，需开发不依赖时间窗口平均的局部分析方法。
AI.method: 通过旋律线在不同时间尺度的自相似性定义分形维度，结合音调轮廓分析，并在康托尔集和科赫曲线音乐改编中验证方法。
AI.result: 成功识别出构造性分形音乐作品及多世纪经典音乐中的分形模式，证明方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该局部化方法为音乐分形结构分析提供新视角，揭示自然分形与审美偏好的潜在联系。

authors_text: L. Brigato,B. Barz,L. Iocchi,J. Denzler
title: Image Classification with Small Datasets: Overview and Benchmark
title_zh: 小数据集图像分类：概述和基准
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2108.13122
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2108.13122
abstract: Image classification with small datasets has been an active research area in the recent past. However, as research in this scope is still in its infancy, two key ingredients are missing for ensuring reliable and truthful progress: a systematic and extensive overview of the state of the art, and a common benchmark to allow for objective comparisons between published methods. This article addresses both issues. First, we systematically organize and connect past studies to consolidate a community that is currently fragmented and scattered. Second, we propose a common benchmark that allows for an objective comparison of approaches. It consists of five datasets spanning various domains (e.g., natural images, medical imagery, satellite data) and data types (RGB, grayscale, multispectral). We use this benchmark to re-evaluate the standard cross-entropy baseline and ten existing methods published between 2017 and 2021 at renowned venues. Surprisingly, we find that thorough hyper-parameter tuning on held-out validation data results in a highly competitive baseline and highlights a stunted growth of performance over the years. Indeed, only a single specialized method dating back to 2019 clearly wins our benchmark and outperforms the baseline classifier.
summary: Image classification with small datasets has been an active research area in the recent past. However, as research in this scope is still in its infancy, two key ingredients are missing for ensuring reliable and truthful progress: a systematic and extensive overview of the state of the art, and a common benchmark to allow for objective comparisons between published methods. This article addresses both issues. First, we systematically organize and connect past studies to consolidate a community that is currently fragmented and scattered. Second, we propose a common benchmark that allows for an objective comparison of approaches. It consists of five datasets spanning various domains (e.g., natural images, medical imagery, satellite data) and data types (RGB, grayscale, multispectral). We use this benchmark to re-evaluate the standard cross-entropy baseline and ten existing methods published between 2017 and 2021 at renowned venues. Surprisingly, we find that thorough hyper-parameter tuning on held-out validation data results in a highly competitive baseline and highlights a stunted growth of performance over the years. Indeed, only a single specialized method dating back to 2019 clearly wins our benchmark and outperforms the baseline classifier.
abstract_zh: 近年来，小数据集的图像分类一直是一个活跃的研究领域。然而，由于这一领域的研究仍处于起步阶段，因此缺乏确保可靠和真实进展的两个关键要素：对现有技术的系统和广泛的概述，以及允许对已发表的方法进行客观比较的共同基准。本文解决了这两个问题。首先，我们系统地组织和连接过去的研究，以巩固目前支离破碎的社区。其次，我们提出了一个通用基准，可以对方法进行客观比较。它由跨越不同领域（例如自然图像、医学图像、卫星数据）和数据类型（RGB、灰度、多光谱）的五个数据集组成。我们使用此基准重新评估标准交叉熵基线和 2017 年至 2021 年间在知名场所发布的十种现有方法。令人惊讶的是，我们发现对保留的验证数据进行彻底的超参数调整会产生极具竞争力的基线，并凸显出多年来性能增长缓慢。事实上，只有一种可追溯到 2019 年的专门方法明显赢得了我们的基准测试并优于基线分类器。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过系统综述和构建通用基准，解决小数据集图像分类领域缺乏系统性总结和客观比较工具的问题。
AI.motivation: 当前小数据集图像分类研究碎片化，缺乏统一基准导致方法比较主观，阻碍领域可信发展。
AI.method: 1) 系统整理并关联现有研究；2) 构建包含5个跨领域数据集（自然图像/医学影像/卫星数据等）的通用基准，涵盖RGB/灰度/多光谱等数据类型；3) 重新评估交叉熵基线及2017-2021年间10种方法。
AI.result: 经验证，基于验证集精细调参的交叉熵基线表现优异，近年方法进步有限；仅2019年某特定方法在基准测试中显著超越基线。
AI.conclusion: 小数据集分类领域需更有效的算法创新，当前方法性能提升停滞，通用基准的建立为未来研究提供重要参考。

Indeed, only a single specialized method dating back to 2019 clearly wins our benchmark and outperforms the baseline classifier. 近年来，小数据集的图像分类一直是一个活跃的研究领域。然而，由于这一领域的研究仍处于起步阶段，因此缺乏确保可靠和真实进展的两个关键要素：对现有技术的系统和广泛的概述，以及允许对已发表的方法进行客观比较的共同基准。本文解决了这两个问题。首先，我们系统地组织和连接过去的研究，以巩固目前支离破碎的社区。其次，我们提出了一个通用基准，可以对方法进行客观比较。它由跨越不同领域（例如自然图像、医学图像、卫星数据）和数据类型（RGB、灰度、多光谱）的五个数据集组成。我们使用此基准重新评估标准交叉熵基线和 2017 年至 2021 年间在知名场所发布的十种现有方法。令人惊讶的是，我们发现对保留的验证数据进行彻底的超参数调整会产生极具竞争力的基线，并凸显出多年来性能增长缓慢。事实上，只有一种可追溯到 2019 年的专门方法明显赢得了我们的基准测试并优于基线分类器。 本文旨在通过系统综述和构建通用基准，解决小数据集图像分类领域缺乏系统性总结和客观比较工具的问题。 L. Brigato,B. Barz,L. Iocchi,J. Denzler cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.NE

authors_text: Ángela López-Cardona,Guillermo Bernárdez,Pere Barlet-Ros,Albert Cabellos-Aparicio
title: Proximal Policy Optimization with Graph Neural Networks for Optimal Power Flow
title_zh: 使用图神经网络进行近端策略优化以实现最佳潮流
abstract: Optimal Power Flow (OPF) is a very traditional research area within the power systems field that seeks for the optimal operation point of electric power plants, and which needs to be solved every few minutes in real-world scenarios. However, due to the nonconvexities that arise in power generation systems, there is not yet a fast, robust solution technique for the full Alternating Current Optimal Power Flow (ACOPF). In the last decades, power grids have evolved into a typical dynamic, non-linear and large-scale control system, known as the power system, so searching for better and faster ACOPF solutions is becoming crucial. Appearance of Graph Neural Networks (GNN) has allowed the natural use of Machine Learning (ML) algorithms on graph data, such as power networks. On the other hand, Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) is known for its powerful capability to solve complex decision-making problems. Although solutions that use these two methods separately are beginning to appear in the literature, none has yet combined the advantages of both. We propose a novel architecture based on the Proximal Policy Optimization algorithm with Graph Neural Networks to solve the Optimal Power Flow. The objective is to design an architecture that learns how to solve the optimization problem and that is at the same time able to generalize to unseen scenarios. We compare our solution with the DCOPF in terms of cost after having trained our DRL agent on IEEE 30 bus system and then computing the OPF on that base network with topology changes
summary: Optimal Power Flow (OPF) is a very traditional research area within the power systems field that seeks for the optimal operation point of electric power plants, and which needs to be solved every few minutes in real-world scenarios. However, due to the nonconvexities that arise in power generation systems, there is not yet a fast, robust solution technique for the full Alternating Current Optimal Power Flow (ACOPF). In the last decades, power grids have evolved into a typical dynamic, non-linear and large-scale control system, known as the power system, so searching for better and faster ACOPF solutions is becoming crucial. Appearance of Graph Neural Networks (GNN) has allowed the natural use of Machine Learning (ML) algorithms on graph data, such as power networks. On the other hand, Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) is known for its powerful capability to solve complex decision-making problems. Although solutions that use these two methods separately are beginning to appear in the literature, none has yet combined the advantages of both. We propose a novel architecture based on the Proximal Policy Optimization algorithm with Graph Neural Networks to solve the Optimal Power Flow. The objective is to design an architecture that learns how to solve the optimization problem and that is at the same time able to generalize to unseen scenarios. We compare our solution with the DCOPF in terms of cost after having trained our DRL agent on IEEE 30 bus system and then computing the OPF on that base network with topology changes
abstract_zh: 最优潮流（OPF）是电力系统领域中一个非常传统的研究领域，旨在寻找发电厂的最佳运行点，并且需要在现实场景中每隔几分钟求解一次。然而，由于发电系统中出现的非凸性，目前还没有一种快速、稳健的解决方案技术来实现完整的交流最优功率流 (ACOPF)。近几十年来，电网已发展成为典型的动态、非线性、大规模控制系统，即电力系统，因此寻找更好、更快的ACOPF解决方案变得至关重要。图神经网络（GNN）的出现使得机器学习（ML）算法可以自然地应用于图数据（例如电力网络）。另一方面，深度强化学习（DRL）以其解决复杂决策问题的强大能力而闻名。尽管文献中开始出现分别使用这两种方法的解决方案，但尚未结合两者的优点。我们提出了一种基于近端策略优化算法和图神经网络的新颖架构来解决最优潮流。目标是设计一种架构，能够学习如何解决优化问题，同时能够推广到未见过的场景。在 IEEE 30 总线系统上训练我们的 DRL 代理，然后在拓扑变化的基础网络上计算 OPF 后，我们将我们的解决方案与 DCOPF 在成本方面进行比较

AI.tldr: 本文提出结合近端策略优化算法与图神经网络，用于求解最优潮流问题。
AI.motivation: 传统最优潮流（OPF）方法在处理非凸性问题时效率低下，而图神经网络（GNN）和深度强化学习（DRL）分别具备处理图数据和复杂决策的优势，但尚未有研究将其结合。
AI.method: 设计基于近端策略优化（PPO）算法与图神经网络的混合架构，训练DRL代理在IEEE 30节点系统上学习求解OPF，并在拓扑变化的网络中验证泛化能力。
AI.result: 实验表明，所提方法在成本指标上优于直流最优潮流（DCOPF），且能适应网络拓扑变化。
AI.conclusion: 融合GNN与PPO的架构有效解决了ACOPF问题，为复杂电力系统提供了高效且通用的优化方案。

authors_text: Avinash Prabu,Nitya Ranjan,Lingxi Li,Renran Tian,Stanley Chien,Yaobin Chen,Rini Sherony
title: SceNDD: A Scenario-based Naturalistic Driving Dataset
title_zh: SceNDD：基于场景的自然驾驶数据集
comment: Conference: 2022 IEEE 25th International Conference on Intelligent Transportation Systems (ITSC). Link: https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/document/9921953
comments: Conference: 2022 IEEE 25th International Conference on Intelligent Transportation Systems (ITSC). Link: https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/document/9921953
abstract: In this paper, we propose SceNDD: a scenario-based naturalistic driving dataset that is built upon data collected from an instrumented vehicle in downtown Indianapolis. The data collection was completed in 68 driving sessions with different drivers, where each session lasted about 20--40 minutes. The main goal of creating this dataset is to provide the research community with real driving scenarios that have diverse trajectories and driving behaviors. The dataset contains ego-vehicle's waypoints, velocity, yaw angle, as well as non-ego actor's waypoints, velocity, yaw angle, entry-time, and exit-time. Certain flexibility is provided to users so that actors, sensors, lanes, roads, and obstacles can be added to the existing scenarios. We used a Joint Probabilistic Data Association (JPDA) tracker to detect non-ego vehicles on the road. We present some preliminary results of the proposed dataset and a few applications associated with it. The complete dataset is expected to be released by early 2023.
summary: In this paper, we propose SceNDD: a scenario-based naturalistic driving dataset that is built upon data collected from an instrumented vehicle in downtown Indianapolis. The data collection was completed in 68 driving sessions with different drivers, where each session lasted about 20--40 minutes. The main goal of creating this dataset is to provide the research community with real driving scenarios that have diverse trajectories and driving behaviors. The dataset contains ego-vehicle's waypoints, velocity, yaw angle, as well as non-ego actor's waypoints, velocity, yaw angle, entry-time, and exit-time. Certain flexibility is provided to users so that actors, sensors, lanes, roads, and obstacles can be added to the existing scenarios. We used a Joint Probabilistic Data Association (JPDA) tracker to detect non-ego vehicles on the road. We present some preliminary results of the proposed dataset and a few applications associated with it. The complete dataset is expected to be released by early 2023.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了 SceNDD：基于场景的自然驾驶数据集，该数据集基于从印第安纳波利斯市中心的仪表车辆收集的数据。数据收集是在不同驾驶员的 68 次驾驶会话中完成的，每次会话持续约 20--40 分钟。创建该数据集的主要目标是为研究界提供具有不同轨迹和驾驶行为的真实驾驶场景。该数据集包含自我车辆的航路点、速度、偏航角，以及非自我参与者的航路点、速度、偏航角、进入时间和退出时间。为用户提供了一定的灵活性，以便可以将参与者、传感器、车道、道路和障碍物添加到现有场景中。我们使用联合概率数据协会 (JPDA) 跟踪器来检测道路上的非自我车辆。我们展示了所提出的数据集的一些初步结果以及与之相关的一些应用程序。完整的数据集预计将于 2023 年初发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SceNDD数据集，基于印第安纳波利斯市区仪器车辆采集的68次驾驶会话数据，包含车辆轨迹、速度、角度等多维度信息，旨在为研究社区提供多样化的自然驾驶场景。
AI.motivation: 现有数据集缺乏真实场景中多样化的驾驶行为和轨迹数据，限制了自动驾驶和交通行为研究的发展，因此需要构建包含丰富场景信息的自然驾驶数据集。
AI.method: 通过仪器车辆采集真实驾驶数据，采用联合概率数据关联（JPDA）算法追踪非自车目标，并允许用户自定义添加交通参与者、传感器、道路元素等以扩展场景灵活性。
AI.result: 展示了数据集的初步应用案例，包括轨迹预测和行为分析，完整数据集计划于2023年初公开发布。
AI.conclusion: SceNDD数据集为自动驾驶算法验证、交通行为研究提供了高质量的真实场景数据基础，其灵活性可支持多种科研需求。

The complete dataset is expected to be released by early 2023. 在本文中，我们提出了 SceNDD：基于场景的自然驾驶数据集，该数据集基于从印第安纳波利斯市中心的仪表车辆收集的数据。数据收集是在不同驾驶员的 68 次驾驶会话中完成的，每次会话持续约 20--40 分钟。创建该数据集的主要目标是为研究界提供具有不同轨迹和驾驶行为的真实驾驶场景。该数据集包含自我车辆的航路点、速度、偏航角，以及非自我参与者的航路点、速度、偏航角、进入时间和退出时间。为用户提供了一定的灵活性，以便可以将参与者、传感器、车道、道路和障碍物添加到现有场景中。我们使用联合概率数据协会 (JPDA) 跟踪器来检测道路上的非自我车辆。我们展示了所提出的数据集的一些初步结果以及与之相关的一些应用程序。完整的数据集预计将于 2023 年初发布。 本文提出SceNDD数据集，基于印第安纳波利斯市区仪器车辆采集的68次驾驶会话数据，包含车辆轨迹、速度、角度等多维度信息，旨在为研究社区提供多样化的自然驾驶场景。 Avinash Prabu,Nitya Ranjan,Lingxi Li,Renran Tian,Stanley Chien,Yaobin Chen,Rini Sherony cs.RO,eess.SY

authors_text: Wei Ji,Yechi Ma,Guangzhang Cui,Xiaotian Qin,Wei Hua
title: Dynamic Speed Guidance for CAV Ramp Merging in Non-Cooperative Environment: An On-Site Experiment
title_zh: 非合作环境下 CAV 匝道合并的动态速度引导：现场实验
comment: This work has been submitted to IFAC for possible publication
comments: This work has been submitted to IFAC for possible publication
abstract: Ramp merging is a typical application of cooperative intelligent transportation system (C-ITS). Vehicle trajectories perceived by roadside sensors are importation complement to the limited visual field of on-board perception. Vehicle tracking and trajectory denoising algorithm is proposed in this paper to take full advantage of roadside cameras for vehicle trajectory and speed profile estimation. Dynamic speed guidance algorithm is proposed to help on-ramp vehicles to merge into mainline smoothly, even in non-cooperative environment where mainline vehicles are not expected to slow down to accommodate on-ramp vehicles. On-site experiments were taken out in a merging area of Hangzhou Belt Highway to testify our prototype system, and simulation analysis shows our proposed algorithm can achieve significant fuel savings during the ramp merging process.
summary: Ramp merging is a typical application of cooperative intelligent transportation system (C-ITS). Vehicle trajectories perceived by roadside sensors are importation complement to the limited visual field of on-board perception. Vehicle tracking and trajectory denoising algorithm is proposed in this paper to take full advantage of roadside cameras for vehicle trajectory and speed profile estimation. Dynamic speed guidance algorithm is proposed to help on-ramp vehicles to merge into mainline smoothly, even in non-cooperative environment where mainline vehicles are not expected to slow down to accommodate on-ramp vehicles. On-site experiments were taken out in a merging area of Hangzhou Belt Highway to testify our prototype system, and simulation analysis shows our proposed algorithm can achieve significant fuel savings during the ramp merging process.
abstract_zh: 匝道合流是协同智能交通系统（C-ITS）的典型应用。路边传感器感知的车辆轨迹是对车载感知有限视野的重要补充。本文提出了车辆跟踪和轨迹去噪算法，以充分利用路边摄像头进行车辆轨迹和速度剖面估计。提出动态速度引导算法来帮助入口匝道车辆顺利并入主线，即使在主线车辆不会减速以适应入口匝道车辆的非合作环境下也是如此。在杭州绕城高速合流区进行了现场实验来验证我们的原型系统，仿真分析表明我们提出的算法可以在匝道合流过程中实现显着的燃油节省。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种动态速度引导算法，用于在非合作环境中通过路边传感器数据辅助自动驾驶车辆完成匝道合并，并通过现场实验验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 传统车载感知存在视野限制，且在非合作环境下主路车辆不主动减速，导致匝道车辆合并困难，需借助路边传感器数据提升合并效率与燃油经济性。
AI.method: 设计车辆跟踪与轨迹去噪算法以融合路边摄像头数据，结合动态速度引导策略为匝道车辆提供实时速度建议，确保在无主路车辆协作时的平稳合并。
AI.result: 杭州绕城高速现场实验及仿真表明，该算法在匝道合并过程中实现了显著的燃油消耗降低，验证了动态速度引导的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 所提系统可有效提升非合作环境下匝道合并的安全性与燃油效率，为合作式智能交通系统（C-ITS）提供可行的技术方案。

authors_text: Ha Manh Bui,Iliana Maifeld-Carucci
title: Benchmark for Uncertainty & Robustness in Self-Supervised Learning
title_zh: 自我监督学习的不确定性和稳健性基准
comment: 15 pages, 3 tables, 6 figures, the class project in CSCI 601.771: Self-supervised Statistical Models - Johns Hopkins University - Fall 2022
comments: 15 pages, 3 tables, 6 figures, the class project in CSCI 601.771: Self-supervised Statistical Models - Johns Hopkins University - Fall 2022
abstract: Self-Supervised Learning (SSL) is crucial for real-world applications, especially in data-hungry domains such as healthcare and self-driving cars. In addition to a lack of labeled data, these applications also suffer from distributional shifts. Therefore, an SSL method should provide robust generalization and uncertainty estimation in the test dataset to be considered a reliable model in such high-stakes domains. However, existing approaches often focus on generalization, without evaluating the model's uncertainty. The ability to compare SSL techniques for improving these estimates is therefore critical for research on the reliability of self-supervision models. In this paper, we explore variants of SSL methods, including Jigsaw Puzzles, Context, Rotation, Geometric Transformations Prediction for vision, as well as BERT and GPT for language tasks. We train SSL in auxiliary learning for vision and pre-training for language model, then evaluate the generalization (in-out classification accuracy) and uncertainty (expected calibration error) across different distribution covariate shift datasets, including MNIST-C, CIFAR-10-C, CIFAR-10.1, and MNLI. Our goal is to create a benchmark with outputs from experiments, providing a starting point for new SSL methods in Reliable Machine Learning. All source code to reproduce results is available at https://github.com/hamanhbui/reliable_ssl_baselines.

In this paper, we explore variants of SSL methods, including Jigsaw Puzzles, Context, Rotation, Geometric Transformations Prediction for vision, as well as BERT and GPT for language tasks. We train SSL in auxiliary learning for vision and pre-training for language model, then evaluate the generalization (in-out classification accuracy) and uncertainty (expected calibration error) across different distribution covariate shift datasets, including MNIST-C, CIFAR-10-C, CIFAR-10.1, and MNLI. Our goal is to create a benchmark with outputs from experiments, providing a starting point for new SSL methods in Reliable Machine Learning.
