abstract_zh: 自监督学习 (SSL) 对于现实世界的应用至关重要，尤其是在医疗保健和自动驾驶汽车等数据密集型领域。除了缺乏标记数据之外，这些应用程序还遭受分布变化的影响。因此，SSL 方法应该在测试数据集中提供强大的泛化和不确定性估计，才能被认为是此类高风险领域中的可靠模型。然而，现有的方法通常侧重于泛化，而不评估模型的不确定性。因此，比较 SSL 技术以改进这些估计的能力对于研究自我监督模型的可靠性至关重要。在本文中，我们探索了 SSL 方法的变体，包括拼图、上下文、旋转、视觉几何变换预测，以及语言任务的 BERT 和 GPT。我们在视觉辅助学习和语言模型预训练中训练 SSL，然后评估不同分布协变量移位数据集（包括 MNIST-C、CIFAR-10-C、CIFAR-10.1 和 MNLI）的泛化（输入输出分类精度）和不确定性（预期校准误差）。我们的目标是利用实验输出创建基准，为可靠机器学习中的新 SSL 方法提供起点。重现结果的所有源代码均可在 https://github.com/hamanhbui/reliable_ssl_baselines 上找到。

AI.tldr: 该论文旨在建立一个评估自监督学习（SSL）模型在不确定性估计和分布偏移下的鲁棒性的基准。
AI.motivation: 现有SSL方法在高风险领域（如医疗和自动驾驶）中缺乏对模型不确定性的评估，导致其可靠性不足，需通过基准测试推动相关研究。
AI.method: 研究对比了多种SSL方法（如Jigsaw、Rotation、BERT等），在视觉和语言任务中训练后，通过分类准确率和预期校准误差（ECE）评估其在分布偏移数据集（如MNIST-C、CIFAR-10-C）上的表现。
AI.result: 实验结果表明不同SSL方法在泛化能力和不确定性估计上存在显著差异，并提供了可复现的代码和实验数据。
AI.conclusion: 该基准为未来研究可靠SSL方法提供了起点，强调了在模型评估中同时考虑鲁棒性和不确定性估计的重要性。

authors_text: Shenglan Du,Nail Ibrahimli,Jantien Stoter,Julian Kooij,Liangliang Nan
title: Push-the-Boundary: Boundary-aware Feature Propagation for Semantic Segmentation of 3D Point Clouds
title_zh: 突破边界：用于 3D 点云语义分割的边界感知特征传播
abstract: Feedforward fully convolutional neural networks currently dominate in semantic segmentation of 3D point clouds. Despite their great success, they suffer from the loss of local information at low-level layers, posing significant challenges to accurate scene segmentation and precise object boundary delineation. Prior works either address this issue by post-processing or jointly learn object boundaries to implicitly improve feature encoding of the networks. These approaches often require additional modules which are difficult to integrate into the original architecture. To improve the segmentation near object boundaries, we propose a boundary-aware feature propagation mechanism. This mechanism is achieved by exploiting a multi-task learning framework that aims to explicitly guide the boundaries to their original locations. With one shared encoder, our network outputs (i) boundary localization, (ii) prediction of directions pointing to the object's interior, and (iii) semantic segmentation, in three parallel streams. The predicted boundaries and directions are fused to propagate the learned features to refine the segmentation. We conduct extensive experiments on the S3DIS and SensatUrban datasets against various baseline methods, demonstrating that our proposed approach yields consistent improvements by reducing boundary errors. Our code is available at https://github.com/shenglandu/PushBoundary.
summary: Feedforward fully convolutional neural networks currently dominate in semantic segmentation of 3D point clouds. Despite their great success, they suffer from the loss of local information at low-level layers, posing significant challenges to accurate scene segmentation and precise object boundary delineation. Prior works either address this issue by post-processing or jointly learn object boundaries to implicitly improve feature encoding of the networks. These approaches often require additional modules which are difficult to integrate into the original architecture. To improve the segmentation near object boundaries, we propose a boundary-aware feature propagation mechanism. This mechanism is achieved by exploiting a multi-task learning framework that aims to explicitly guide the boundaries to their original locations. With one shared encoder, our network outputs (i) boundary localization, (ii) prediction of directions pointing to the object's interior, and (iii) semantic segmentation, in three parallel streams. The predicted boundaries and directions are fused to propagate the learned features to refine the segmentation. We conduct extensive experiments on the S3DIS and SensatUrban datasets against various baseline methods, demonstrating that our proposed approach yields consistent improvements by reducing boundary errors. Our code is available at https://github.com/shenglandu/PushBoundary.
abstract_zh: 前馈全卷积神经网络目前在 3D 点云语义分割中占据主导地位。尽管取得了巨大的成功，但它们在低层局部信息丢失，对准确的场景分割和精确的对象边界描绘提出了重大挑战。先前的工作要么通过后处理解决这个问题，要么联合学习对象边界以隐式改进网络的特征编码。这些方法通常需要额外的模块，而这些模块很难集成到原始架构中。为了改善对象边界附近的分割，我们提出了一种边界感知特征传播机制。这种机制是通过利用多任务学习框架来实现的，该框架旨在明确地将边界引导到其原始位置。通过一个共享编码器，我们的网络在三个并行流中输出（i）边界定位，（ii）指向对象内部的方向预测，以及（iii）语义分割。预测的边界和方向被融合以传播学习的特征以细化分割。我们针对各种基线方法在 S3DIS 和 SensatUrban 数据集上进行了广泛的实验，证明我们提出的方法通过减少边界误差产生了一致的改进。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/shenglandu/PushBoundary 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种边界感知的特征传播机制，用于改进3D点云的语义分割，特别是在物体边界区域的分割精度。
AI.motivation: 现有基于全卷积网络的3D点云语义分割方法在低层特征中丢失局部信息，导致场景分割和物体边界描绘不准确。传统方法依赖后处理或额外模块，难以融入原始架构。
AI.method: 设计多任务学习框架，通过共享编码器同时输出边界定位、物体内部方向预测和语义分割三路并行流，融合预测边界与方向信息传播特征以优化分割结果。
AI.result: 在S3DIS和SensatUrban数据集上实验表明，该方法有效减少边界误差，相比多种基线方法取得持续性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 边界感知特征传播机制无需复杂模块即可提升3D点云分割精度，验证了显式引导边界信息的有效性。

search_text: Push-the-Boundary: Boundary-aware Feature Propagation for Semantic Segmentation of 3D Point Clouds 突破边界：用于 3D 点云语义分割的边界感知特征传播 Feedforward fully convolutional neural networks currently dominate in semantic segmentation of 3D point clouds. Despite their great success, they suffer from the loss of local information at low-level layers, posing significant challenges to accurate scene segmentation and precise object boundary delineation. Prior works either address this issue by post-processing or jointly learn object boundaries to implicitly improve feature encoding of the networks. These approaches often require additional modules which are difficult to integrate into the original architecture. To improve the segmentation near object boundaries, we propose a boundary-aware feature propagation mechanism. This mechanism is achieved by exploiting a multi-task learning framework that aims to explicitly guide the boundaries to their original locations. With one shared encoder, our network outputs (i) boundary localization, (ii) prediction of directions pointing to the object's interior, and (iii) semantic segmentation, in three parallel streams. The predicted boundaries and directions are fused to propagate the learned features to refine the segmentation. We conduct extensive experiments on the S3DIS and SensatUrban datasets against various baseline methods, demonstrating that our proposed approach yields consistent improvements by reducing boundary errors. authors_text: Aritra Bhowmik,Yu Wang,Nora Baka,Martin R. Oswald,Cees G. M. Snoek
title: Detecting Objects with Context-Likelihood Graphs and Graph Refinement
title_zh: 使用上下文似然图和图细化检测对象
comment: 13 pages, 8 figures. In Proceedings of International Conference on Computer Vision (ICCV) 2023
comments: 13 pages, 8 figures. In Proceedings of International Conference on Computer Vision (ICCV) 2023
abstract: The goal of this paper is to detect objects by exploiting their interrelationships. Contrary to existing methods, which learn objects and relations separately, our key idea is to learn the object-relation distribution jointly. We first propose a novel way of creating a graphical representation of an image from inter-object relation priors and initial class predictions, we call a context-likelihood graph. We then learn the joint distribution with an energy-based modeling technique which allows to sample and refine the context-likelihood graph iteratively for a given image. Our formulation of jointly learning the distribution enables us to generate a more accurate graph representation of an image which leads to a better object detection performance. We demonstrate the benefits of our context-likelihood graph formulation and the energy-based graph refinement via experiments on the Visual Genome and MS-COCO datasets where we achieve a consistent improvement over object detectors like DETR and Faster-RCNN, as well as alternative methods modeling object interrelationships separately. Our method is detector agnostic, end-to-end trainable, and especially beneficial for rare object classes.
summary: The goal of this paper is to detect objects by exploiting their interrelationships. Contrary to existing methods, which learn objects and relations separately, our key idea is to learn the object-relation distribution jointly. We first propose a novel way of creating a graphical representation of an image from inter-object relation priors and initial class predictions, we call a context-likelihood graph. We then learn the joint distribution with an energy-based modeling technique which allows to sample and refine the context-likelihood graph iteratively for a given image. Our formulation of jointly learning the distribution enables us to generate a more accurate graph representation of an image which leads to a better object detection performance. We demonstrate the benefits of our context-likelihood graph formulation and the energy-based graph refinement via experiments on the Visual Genome and MS-COCO datasets where we achieve a consistent improvement over object detectors like DETR and Faster-RCNN, as well as alternative methods modeling object interrelationships separately. Our method is detector agnostic, end-to-end trainable, and especially beneficial for rare object classes.
abstract_zh: 本文的目标是通过利用对象之间的相互关系来检测对象。与单独学习对象和关系的现有方法相反，我们的关键思想是共同学习对象关系分布。我们首先提出了一种根据对象间关系先验和初始类预测创建图像图形表示的新颖方法，我们称之为上下文似然图。然后，我们使用基于能量的建模技术来学习联合分布，该技术允许对给定图像迭代地采样和细化上下文似然图。我们联合学习分布的公式使我们能够生成更准确的图像图形表示，从而获得更好的对象检测性能。我们通过 Visual Genome 和 MS-COCO 数据集上的实验展示了上下文似然图公式和基于能量的图细化的好处，在这些数据集上，我们实现了对 DETR 和 Faster-RCNN 等对象检测器的一致改进，以及分别建模对象相互关系的替代方法。我们的方法与检测器无关，可端到端训练，并且对于稀有物体类别特别有益。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合上下文似然图与图优化的物体检测方法，通过联合学习物体与关系分布提升检测性能。
AI.motivation: 传统方法分别学习物体与关系，导致信息不一致。联合学习物体-关系分布可更准确建模物体间交互，提升检测效果。
AI.method: 构建基于物体关系先验和初始预测的上下文似然图，采用能量模型迭代优化图结构，实现端到端联合分布学习。
AI.result: 在Visual Genome和MS-COCO数据集上优于DETR/Faster-RCNN等方法，尤其对罕见物体类别效果显著。
AI.conclusion: 联合学习框架有效捕捉物体关系，方法具有检测器无关性与端到端可训练性，为稀有物体检测提供新思路。

authors_text: Emile van Krieken,Thiviyan Thanapalasingam,Jakub M. Tomczak,Frank van Harmelen,Annette ten Teije
title: A-NeSI: A Scalable Approximate Method for Probabilistic Neurosymbolic Inference
title_zh: A-NeSI：概率神经符号推理的可扩展近似方法
comment: Accepted to NeurIPS 2023. 13 pages, 11 appendix pages, 7 figures
comments: Accepted to NeurIPS 2023. 13 pages, 11 appendix pages, 7 figures
abstract: We study the problem of combining neural networks with symbolic reasoning. Recently introduced frameworks for Probabilistic Neurosymbolic Learning (PNL), such as DeepProbLog, perform exponential-time exact inference, limiting the scalability of PNL solutions. We introduce Approximate Neurosymbolic Inference (A-NeSI): a new framework for PNL that uses neural networks for scalable approximate inference. A-NeSI 1) performs approximate inference in polynomial time without changing the semantics of probabilistic logics; 2) is trained using data generated by the background knowledge; 3) can generate symbolic explanations of predictions; and 4) can guarantee the satisfaction of logical constraints at test time, which is vital in safety-critical applications. Our experiments show that A-NeSI is the first end-to-end method to solve three neurosymbolic tasks with exponential combinatorial scaling. Finally, our experiments show that A-NeSI achieves explainability and safety without a penalty in performance.
summary: We study the problem of combining neural networks with symbolic reasoning. Recently introduced frameworks for Probabilistic Neurosymbolic Learning (PNL), such as DeepProbLog, perform exponential-time exact inference, limiting the scalability of PNL solutions. We introduce Approximate Neurosymbolic Inference (A-NeSI): a new framework for PNL that uses neural networks for scalable approximate inference. A-NeSI 1) performs approximate inference in polynomial time without changing the semantics of probabilistic logics; 2) is trained using data generated by the background knowledge; 3) can generate symbolic explanations of predictions; and 4) can guarantee the satisfaction of logical constraints at test time, which is vital in safety-critical applications. Our experiments show that A-NeSI is the first end-to-end method to solve three neurosymbolic tasks with exponential combinatorial scaling. Finally, our experiments show that A-NeSI achieves explainability and safety without a penalty in performance.
abstract_zh: 我们研究神经网络与符号推理相结合的问题。最近推出的概率神经符号学习 (PNL) 框架（例如 DeepProbLog）执行指数时间精确推理，限制了 PNL 解决方案的可扩展性。我们介绍近似神经符号推理 (A-NeSI)：一种新的 PNL 框架，它使用神经网络进行可扩展的近似推理。 A-NeSI 1）在多项式时间内进行近似推理，而不改变概率逻辑的语义； 2）使用背景知识生成的数据进行训练； 3）可以生成预测的符号解释； 4）可以保证测试时逻辑约束的满足，这在安全关键应用中至关重要。我们的实验表明，A-NeSI 是第一个以指数组合尺度解决三个神经符号任务的端到端方法。最后，我们的实验表明 A-NeSI 实现了可解释性和安全性，且不会影响性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出A-NeSI框架，通过神经网络实现可扩展的概率神经符号推理，解决现有方法计算效率低的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有概率神经符号学习框架（如DeepProbLog）依赖指数时间精确推理，导致可扩展性受限，需开发高效近似方法。
AI.method: A-NeSI采用多项式时间近似推理，保留概率逻辑语义，利用背景知识生成数据训练，并保证测试时逻辑约束满足。
AI.result: 实验表明A-NeSI是首个解决三项指数级组合扩展任务的端到端方法，在保持性能的同时实现可解释性与安全性。
AI.conclusion: A-NeSI有效平衡了神经符号系统的可扩展性、可解释性与安全性，为安全关键应用提供新解决方案。

search_text: A-NeSI: A Scalable Approximate Method for Probabilistic Neurosymbolic Inference A-NeSI：概率神经符号推理的可扩展近似方法 We study the problem of combining neural networks with symbolic reasoning. Recently introduced frameworks for Probabilistic Neurosymbolic Learning (PNL), such as DeepProbLog, perform exponential-time exact inference, limiting the scalability of PNL solutions. We introduce Approximate Neurosymbolic Inference (A-NeSI): a new framework for PNL that uses neural networks for scalable approximate inference. A-NeSI 1) performs approximate inference in polynomial time without changing the semantics of probabilistic logics; 2) is trained using data generated by the background knowledge; 3) can generate symbolic explanations of predictions; and 4) can guarantee the satisfaction of logical constraints at test time, which is vital in safety-critical applications. Our experiments show that A-NeSI is the first end-to-end method to solve three neurosymbolic tasks with exponential combinatorial scaling. Finally, our experiments show that A-NeSI achieves explainability and safety without a penalty in performance. 我们研究神经网络与符号推理相结合的问题。最近推出的概率神经符号学习 (PNL) 框架（例如 DeepProbLog）执行指数时间精确推理，限制了 PNL 解决方案的可扩展性。我们介绍近似神经符号推理 (A-NeSI)：一种新的 PNL 框架，它使用神经网络进行可扩展的近似推理。 A-NeSI 1）在多项式时间内进行近似推理，而不改变概率逻辑的语义； 2）使用背景知识生成的数据进行训练； 3）可以生成预测的符号解释； 4）可以保证测试时逻辑约束的满足，这在安全关键应用中至关重要。我们的实验表明，A-NeSI 是第一个以指数组合尺度解决三个神经符号任务的端到端方法。最后，我们的实验表明 A-NeSI 实现了可解释性和安全性，且不会影响性能。 本文提出A-NeSI框架，通过神经网络实现可扩展的概率神经符号推理，解决现有方法计算效率低的问题。 Emile van Krieken,Thiviyan Thanapalasingam,Jakub M. Tomczak,Frank van Harmelen,Annette ten Teije cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.LO,stat.ML

authors_text: Narek Bojikian,Vera Chekan,Falko Hegerfeld,Stefan Kratsch
title: Tight Bounds for Connectivity Problems Parameterized by Cutwidth
title_zh: 由切割宽度参数化的连接问题的严格界限
comment: 77 pages, 17 figures; accepted at STACS 2023
comments: 77 pages, 17 figures; accepted at STACS 2023
abstract: In this work we start the investigation of tight complexity bounds for connectivity problems parameterized by cutwidth assuming the Strong Exponential-Time Hypothesis (SETH). Van Geffen et al. posed this question for odd cycle transversal and feedback vertex set. We answer it for these two and four further problems, namely connected vertex cover, connected domintaing set, steiner tree, and connected odd cycle transversal. For the latter two problems it sufficed to prove lower bounds that match the running time inherited from parameterization by treewidth; for the others we provide faster algorithms than relative to treewidth and prove matching lower bounds. For upper bounds we first extend the idea of Groenland et al.~[STACS~2022] to solve what we call coloring-like problem. Such problems are defined by a symmetric matrix $M$ over $\mathbb{F}_2$ indexed by a set of colors. The goal is to count the number (modulo some prime $p$) of colorings of a graph such that $M$ has a $1$-entry if indexed by the colors of the end-points of any edge. We show that this problem can be solved faster if $M$ has small rank over $\mathbb{F}_p$. We apply this result to get our upper bounds for connected vertex cover and connected dominating set. The upper bounds for odd cycle transversal and feedback vertex set use a subdivision trick to get below the bounds that matrix rank would yield.

Van Geffen et al. posed this question for odd cycle transversal and feedback vertex set. We answer it for these two and four further problems, namely connected vertex cover, connected domintaing set, steiner tree, and connected odd cycle transversal. For the latter two problems it sufficed to prove lower bounds that match the running time inherited from parameterization by treewidth; for the others we provide faster algorithms than relative to treewidth and prove matching lower bounds. For upper bounds we first extend the idea of Groenland et al.~[STACS~2022] to solve what we call coloring-like problem. Such problems are defined by a symmetric matrix $M$ over $\mathbb{F}_2$ indexed by a set of colors. The goal is to count the number (modulo some prime $p$) of colorings of a graph such that $M$ has a $1$-entry if indexed by the colors of the end-points of any edge. We show that this problem can be solved faster if $M$ has small rank over $\mathbb{F}_p$. We apply this result to get our upper bounds for connected vertex cover and connected dominating set. The upper bounds for odd cycle transversal and feedback vertex set use a subdivision trick to get below the bounds that matrix rank would yield.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们开始研究由截宽参数化的连接问题的严格复杂性界限，假设强指数时间假设（SETH）。范格芬等人。针对奇循环横向和反馈顶点集提出了这个问题。我们回答这两个和四个进一步的问题，即连通顶点覆盖、连通支配集、斯坦纳树和连通奇循环横截。对于后两个问题，只需证明与从树宽参数化继承的运行时间相匹配的下界即可；对于其他算法，我们提供比相对于树宽更快的算法，并证明匹配的下限。对于上限，我们首先扩展 Groenland 等人的思想~[STACS~2022]来解决我们所说的类着色问题。此类问题由 $\mathbb{F}_2$ 上的对称矩阵 $M$ 定义，并由一组颜色索引。目标是计算图的着色数量（以某个素数 $p$ 为模），使得如果按任何边端点的颜色进行索引，则 $M$ 具有 $1$ 条目。我们证明，如果 $M$ 比 $\mathbb{F}_p$ 的排名较小，则可以更快地解决这个问题。我们应用这个结果来获得连通顶点覆盖和连通支配集的上限。奇数循环遍历和反馈顶点集的上限使用细分技巧来低于矩阵秩将产生的界限。

AI.tldr: 本文研究基于cutwidth参数的连通性问题的严格复杂度界限，针对多个经典问题提供算法与下界证明。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏基于cutwidth参数的连通性问题的严格复杂度分析，需结合SETH假设填补这一空白。
AI.method: 扩展Groenland等人提出的矩阵秩优化方法，结合分层技巧处理特定问题，证明算法下界与上界匹配。
AI.result: 为奇环横截集、反馈顶点集等六个问题建立严格复杂度界限，部分问题算法优于树宽参数化方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过矩阵秩分析和分层技巧，系统建立了cutwidth参数下连通性问题的复杂度界限，推动参数化复杂度理论发展。

authors_text: Loris Di Natale,Bratislav Svetozarevic,Philipp Heer,Colin Neil Jones
title: Towards Scalable Physically Consistent Neural Networks: an Application to Data-driven Multi-zone Thermal Building Models
title_zh: 迈向可扩展的物理一致的神经网络：数据驱动的多区域热建筑模型的应用
comment: Accepted in Applied Energy
comments: Accepted in Applied Energy
abstract: With more and more data being collected, data-driven modeling methods have been gaining in popularity in recent years. While physically sound, classical gray-box models are often cumbersome to identify and scale, and their accuracy might be hindered by their limited expressiveness. On the other hand, classical black-box methods, typically relying on Neural Networks (NNs) nowadays, often achieve impressive performance, even at scale, by deriving statistical patterns from data. However, they remain completely oblivious to the underlying physical laws, which may lead to potentially catastrophic failures if decisions for real-world physical systems are based on them. Physically Consistent Neural Networks (PCNNs) were recently developed to address these aforementioned issues, ensuring physical consistency while still leveraging NNs to attain state-of-the-art accuracy. In this work, we scale PCNNs to model building temperature dynamics and propose a thorough comparison with classical gray-box and black-box methods. More precisely, we design three distinct PCNN extensions, thereby exemplifying the modularity and flexibility of the architecture, and formally prove their physical consistency. In the presented case study, PCNNs are shown to achieve state-of-the-art accuracy, even outperforming classical NN-based models despite their constrained structure. Our investigations furthermore provide a clear illustration of NNs achieving seemingly good performance while remaining completely physics-agnostic, which can be misleading in practice. While this performance comes at the cost of computational complexity, PCNNs on the other hand show accuracy improvements of 17-35% compared to all other physically consistent methods, paving the way for scalable physically consistent models with state-of-the-art performance.
summary: With more and more data being collected, data-driven modeling methods have been gaining in popularity in recent years. While physically sound, classical gray-box models are often cumbersome to identify and scale, and their accuracy might be hindered by their limited expressiveness. On the other hand, classical black-box methods, typically relying on Neural Networks (NNs) nowadays, often achieve impressive performance, even at scale, by deriving statistical patterns from data. However, they remain completely oblivious to the underlying physical laws, which may lead to potentially catastrophic failures if decisions for real-world physical systems are based on them. Physically Consistent Neural Networks (PCNNs) were recently developed to address these aforementioned issues, ensuring physical consistency while still leveraging NNs to attain state-of-the-art accuracy. In this work, we scale PCNNs to model building temperature dynamics and propose a thorough comparison with classical gray-box and black-box methods. More precisely, we design three distinct PCNN extensions, thereby exemplifying the modularity and flexibility of the architecture, and formally prove their physical consistency. In the presented case study, PCNNs are shown to achieve state-of-the-art accuracy, even outperforming classical NN-based models despite their constrained structure. Our investigations furthermore provide a clear illustration of NNs achieving seemingly good performance while remaining completely physics-agnostic, which can be misleading in practice. While this performance comes at the cost of computational complexity, PCNNs on the other hand show accuracy improvements of 17-35% compared to all other physically consistent methods, paving the way for scalable physically consistent models with state-of-the-art performance.
abstract_zh: 随着收集的数据越来越多，数据驱动的建模方法近年来越来越受欢迎。虽然物理上合理，但经典的灰盒模型通常难以识别和缩放，并且其准确性可能因其有限的表达能力而受到阻碍。另一方面，如今通常依赖于神经网络 (NN) 的经典黑盒方法通常通过从数据中导出统计模式来实现令人印象深刻的性能，即使是在规模上也是如此。然而，他们仍然完全忽视了潜在的物理定律，如果现实世界的物理系统的决策基于它们，则可能会导致潜在的灾难性故障。最近开发的物理一致性神经网络 (PCNN) 就是为了解决上述问题，确保物理一致性，同时仍然利用神经网络来获得最先进的准确性。在这项工作中，我们扩展了 PCNN 来模拟建筑温度动态，并提出与经典灰盒和黑盒方法的彻底比较。更准确地说，我们设计了三种不同的 PCNN 扩展，从而体现了架构的模块化和灵活性，并正式证明了它们的物理一致性。在所提出的案例研究中，PCNN 被证明可以实现最先进的精度，甚至超越基于神经网络的经典模型，尽管其结构受到限制。此外，我们的研究清楚地说明了神经网络在保持完全与物理无关的情况下实现了看似良好的性能，这在实践中可能会产生误导。虽然这种性能是以计算复杂性为代价的，但另一方面，与所有其他物理一致方法相比，PCNN 的精度提高了 17-35%，为具有最先进性能的可扩展物理一致模型铺平了道路。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在扩展物理一致性神经网络（PCNN）以建模多区建筑热动态，并与传统灰箱和黑箱方法进行比较。
AI.motivation: 传统灰箱模型难以扩展且表达能力有限，黑箱神经网络虽性能优异但忽略物理规律，可能导致实际系统决策失误，需兼顾物理一致性与高精度的模型。
AI.method: 设计三种PCNN扩展架构，证明其物理一致性，并通过案例研究对比经典方法。
AI.result: PCNN在保持结构约束下 accuracy 超过经典神经网络，较其他物理一致性方法提升17-35%。
AI.conclusion: PCNN实现了可扩展的物理一致性模型，在精度与物理规律遵循间取得平衡，为实际应用提供新方向。

While physically sound, classical gray-box models are often cumbersome to identify and scale, and their accuracy might be hindered by their limited expressiveness. On the other hand, classical black-box methods, typically relying on Neural Networks (NNs) nowadays, often achieve impressive performance, even at scale, by deriving statistical patterns from data. However, they remain completely oblivious to the underlying physical laws, which may lead to potentially catastrophic failures if decisions for real-world physical systems are based on them. Physically Consistent Neural Networks (PCNNs) were recently developed to address these aforementioned issues, ensuring physical consistency while still leveraging NNs to attain state-of-the-art accuracy. In this work, we scale PCNNs to model building temperature dynamics and propose a thorough comparison with classical gray-box and black-box methods. More precisely, we design three distinct PCNN extensions, thereby exemplifying the modularity and flexibility of the architecture, and formally prove their physical consistency. In the presented case study, PCNNs are shown to achieve state-of-the-art accuracy, even outperforming classical NN-based models despite their constrained structure. Our investigations furthermore provide a clear illustration of NNs achieving seemingly good performance while remaining completely physics-agnostic, which can be misleading in practice. While this performance comes at the cost of computational complexity, PCNNs on the other hand show accuracy improvements of 17-35% compared to all other physically consistent methods, paving the way for scalable physically consistent models with state-of-the-art performance. 随着收集的数据越来越多，数据驱动的建模方法近年来越来越受欢迎。虽然物理上合理，但经典的灰盒模型通常难以识别和缩放，并且其准确性可能因其有限的表达能力而受到阻碍。另一方面，如今通常依赖于神经网络 (NN) 的经典黑盒方法通常通过从数据中导出统计模式来实现令人印象深刻的性能，即使是在规模上也是如此。然而，他们仍然完全忽视了潜在的物理定律，如果现实世界的物理系统的决策基于它们，则可能会导致潜在的灾难性故障。最近开发的物理一致性神经网络 (PCNN) 就是为了解决上述问题，确保物理一致性，同时仍然利用神经网络来获得最先进的准确性。在这项工作中，我们扩展了 PCNN 来模拟建筑温度动态，并提出与经典灰盒和黑盒方法的彻底比较。更准确地说，我们设计了三种不同的 PCNN 扩展，从而体现了架构的模块化和灵活性，并正式证明了它们的物理一致性。在所提出的案例研究中，PCNN 被证明可以实现最先进的精度，甚至超越基于神经网络的经典模型，尽管其结构受到限制。此外，我们的研究清楚地说明了神经网络在保持完全与物理无关的情况下实现了看似良好的性能，这在实践中可能会产生误导。虽然这种性能是以计算复杂性为代价的，但另一方面，与所有其他物理一致方法相比，PCNN 的精度提高了 17-35%，为具有最先进性能的可扩展物理一致模型铺平了道路。 本文旨在扩展物理一致性神经网络（PCNN）以建模多区建筑热动态，并与传统灰箱和黑箱方法进行比较。 Loris Di Natale,Bratislav Svetozarevic,Philipp Heer,Colin Neil Jones cs.LG,cs.AI,eess.SY

authors_text: Runmin Cong,Ke Huang,Jianjun Lei,Yao Zhao,Qingming Huang,Sam Kwong
title: Multi-Projection Fusion and Refinement Network for Salient Object Detection in 360° Omnidirectional Image
title_zh: 用于 360° 全向图像中显着目标检测的多投影融合和细化网络
comment: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Neural Networks and Learning Systems 2022
comments: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Neural Networks and Learning Systems 2022
abstract: Salient object detection (SOD) aims to determine the most visually attractive objects in an image. With the development of virtual reality technology, 360° omnidirectional image has been widely used, but the SOD task in 360° omnidirectional image is seldom studied due to its severe distortions and complex scenes. In this paper, we propose a Multi-Projection Fusion and Refinement Network (MPFR-Net) to detect the salient objects in 360° omnidirectional image. Different from the existing methods, the equirectangular projection image and four corresponding cube-unfolding images are embedded into the network simultaneously as inputs, where the cube-unfolding images not only provide supplementary information for equirectangular projection image, but also ensure the object integrity of the cube-map projection. In order to make full use of these two projection modes, a Dynamic Weighting Fusion (DWF) module is designed to adaptively integrate the features of different projections in a complementary and dynamic manner from the perspective of inter and intra features. Furthermore, in order to fully explore the way of interaction between encoder and decoder features, a Filtration and Refinement (FR) module is designed to suppress the redundant information between the feature itself and the feature. Experimental results on two omnidirectional datasets demonstrate that the proposed approach outperforms the state-of-the-art methods both qualitatively and quantitatively.
summary: Salient object detection (SOD) aims to determine the most visually attractive objects in an image. With the development of virtual reality technology, 360° omnidirectional image has been widely used, but the SOD task in 360° omnidirectional image is seldom studied due to its severe distortions and complex scenes. In this paper, we propose a Multi-Projection Fusion and Refinement Network (MPFR-Net) to detect the salient objects in 360° omnidirectional image. Different from the existing methods, the equirectangular projection image and four corresponding cube-unfolding images are embedded into the network simultaneously as inputs, where the cube-unfolding images not only provide supplementary information for equirectangular projection image, but also ensure the object integrity of the cube-map projection. In order to make full use of these two projection modes, a Dynamic Weighting Fusion (DWF) module is designed to adaptively integrate the features of different projections in a complementary and dynamic manner from the perspective of inter and intra features. Furthermore, in order to fully explore the way of interaction between encoder and decoder features, a Filtration and Refinement (FR) module is designed to suppress the redundant information between the feature itself and the feature. Experimental results on two omnidirectional datasets demonstrate that the proposed approach outperforms the state-of-the-art methods both qualitatively and quantitatively.
abstract_zh: 显着对象检测（SOD）旨在确定图像中最具视觉吸引力的对象。随着虚拟现实技术的发展，360°全方位图像得到了广泛的应用，但360°全方位图像中的SOD任务由于其严重的畸变和复杂的场景而研究很少。在本文中，我们提出了一种多投影融合和细化网络（MPFR-Net）来检测 360° 全向图像中的显着对象。与现有方法不同，等距柱状投影图像和四个相应的立方体展开图像作为输入同时嵌入到网络中，其中立方体展开图像不仅为等距柱状投影图像提供补充信息，而且保证立方体贴图投影的对象完整性。为了充分利用这两种投影模式，设计了动态加权融合（DWF）模块，从帧间和帧内特征的角度，以互补和动态的方式自适应地集成不同投影的特征。此外，为了充分探索编码器和解码器特征之间的交互方式，设计了过滤和细化（FR）模块来抑制特征本身与特征之间的冗余信息。两个全向数据集的实验结果表明，所提出的方法在定性和定量上都优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多投影融合与优化网络（MPFR-Net），用于检测360°全景图像中的显著物体。
AI.motivation: 360°全景图像因严重失真和复杂场景导致显著物体检测（SOD）研究较少，现有方法难以有效处理此类图像的挑战。
AI.method: 同时输入等距投影图像与四个立方展开图，设计动态加权融合模块（DWF）自适应整合多投影特征，并引入过滤优化模块（FR）增强编码器-解码器特征交互。
AI.result: 在两个全景数据集上实验表明，该方法在定性和定量指标上均优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过多投影融合与特征优化，MPFR-Net有效解决了360°全景图像显著物体检测中的失真与场景复杂性问题。

authors_text: Jiang-Yao Luo,Liang Chen,Wei-Kun Chen,Jian-Hua Yuan,Yu-Hong Dai
title: A Cut-and-solve Algorithm for Virtual Machine Consolidation Problem
title_zh: 虚拟机整合问题的切解算法
comment: 13 pages, 9 figures
comments: 13 pages, 9 figures
abstract: The virtual machine consolidation problem (VMCP) attempts to determine which servers to be activated, how to allocate virtual machines (VMs) to the activated servers, and how to migrate VMs among servers such that the summation of activated, allocation, and migration costs is minimized subject to the resource constraints of the servers and other practical constraints. In this paper, we first propose a new mixed integer linear programming (MILP) formulation for the VMCP. We show that compared with existing formulations, the proposed formulation is much more compact in terms of smaller numbers of variables or constraints, which makes it suitable for solving large-scale problems. We then develop a cut-and-solve (C&S) algorithm, a tree search algorithm to efficiently solve the VMCP to optimality. The proposed C&S algorithm is based on a novel relaxation of the VMCP that provides a stronger lower bound than the natural continuous relaxation of the VMCP, making a smaller search tree. By extensive computational experiments, we show that (i) the proposed formulation significantly outperforms existing formulations in terms of solution efficiency; and (ii) compared with standard MILP solvers, the proposed C&S algorithm is much more efficient.
summary: The virtual machine consolidation problem (VMCP) attempts to determine which servers to be activated, how to allocate virtual machines (VMs) to the activated servers, and how to migrate VMs among servers such that the summation of activated, allocation, and migration costs is minimized subject to the resource constraints of the servers and other practical constraints. In this paper, we first propose a new mixed integer linear programming (MILP) formulation for the VMCP. We show that compared with existing formulations, the proposed formulation is much more compact in terms of smaller numbers of variables or constraints, which makes it suitable for solving large-scale problems. We then develop a cut-and-solve (C&S) algorithm, a tree search algorithm to efficiently solve the VMCP to optimality. The proposed C&S algorithm is based on a novel relaxation of the VMCP that provides a stronger lower bound than the natural continuous relaxation of the VMCP, making a smaller search tree. By extensive computational experiments, we show that (i) the proposed formulation significantly outperforms existing formulations in terms of solution efficiency; and (ii) compared with standard MILP solvers, the proposed C&S algorithm is much more efficient.
abstract_zh: 虚拟机整合问题（VMCP）试图确定要激活哪些服务器，如何将虚拟机（VM）分配给激活的服务器，以及如何在服务器之间迁移VM，使得激活、分配和迁移成本的总和在服务器的资源限制和其他实际约束下最小化。在本文中，我们首先提出了一种新的 VMCP 混合整数线性规划 (MILP) 公式。我们表明，与现有的公式相比，所提出的公式在变量或约束数量较少方面更加紧凑，这使得它适合解决大规模问题。然后，我们开发了一种剪切求解 (C&S) 算法，这是一种树搜索算法，可以有效地求解 VMCP 的最优性。所提出的 C&S 算法基于 VMCP 的新颖松弛，它提供了比 VMCP 自然连续松弛更强的下界，从而形成更小的搜索树。通过大量的计算实验，我们表明（i）所提出的公式在求解效率方面显着优于现有公式； (ii) 与标准 MILP 求解器相比，所提出的 C&S 算法效率更高。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新的混合整数线性规划（MILP）模型和割集求解算法（C&S），用于解决虚拟机整合问题（VMCP），以最小化激活、分配和迁移成本。
AI.motivation: 现有VMCP模型在变量或约束数量上不够紧凑，难以处理大规模问题，且标准求解器效率不足。
AI.method: 提出更紧凑的MILP模型，并开发基于新型松弛方法的C&S算法，通过更强的下界减少搜索树规模。
AI.result: 新模型在求解效率上显著优于现有方法，C&S算法相比标准MILP求解器效率提升明显。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的模型和算法有效提升了VMCP问题的求解效率和规模适应性。

authors_text: Zhipeng Chang,Siddharth Jha,Yunfei Xia
title: Linear features segmentation from aerial images
title_zh: 航空图像的线性特征分割
abstract: The rapid development of remote sensing technologies have gained significant attention due to their ability to accurately localize, classify, and segment objects from aerial images. These technologies are commonly used in unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) equipped with high-resolution cameras or sensors to capture data over large areas. This data is useful for various applications, such as monitoring and inspecting cities, towns, and terrains. In this paper, we presented a method for classifying and segmenting city road traffic dashed lines from aerial images using deep learning models such as U-Net and SegNet. The annotated data is used to train these models, which are then used to classify and segment the aerial image into two classes: dashed lines and non-dashed lines. However, the deep learning model may not be able to identify all dashed lines due to poor painting or occlusion by trees or shadows. To address this issue, we proposed a method to add missed lines to the segmentation output. We also extracted the x and y coordinates of each dashed line from the segmentation output, which can be used by city planners to construct a CAD file for digital visualization of the roads.

abstract_zh: 遥感技术的快速发展因其能够从航空图像中准确定位、分类和分割物体而受到广泛关注。这些技术通常用于配备高分辨率摄像机或传感器的无人机（UAV），以捕获大面积的数据。这些数据可用于各种应用，例如监视和检查城市、城镇和地形。在本文中，我们提出了一种使用 U-Net 和 SegNet 等深度学习模型对航空图像中的城市道路交通虚线进行分类和分割的方法。带注释的数据用于训练这些模型，然后用于将航空图像分类和分割为两类：虚线和非虚线。然而，由于绘制不佳或被树木或阴影遮挡，深度学习模型可能无法识别所有虚线。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种将丢失的行添加到分割输出中的方法。我们还从分割输出中提取了每条虚线的 x 和 y 坐标，城市规划者可以使用它来构建用于道路数字可视化的 CAD 文件。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的方法，用于从航拍图像中分类和分割城市道路的虚线，并通过后处理补充遗漏的虚线以生成CAD文件。
AI.motivation: 遥感技术在城市监测中至关重要，但现有深度学习模型可能因虚线绘制不佳或被遮挡而无法识别所有虚线，需改进分割精度并提供可用数据。
AI.method: 采用U-Net和SegNet等深度学习模型，利用标注数据训练分类分割模型；通过后处理补充遗漏虚线，并提取坐标生成CAD文件。
AI.result: 模型能有效分割大部分虚线，后处理补充了遗漏部分，为城市规划提供了数字化道路可视化数据，但遮挡问题仍影响精度。
AI.conclusion: 结合深度学习与后处理可提升虚线分割效果，生成的CAD文件有助于城市规划，未来需进一步优化遮挡场景下的识别能力。
